pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: ships auto aggro as they spawn

pockets.heading: Objective
lines: The 2 ship wrecks which each contain 23 crew members.

AWolfByTheEars5am.title: A Wolf by the Ears, Level 5

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Ships at 65-115k if you warp to 0.  Fighters and Carrier aggro at Warp-In.  Remaining ships aggro upon your first shot.
5 x Fighters (Imperial Fighter) Carrier Support Group 1

pockets.heading: Carrier Spawns
lines: When the Carrier’s shields are reduced by 25%, there spawns:
5 x Fighters (Imperial Fighter) Carrier Support Group 2
When the Carrier’s armor are reduced to 25%, there spawns:
5 x Fighters (Imperial Fighter) Carrier Support Group 3
When the Carrier’s hull is reduced by 25%, there spawns:
5 x Fighters (Imperial Fighter) Carrier Support Group 4

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Mission occurs in normal space, so you can always warp to distances and to bookmarks farther away from the NPCs.
Ships on the left may be aggro’ed separately if you warp-in far enough away from the group on the right
Carrier NOS has a maximum range of 150km
Fighters will immediately attack your drones when they spawn from the carrier if they are closest
Fighters are only able to hit Large and Medium drones
Small Drones are invulnerable to the Fighters, as long as they are moving/attacking; so they are a great way to keep the Fighters aggro off yourself
Mission is flagged complete when the Carrier and all ships are destroyed

AWolfByTheEars5am.tips:
Mission occurs in normal space, so you can always warp to distances and to bookmarks farther away from the NPCs.
Ships on the left may be aggro’ed separately if you warp-in far enough away from the group on the right
Carrier NOS has a maximum range of 150km
Fighters will immediately attack your drones when they spawn from the carrier if they are closest
Fighters are only able to hit Large and Medium drones
Small Drones are invulnerable to the Fighters, as long as they are moving/attacking; so they are a great way to keep the Fighters aggro off yourself
Mission is flagged complete when the Carrier and all ships are destroyed

pockets.heading: Group 2, 70km
lines: Warp out as you warp in

pockets.heading: Group 4, 15-20km
lines: A cargo container will be dropped when Group 4 is destroyed, which contains the goods the mission requires.
In his wreck you will find his DNA.
A Caldari Shuttle will be granted when accepting the mission. Use the shuttle to accomplish the mission.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Anakism will spawn at 35-40km. He cannot be attacked and will not be aggroed until you pick up the hostages in The Seven Holding Cells at around 20km.
Once hostages are picked up, run to the acceleration gate.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Stolen CONCORD ship (a container) will spawn near you. Transfer the hostages in the cargo and your journal will update.
When warp in, Locced (Destroyer) will be in your 20km. If you attack him, 2 extra Pithi Invaders will spawn at ~25km.
Locced's Bribe only contains 1 unit of "Metal Scraps." Kill him.
Some Veldspar can be found in this dead space (50+ of small asteroids).

pockets.heading: Group 1 to 4
lines: You have to shoot at one foe to get aggro of the group it is in.
Every group consists of 3x frigates (Mammon Apis/Belphegor Apis/Infester Alvi)

pockets.heading: Group 5
lines: This group appeared when i have killed 2 groups.
Mission objective is completed on killing group 5.
Space type: Normal space (mwd does work)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Mission completes after destroying the first lone Rogue Drone.

AlluringEmanations2.title: Alluring Emanations, Level 2

pockets.heading: warp-in
lines: Upon warp-in there is one rogue drone at approximately 50km.  Destroying this drone completes the mission and spawns 42 additional drones (i.e a rogue drone ambush).

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the one drone and warp back to your agent.

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: Drones drop no loot but can be salvaged.
I took no damage in this mission by keeping out of range and picking off all of the drones.
Getting within the drones' firing range could make this a devastating mission.
Images of the targeted drones seemed to indicate all damage types could be incurred.

AlluringEmanations2.tips:
Drones drop no loot but can be salvaged.
I took no damage in this mission by keeping out of range and picking off all of the drones.
Getting within the drones' firing range could make this a devastating mission.
Images of the targeted drones seemed to indicate all damage types could be incurred.

CategoryMissions

CategoryLevel2

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: One rogue drone (frigate) 50km away.  Does not aggro.  After killing the lone rogue drone, 43 more rogue drones spawn in 5 groups 60-120km away.
Mission completed after killing first rogue drone.

AlluringEmanations5.title: Alluring Emanations, Level 5

info.Recommended ship classes: Any ship with at least some combat capabilities, even a rookie ship.

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: 1 x Frigate – Rogue Drone (Tarantula Apis) Trigger,
Destroy it and Mission Complete. Really.  That’s it.  It’s done, just go…

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: Upon destroying the lone drone there spawns 43 drones between 70-130km away
You really don’t need to destroy these.  Seriously.  The mission is complete. Just take the Loyalty Points and run…

But for those who insist on sticking around because they must kill everything; at least make it easy on yourself and bring along a Smartbomb.  It takes 2 minutes for all the drones to reach you (plenty of time for a refill…)
One smartbomb blast will finish the room and you will reign as a giant among your peers.

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Yes, this is the exact same mission as the one assigned in levels 1-3
Maximum damage dealing of all drones together is 132hp/s (EM 52%, Therm 48%)
As with most Level 5s, bring a fleet to stave off low-sec pirates

AlluringEmanations5.tips:
Yes, this is the exact same mission as the one assigned in levels 1-3
Maximum damage dealing of all drones together is 132hp/s (EM 52%, Therm 48%)
As with most Level 5s, bring a fleet to stave off low-sec pirates

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: The mission objective is the lookout post.

pockets.heading: Standing Loss
lines: -1.3563 % derived (don't shoot into Tower Sentry Amarr II)
Amarr Empire was displeased by actions on you performed against Amarr Empire's friends, or for Amarr Empire's enemies.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Tower Sentry Amarr I Sentry Gun

AmbushedAlly2ga.title: Ambushed Ally, Level 2, Storyline

pockets.heading: Warp-in
lines: At warp-in you are faced with Sisters of EVE station, 4 x laser sentries and a Gallentean
battlecruiser. Sentries do not open fire, nor does the objective until fired upon.
Ship drops tags only (Federation Navy fleet Captain and Major tags, one each).

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Stayed 20km away from the The Federation Praktor and it never fired one shot.

AmbushedAlly2ga.tips:
Stayed 20km away from the The Federation Praktor and it never fired one shot.

CategoryMissions

CategoryLevel2

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: One of the Transports will drop a can along with it's wreck. This will contain the narcotics (50.0 m3) you are required to return to your agent.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Batteries do not have to be destroyed to complete mission.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Ships are 40-45 km from warp-in. Aggro is immediate from all ships.
6x Ammatar Navy frigates (Detective, Officer, Delta II Support Frigate)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: 2x Battlecruiser (Corpior Phantom aka Blood Raider Escort)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Note: Bookmarking and warp to distance of bookmark allowed.  If warp out after starting mission, will auto-aggro when warp to bookmark.

pockets.heading: Wave 1 (40-50km)
lines: Killing last BS from wave 1 triggers wave 3
Killing Federation Praktor Navis Praetoria incurs a -0.02% standing loss.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: You should be able to kill all of the webbing and scrambling Elite Federation Manicas before they reach webbing range.
You might need to focus on the Federation Mataras first because they will dampen you.
This mission was easily done in an active tanked Tengu.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill all Destroyers upon warp-in (spawns wave 1).
Kill all BS until wave 3 spawns.
6x Federation Navy Fleet Captain Insignia I
1x Federation Navy Fleet Colonel Insignia I
10 Federation Navy Fleet Colonel Insignia II
23 Federation Navy Fleet Major Insignia I
4x Federation Navy Fleet Midshipman Insignia I
8x Federation Navy Fleet Sergeant Insignia I
8x Federation Navy Fleet Sergeant Insignia II
3x Federation Navy Fleet Sergeant Insignia III
Loot and salvage seems worth the 5 minutes to me.

pockets.heading: Faction Standings
lines: Will incur a -0.02% standing loss with Gallente Federation for "Combat - Ship Kill".  This should be safe to run unless your standings with the Gallente are already just barely above -2.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Munitions Storage (can) contains 100 Small Projectile Ammo.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Mission loot is in the container, Brutor Tribe Roster. All is approx 30-40km from warp in.

pockets.heading: Video
lines: This video is one of 2 ways (guns vs drones) to do this mission.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: ignore Stasis Tower and Missile Batteries.

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: Barrack drops T1 ammo and cap boosters occasionally.

info.Damage dealt: Exp, Kin, (Exp, Therm in bonus pocket)
info.Web/scramble: Angel Viper, Angel Webifier, Spider Drone

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy all structures before destroying the first wave unlocks the gates without any further waves. This works for Pockets 1 to 4.
Bring an afterburner as some structures are 80+ km from warpin.
Mission is completed after the named BC and the two Spider Drones in Pocket 5 are destroyed.

pockets.heading: Wave 1
lines: 4x Cruisers (Gistum Breaker/Defeater/Liquidator/Marauder) Trigger for Wave 2 when killed is highest bounty

pockets.heading: Wave 2
lines: 1x Cruiser (Gistum Depredator/Predator) Trigger for Wave 3 when killed

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the Angel Cartel Structure and Small Refinery before killing the trigger and there will be no wave 2 and 3 spawned

pockets.heading: Group 2
lines: 3x Cruisers (Gistum Breaker/Defeater/Liquidator/Marauder) Trigger for wave 2 when killed is highest bounty

pockets.heading: Wave 2
lines: 2x Cruisers (Gistum Depredator/Marauder/Predator) Trigger for Wave 3 when killed is highest bounty

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the casino before killing the trigger and there will be no wave 3 spawned

pockets.heading: Wave 1
lines: 1x Battlecruiser (Gistatis Tribuni/Praefectus) Trigger for Wave 2 when killed

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Angel Bunker and Storage Silo may drop random ammo

pockets.heading: Pocket 4
lines: Cruiser doesn't aggro unless it or the Towers are attacked, but may aggro drones. Will follow the drones and attack them but will head back to initial position if drones are back in drone bay without attacking you even if very close.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Angel Harvester drops two random commodities

pockets.heading: Wave 1
lines: 2x Cruisers (Gistum Liquidator/Marauder/Phalanx) Trigger for Wave 2 when killed is Higher Bounty

pockets.heading: Group 2
lines: 1x Battlecruiser (Gistatis Primus/Tribuni) Trigger for Wave 3 when killed

pockets.heading: Wave 3
lines: 1x Battlecruiser (Gistatis Praefectus/Tribuni) Trigger for Wave 4 when killed

pockets.heading: Wave 4
lines: 1x Battlecruiser (Gistatis Primus/Legionnaire) Trigger for Wave 5 when killed

pockets.heading: Bonus Pocket (optional)
lines: Needs Angel Palladium tag to enter, not consumed.

You warp in roughly 75-90km from the rats, which all aggro immediately except for the sentry, presumably because it's out of range. Angel Vipers/Webifier close in pretty fast, other frigs are a little slower. There are no triggers or respawns reported.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Battlestation drops loot. Be prepared to shoot a long time. (The loot can be generic and unimpressive, and generally not worth it. At 200dps it will take about ten minutes. The explosion, on the other hand, is gigantic.)
Terzam's Stash drops random generic loot as well (possible Domination Faction Mod)

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Watch out for heavy webbing/scrambling in the bonus stage.
Saint uses Bane torpedoes [explo.] AND some shorter range [45 km?] weapon with thermal damage.
Nephilim does a fair amount of explosive damage using Bane torpedoes
Warlord does a fair amount of explosive damage using Bane torpedoes

AngelStrike3.title: Angel Strike, level 3

pockets.heading: Group 2, 60km
lines: Grab the prisoners from the cargo container needed for mission completion.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Three groups at initial warp in, no aggro.

pockets.heading: Attack group to right, no aggro from others
Attack Middle group
lines: Get 3 Drazin Keycard from his habitat, needed to activate gate.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Get prisoners from dropped cargo container.

pockets.heading: Loot from structures
lines: Metal scrapes and a few other trade goods from storage container.

pockets.heading: 2nd Spawn (45- 50km)
lines: Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 13km.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Killing the structures will remove the 2nd spawn.

pockets.heading: 1st Spawn (32- 42km)
lines: 2x Battleship (Gist Warlord/ War General/ Saint/ Nephilim)

pockets.heading: 2nd Spawn (55- 60km)
lines: Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 5km.

pockets.heading: Lone Ship (14km)
lines: Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 5km.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: It is not necessary to kill all the Sentries and Missile Batteries.

pockets.heading: 1st Spawn (41- 51km)
lines: 4x Battleship (Gist Commander/ War General/ General/ Warlord)

pockets.heading: 3rd Spawn (64- 66km)
lines: Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 2km.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Blow up the Storage Silo and the Radio Telescope and the spawns won't appear.

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: Storage Silo will drop a random Hardwiring Implant (3%) and T1 modules.

pockets.heading: 3rd Spawn (72- 74km)
lines: Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 5km.

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: The acceleration gate leads to the Bonus Pocket.
Fleet members may use the acceleration gate without the tag if they do it within 10 seconds after activation.
Mission is flagged completed after you have killed Tiogo Kargaz.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Angel Cruise Missile Batteries spam Cataclysm Cruise Missiles every 25 secs. Each missile deals 900 Thermal damage at 0% resist.
Angel Light Missile Battery fire Piranha Light Missiles.
Tower Sentry Angel III fires every 2- 3 sec, each hit deals 80- 250 Explosive damage at 0% resist.

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: Angel Battle Station & Angel Bunker drop T1 modules and ammo. The Angel Battle Station has over 400k hp and has not been observed to drop anything of significant value so it may not be worth destroying.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Pocket 1: Kill all the structures then kill the initial ships and spawn.
Pocket 3: Kill the Battleship, ignore everything else.
Pocket 4: Kill the Silo (bookmark the can) and the Radio Telescope, then kill all ships.
Pocket 5: Kill the Battleships, starting with the highest bounty of each group to trigger spawns, kill Tiogo Kargaz you're done.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: Identifying the spawn trigger may be tricky, it is usually the highest bounty Battleship yet not always or could be one that flies differently.
Fit for DPS, tanking doesn't require much, with the exception of bonus room.

pockets.heading: Bonus Pocket
lines: Fit with either very high DPS to take out most of the aggro, or with a massive tank to not worry about that.
Move away from the Angel Bunker to buy you a bit of time to kill the sentries as the enemy ships try to close in.
Eliminating all the Angel Cruise Missile Batteries and Tower Sentry Angel III first will negate a significant portion of the incoming damage.
Do not kill the Gist Seraphim trigger, wait until you have cleared the pocket from all other hostile targets.
The Single Spawn isn't triggered if you destroy the Angel Bunker before Killing the Gist Seraphim.
Depending on the spawns, damage is Explosive (49- 55%)/ Kinetic (22- 28%)/ EM (7- 14%)/ Thermal (9- 15%).
The Sentry Towers deal equal EM/ Thermal. Angel Cruise Batteries, Arch Gistii Ruffian, and Gistatis Tribunis deal lots of Thermal.
Angel Viper, Gistatis Legatus, Gist Malakim, and Gist Throne deal EM. Removing these may help your tank, depending on how you decide to set up.

pockets.heading: Loot and Bounty
lines: Bounty: ~21.6 mil, with bonus room: ~30.9 mil.

pockets.heading: Bunch of collidable structure
lines: Some ammo loot from pressure silo.
Some ammo loot from cargo rigs.
Some trade goods from habitation module.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Warp in first gate, no aggro, turns out it the blood raiders who are guilty.
As the agent directive was only to talk, did not engage and went through warp gate.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: 4 groups at warp in, range 20-35km, no instant aggro.
Start with middle group (transports), no aggro from other groups. Drops cargo container, get the 5 prisoners.
That's enough to complete the mission, or you can hang around and take out the rest.
9 cruisers (Corpior Seer, Corpior Bishop, Corpior Shade, Corpum Revenant, Corpum Arch Templar)

pockets.heading: Bunch of large collidable objects, no loot.
Pocket 1
lines: Initial aggro by 10 km (2 corpum sage)
10 frigates (didn’t see any web or scramblers)
Kill everything till get cargo drop with 5 prisoners.
This is the most challenging level, first time you will come up against battleships in this storyline.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: First jump, NPC's are spread out (6km, then 95-125km).
Initial aggro by 2 frigates and 2 heavy missile batteries.
After first group, need to kill 5 cruisers at long range, you don't have to shoot the 5 towers (blood raider) to jump.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Initial aggro at warp in by middle group, lots of collidable structures.
Don't have exact counts, each group 2-4 cruisers and 2-4 frigs.
The usual mix of corpii and corpum

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: 3 groups @60 and @90km, this time battleships have come to the party.
No aggro on warp in. Attack each group, no aggro from others.

pockets.heading: Group 3
lines: Destroy the Dark Blood Chapel and pick up 3 implants.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: The raiders are frig-sized but drop cruiser loot
Either in the Maru Harbingers or Raid Leaders wreck may contain an +3 Implant.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Warp in first gate, no aggro, turns out it the Sanshas who are guilty.
As the agent directive was only to talk, did not engage and went through warp gate.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: No obvious group of transports, 4 groups total, closest about 30km away (left one):

pockets.heading: Back:
lines: No aggro at warp-in, groups aggro at the usual 20-25km range when approached; drone aggro unknown, but not likely.

No stage aggro from attacking individual groups, went right/middle/back. back group finally dropped the mission loot, didn't shoot the left group - suspected shortcut is going for the back group, not the middle group as mentioned in the current version on the site.

pockets.heading: 4th Group: 60km
lines: This is the most challenging level, first time you will come up against battleships in this storyline.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 2 battlecruisers, below 5km, not sure whether they aggro as i shot them first ;p

pockets.heading: Group 3 and 4
lines: The two battleship groups to the left and right, approx 70km out. The two battleship groups contain 5 Tyrants each (1.2M bounty), and some BC, the left group has some elite frigates as well. Easy to tank 5 Tyrants in their optimal range with 2 active LARs.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: 2 overseer structures: industrial derelict and (target)central comms tower:
The comms tower dropped the expected +3 implant.

AngelStrike3gu.title: Angel Strike, Level 3

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Does not trigger anything. Might drop an implant. Heavy EM damage (Paradise Cruise Missile).

pockets.heading: Group 5
lines: You will get aggro from Groups 1 and 2 if u come within 20km otherwise the other groups dont aggro up to 10km (as far as i tested, i targeted and engaged at 10km)
Attacking one group will not aggro any others.

pockets.heading: 3rd group 30km mission finish when this group is killed
Group 5
lines: The Groups will not aggro unless provoked.

pockets.heading: Group 1 (Aggro) 10km
lines: Remaining groups will not aggro until attacked, unless you attack the control tower -- then they ALL aggro immediately

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: After you warp out against group 3 or 4 in room three, the remaining ships will return to their start position and wait. Re-entering the room will not cause them to aggro again unless attacked.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: (Tag the can, finish the mission, and then warp back to the can to pick up an implant.)
- Minor: Ship names for the lists.

AngelStrike3gu.loot:
Part 6 - The Flu Outbreak




Part 7 - The Secret Meeting








Part 9 - Retrieve the Prisoners

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Destroy the Amarr attackers, then watch for further instructions in Local.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: Destruction of last ship triggers Group 2.

pockets.heading: Group 2
lines: Destruction of last ship triggers Group 3.

pockets.heading: Group 3
lines: Destruction of last ship triggers Group 4.

pockets.heading: Group 4
lines: After destroying Cruisers you will be advised to return to Beacon and watch the destruction of the Revelation Dreadnought.
Dreadnought does nothing throughout mission, it can be targetted but not damaged.

pockets.heading: Part 1 of 3
lines: Recommended generic setup: Passive tank and medium weapons.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Mission completion upon destruction of Broadcasting Array, which incur a 2.4% standing loss.

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: Imperial Navy Major I, Imperial Navy Sergeant II (2), Imperial Navy Sergeant III (3), Imperial Navy Colonel I (17) tags.

pockets.heading:
2x Battlecruiser (Gistatis Praefectus) Trigger
2x Battleship (Gist War General)
1x Battleship (Imperial Templar Dominator, aka the Transmission Ship)
lines: Mission completion upon destruction of "The Transmission Ship", which incur a 0.02% standing loss, this loss also applies to the Imperial Battleship.
Do not forget to Loot the Data Chip.

pockets.heading:
Faction: Angel Cartel
Mission type: Encounter
Space type: Deadspace
Damage dealt: Explosive/ Kinetic/ Thermal
Recommended damage dealing: Explosive
Recommended ships classes: Battleship
Recommended generic setup: Enough cargo space somehow to carry 1,800m3 of mission loot.

2x Destroyer (Gistior Shatterer)
3x Battlecruiser (Gistatis Legatus)
lines: Bookmark site and return in a ship with enough cargo space to pickup mission loot of 300 Freed Slaves (1,800m3).

pockets.heading: Warp-in
lines: There are 5 Pods when you warp in, one of them is not damaged (highest pod vertically, info description: "A life pod from a long since destroyed ship").
Approaching this pod will trigger a message and spawn a container.
Loot the passenger Oura Madusaari, needed to unlock the acceleration gate.

pockets.heading: 2nd Pocket
lines: You will encounter periodic damage from the anomaly from about 5km in, 5 hits of ~200 to 400 damage each.
Destroy the Pressure Silo Debris structures, the one closest to the Anomaly will drop 2 containers.
Loot the objective item, Dr. Fajah Ateshi.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Bring Oura Madusaari to skip the life pods and go straight through the gate.
Destroy the Silo closest to the Anomally and ignore the rest. Loot the container.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Fitting a Micro Warp Drive or Afterburner is recommended.
Approaching the other four damaged Pods will also trigger a message and the Pod contains a Stranded Pilot (not needed to complete the mission).
Using Combat Drones to kill the Debris Silo may kill them. Sentry Drones will take damage but survive.

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: The Debris Silos drop T1 ammo, the explosion causes 800 omni damage.

pockets.heading: Flavour Text
lines:
I'm naked and I'm walking the blue-painted halls at military academy, and it's okay because everyone gets hazed like this and I'm in better shape than all of them so I'm not ashamed, except this means they can see the scars twining from my back and down to my knees like snakes, and what starts as laughter turns into confused whispering and sounds of pity as they realize how recently I was a slave, and I want to kill them slowly just like I did the man who gave me the scars, but I just walk on, seeing only red.

He promised we would go to the beach on my birthday, so we went, even though it was raining, even though we didn't know where mom was again. I was collecting shells, and I found one that was perfect and round and smooth but then I looked back to the shore and saw him just standing there, the first time I'd ever seen him cry, and I wanted to say something but couldn't, just stood there, frozen, the shell crunching in my fist, and I looked down and my hand was bleeding but I didn't feel it at all.

They called me to identify the body, and I told them she divorced me last year but they didn't care because she had no friends, no family on the planet at all. I went in and they pulled back the sheet and she was there beautiful like she was asleep, and my full name was carved delicately into her left arm like calligraphy, the blood dried like rust on parchment. Every time I closed my eyes for a full year after I saw that. I still miss her.

"You have failed your family," he tells me with gentleness I know he's incapable of feeling. "You have dishonored us. You know what to do." And I know that the honorable thing is to fall on my sword like a good girl, so I take it out and push it through his chest and show him exactly what I think of his precious honor. I will never have to apologize again.
Recommended ship classes: Battleship, Command Ship, Battlecruiser, HAC

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Place the "Neurowave Pattern Scanner" you received from your agent in the Anomaly to complete the mission.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: When approaching the Anomaly (30km) it will spawn an Amarr Cruise missile battery.
There is no need to destroy it, as when you approach the anomaly, a message appears and it ceases firing.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Fitting a Micro Warp Drive or Afterburner is recommended.
Damage dealt: Explosve/ Kinetic, some EM/ Thermal
Recommended ship classes: Battleship, Command Ship, Battlecruiser, HAC

pockets.heading: 1st Pocket
lines: Last ship killed in each group triggers a spawn.
Attacking any group will aggro the entire pocket, spawns remain passive unless attacked.

pockets.heading: 3rd Spawn
lines: The acceleration gate to the next pocket will become functional once the two Batttlecruisers from Group 2 are destroyed.

pockets.heading: Single Spawn
lines: 4x Battleship (Swarm Preserver/ Domination/ Spearhead Alvus/ Supreme Alvus Preserver/ Alvus Ruler)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the two BCs (Crippler/ Striker Alvatis) in group 2 to "spawn" the acceleration gate. The gate is not locked, but warp scrambling frigates will prevent you from using it.
Use an afterburner to make your way to the rogue drone ship and drop Fajah Ateshi into the can which completes the mission, no drones have to be killed.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: The Anomaly is 30- 50 km away from the warp-in. Dropping Fajah Ateshi inside the "Rogue Drone" ship next to it completes the mission and leads to the destruction of the (Orca Class) "Anomaly" a few seconds later.
Alternatively you may put Fajah Ateshi inside the "Anomaly", it will disapear (jump out probably) and mission will be completed with trying to save the crew.
Attacking and killing the scrambling frigates did not cause the additional spawn. Attacking one of the Sunder Alvi did however.
If you can one shot the frigates the spawn will not appear.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Aggro on warp-in. Rats 20-30km from warp-in point.
8x Frigates (Rogue Miners aka Rogue Pirate Grunts)
Mission obejective - Religious Artifact will appear in container in one of the Rogue Pirate Grunts.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: - Both Exp (light) and EM (heavy) are dealt, so it might be difficult in a cruiser. Tank properly.

pockets.heading: 2nd Spawn
lines: 3x Battleship (Republic Sigur/ Tribal Pytara/ Tribal Jarkl)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Pocket 1: Kill order: 4x Battlecruisers, 2x Elite Frigates, 3x Elite Cruisers, 2x Elite Frigates, (
You have to one-shot each of the elite frigates from group 3.
Then the gate is unlocked and you can jump to pocket 2. Other groups in pocket 1 spawn after few minutes, if they spawn the gate is locked again).
Pocket 2: Approach Dysfunctional Solar Harvester. After killing first 3 spawns mission is completed.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Auto aggro from 1st group. 2nd group and spawn will aggro drones.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: There's fleet aggro in this pocket. First pilot to warp in will get the aggro from the 1st Group, but no aggro from the 2nd Group.
Remaining fleet members who warp in later will receive aggro from 2nd Group when they start to open fire on the 1st Group.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Attacking the 2nd Group will aggro the 3rd Group. Reinforcement spawn will aggro drones.

pockets.heading: 2nd Group (65- 70km, Starbase Control Tower)
lines: 2x Elite Cruiser (Dire Pithum Annihilator/ Killer/ Murderer/ Nullifier)

pockets.heading: 1st Reinforcement Spawn (40km)
lines: Auto aggro. Last ship triggers spawn.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: 1st Pocket: warp through the gate without killing anything.
2nd Pocket: eliminate all ships in Group 3. Warp out.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Destroying the Starbase Control Tower will prevent reinforcement group from appearing. It will however, aggro Group 2 in the process.
Recommended order of elimination: 1st, 3rd and finally 2nd group (also including reinforcement spawn when triggered).
Mission is flagged completed once you have eliminated all ships from the 3rd Group.

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: One Habitation Module drops 10 each of 2 low value trade goods.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Angel Bunker sometimes drops loot. (Most of the time you wont get anything)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Group 1 is not needed for completion.

pockets.heading: Rewards and Bonus
lines: Bonus: 121,000 ISK within 2 hours and 8 minutes.

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: T1 drones work fine in this mission. They didn't shoot at any of mine.

info.Video: Dominix, Vargur, Golem, Apocalypse Imperial Issue (Sniper)

pockets.heading: 1st Pocket
lines: Attacking the 1st group might aggro the 2nd group. Attacking the 3rd Group will aggro the 2nd group. The 4th group is passive.
Best to tag the triggers on warp-in.

pockets.heading: 1st Group (Center Left)
lines: 4x Elite Cruiser (Corelum Guardian Chief Patroler/ Watchman)

pockets.heading: Single Spawn (50km)
lines: 3- 4x Battleship (Core Port Admiral/ Rear Admiral/ Vice Admiral

pockets.heading: Single Spawn (64- 67km, Research Test Area)
lines: 4x Elite Frigate (Coreli Guardian Defender/ Guard/ Safeguard)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: 1st and 2nd Pocket: the gates are unlocked, blitz right through. Gates in 1st and 2nd pocket will be within 2.5 km when you land, so no need to travel far. However, frigates near the gate might point you and you will need to clear them  before you can take the gate.

pockets.heading: Mining
lines: 1st Pocket: 30x Plagioclase (~600K units), 16x Pyroxeres (~575K units) 45x Veldspar (~1.3 mil units) asteroids (47- 60km).

AthranExigency1.title: Athran Exigency, Level 1

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 2x or 4x Frigates (Athran Agent) spawn when you are within 7 to 10 km from the station.

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: Approach the mission objective (Abandoned Mining Station). Make it visible in the overview by enabling 'Types - Celestial - Large Collidable Object'.
The Station is 40km away from warp-in.  The mission is flagged as complete when within 5km of the station.)
Recommended damage dealing: therm, EM or exp
Look for signs of Athran Brotherhood activity; if attacked, destroy all hostiles.

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: A Battleship, the Republic Tribal Ymir, is exploding when you arrive in this pocket -leaving behind no wreckage. [Eat your heart out noob. You know that I did. ;-)]
Group 1 appears after the explosion of the above mentioned battleship.
Recommended damage dealing: therm, EM or exp
Destroy the Athran Ammunitions Depot and any enemy ships.

pockets.heading: Group 2
lines: 4x Frigates (3x Athran Agent; 1x Athran Operative, or 4x Athran Agent)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the "Amarr Starbase Control Tower", leaving the ships alone.

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: The mission objective is the "Amarr Starbase Control Tower".  Reveal it within the overview with "Entity - Large Collidable Structure".
As reported by CileniaBitweaver, groups 1 and 2 are on either side of the mission objective: 'Athran ammunitions depot'.
Aggro from both groups occurs when the control tower is attacked.
Damage dealt: em(7%), exp(17%), kin(49%), therm(27%)
Go to our Asteroid Colony Field Office and speak to our Assistant Chief Security Officer. If you get in any trouble, deal with it.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 4x Frigates named "Repair Crew" (2x State Katana; 2x Imperial Sixtus)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Go directly to the acceleration gate.  Destruction of the "Repair Crew" is not necessary.

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: Five 'Minmatar kamikaze pilot' frigs destroy themselves upon warp-in.
Group 1 wrecks drop Caldari & Amarr Navy insignia.
Group 2 spawns after the explosion of the above mentioned battleship.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: Recommended damage dealing: therm, EM or exp

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: Only 5 'Athran Agent' frigs were reported by CileniaBitweaver for 5 of 5, Group 1.
This 5 of 5 is a good mission to mine with large amounts of veldspare & scordite very near warp-in point.  60k per roid is estimated.
Got 990,202 Scordite & 895,122 Veldspar. [I] only had to make two moves to get the whole belt.  The roids are 20k to 90k in size. from StevenCarter
[S]everal structures 'Athran proximity mine' are scattered throughout the asteroids.  Be careful as they do explode.  -CileniaBitweaver

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Approach the Quarantine Station Ruins, acquire a piece of Minmatar DNA and produce the Modified Augumene Antidote for your agent.
You must have the skill Industry at least at level 1 to accomplish the mission objective of part 5.

pockets.heading: Second Pocket
lines: Warp in right into group 1, group 2-4 aggro individually on attack.

info.Video: Ishtar (Blitz), Raven Navy Issue, Dominix, Paladin, Maelstrom (Arty)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Initial group appears and auto aggro after a delay.
Each ship killed from the initial group triggers one of the spawns.
All spawns auto aggro and may aggro Drones and Fleet Members, keep an eye on your drones.
You may [Fleet] warp at a preferred range and snipe.
The order, ship amount and names of the spawns will vary.

pockets.heading: Frigate Reinforcement Spawn (23- 27km)
lines: 2- 3x Elite Frigate (Strain Infester/ Strain Splinter Alvi)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: No blitz, you must kill all drones to complete the mission.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: To manage aggro, do not kill the trigger ships all at once. Eliminate the incoming reinforcement spawn first, before you trigger the next spawn.
You can snipe or out run the Supreme Alvus Battleships. Their max attack distance is around 35 km, and they move very slowly.

lines: 3 groups. 3x Frigate Group Aggros within a minute.

Attacking the habitat will aggro the groups.

lines: Warp in right into group 1, group 2-3 aggro individually on attack.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Mission objective: Destroy Habitat at about 75km
This penalty was incurred for destroying Angel Cartel's Habitation Module in ...

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: 4 groups.  All groups aggro. Groups appear after the last one is destryed at 30-40 km

pockets.heading: Group 2:
lines: 1x Cruiser (Corpum Arch Templar) (appears at 50 km after the destroyers get close to you)

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Just destroy the Habitat and warp back to your agent.

pockets.heading: The neutral structures do not contain any cargo.
Single Pocket
lines: Four Groups, group 1 aggros immediately.  Remaining groups will not aggro until you attack them, get within approx 38 km, or attack the Habitat.  Kill the other groups in order from left to right.
2x  Frigates -  2km from warp in; instant agro

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: None of the structures drops anything.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Warp-in 10K from group 1. Groups 1 and 2 aggro upon warp in. Groups 3 and 4 wait their turn to be destroyed.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Dash in and destroy the habitat, then warp out.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Radio Telescope, Shipyard, Subspace Frequency Generator - Nothing
Storage Facility, Factory Installation, Landing Pad, Asteroid Colony - Also Nothing

pockets.heading: Video
lines: This video shows what you will be dealing with.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: 3 groups with no aggro on warp-in. All groups aggro when the Habitat is hit.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Destroy the habitat, not many hitpoints. (good idea if you dont want to take such a security hit)

pockets.heading: Spawn
lines: Deal with the drones, and mine 15000 units (9000m3) of Mercium ore (fake Omber).

BigSting5am.title: The Big Sting, Level 5

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Only the Special Forces Squadron that appears at 8 minutes after warp-in needs to be destroyed to complete this mission.  However, if you approach to under 10km from the Ghost Ship, it will trigger numerous additional spawns that are optional to destroy.  Realize that sometimes this accidentally occurs at warp-in. The Warp-In Beacon is 12km from the Ghost Ship, and your exact warp-in spot can be + or – 2.5km from this beacon.  If your warp-in does not land you within the 10km proximity, and if you don’t want to trigger these spawns, then be sure to head away from the Ghost Ship after warp-in.

pockets.heading: Objective Group
lines: spawns at 35 – 45km away at 8 minutes after warp-in:
4 x Frigates (Divine Imperial Imran/Sixtus) orbits at 4km,
6 x Cruisers (Divine Imperial Justicar/Champion/Ambrose*) orbits at 7-32km,
6 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Martyr), orbits at 49km
2 x Amarr Energy Neutralizer Sentry III

pockets.heading: Optional Spawns
lines: - Proximity Triggered: When you approach to under 10km from the Ghost Ship, there spawns:
6 x Frigates (Divine Imperial Imran/Paladin/Valok) by just shooting a frigate
3 x Cruisers (Divine Imperial Champion/Justicar) by just shooting a cruiser

pockets.heading: Spawn 1a

4 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Martyr/Ultara) orbits at 49km

4 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Martyr/Ultara) orbits at 49km

BigSting5ca.title: The Big Sting, Level 5

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Only the Special Forces Squadron that appears at 8 minutes after warp-in needs to be destroyed to complete this mission.  However, if you approach to under 10km from the Ghost Ship, it will trigger numerous additional spawns that are optional to destroy.  Realize that sometimes this accidentally occurs at warp-in. The Warp-In Beacon is 12km from the Ghost Ship, and your exact warp-in spot can be + or – 2.5km from this beacon.  If your warp-in does not land you within the 10km proximity, and if you don’t want to trigger these spawns, then be sure to head away from the Ghost Ship after warp-in.

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: - Mission occurs in normal space, so you can always warp to distances and to bookmarks farther away from the NPCs.
- Warping to within 100km leaves plenty of distance that spreads out the aggro
- Carriers NOS has a range of 150km
- Fighters will immediately attack your drones when they spawn from the Carrier, but this can be used to your advantage
- Small Drones are invulnerable to the Fighters, as long as they are moving/attacking; and they are a great way to draw-off the Fighter's aggro.
- Have your small drones attacking the carrier when the fighters spawn.
- Mission is flagged complete after both Carriers are destroyed

Blockade1dd.title: The Blockade, level 1

info.Recommended damage dealing: kin/therm/em/exp, NPCs have equal resists for all damage types

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Upon warpin there is a Stasis Tower and 12-15 enemies in 3 or 4 smaller groups of mixed size and types. When you approach the tower will web you and all soldiers will aggress:

pockets.heading: Wave 2, 3 and 4
lines: Later waves of soldiers similar in composition to the previous waves will warpin at a  fair distance of 30kms or more. Each wave is triggered by the last ship in the preceding wave.There will be many DED soldiers - about 50-60 in the mission  - arriving in four waves of 12-15 ships.

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: 1st class DED soldiers represent the biggest threat with the shortest range (7 500m) weapons. 2nd and 3rd class soldiers are less of a threat and fire from a longer range (10 000m).  All soldiers are clustered in groups (about 3 or 4 groups of varying size) per wave. Attack groups separately to try and avoid allowing them to gang up on you.

Until the tower is destroyed warping out is your only defence if you are swamped by the enemy. Drawing the soldiers away from the tower is the first step, then blowing up the tower is the next step. Once the tower is destroyed kill further waves of reinforcements.
Take them out group by group, and don't get nervous when new enemy warpins are triggered. New enemy warpins will be at distance, so try and keep the groups separated. Have a survivable setup.

This is a rich mission with muliple objectives.  Firstly destroy the tower, and then kill the waves of concord soldiers - so be prepared. The loot table is biased towards energy/capacitor and electronic warfare. All soldiers drop tags.

Blockade1dd.tips:
1st class DED soldiers represent the biggest threat with the shortest range (7 500m) weapons. 2nd and 3rd class soldiers are less of a threat and fire from a longer range (10 000m). Until the tower is destroyed warping out is your only defence if you are swamped by the enemy. Drawing the soldiers away from the tower is the first step, then blowing up the tower is the next step. Once the tower is destroyed kill further waves of reinforcements.
Take them out group by group, and don't get nervous when new enemy warpins are triggered. New enemy warpins will be at distance, so try and keep the groups separated. Have a survivable setup.
This is a rich mission with muliple objectives.  Firstly destroy the tower, and then kill the waves of concord soldiers - so be prepared. The loot table is biased towards energy/capacitor and electronic warfare. All soldiers drop tags.

lines: Following are examples of the 3 next spawns:

lines: 1x Cruiser (Gistum Depredator) - trigger for next wave

lines: 1x Cruiser (Gistum Depredator) - trigger for next wave
4x Elite Frigates (Arch Gistii Ruffian) - may web/scram

pockets.heading: Example 3: (120km from BM)

4x Elite Frigates (Arch Gistii Ambushers) - may web/warp scramble

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Take out the trigger for each wave.  Try to identify the three groups in wave 2 so you know which cruiser is the trigger, or just take out all cruisers.

pockets.heading: Mineable Asteroid info
lines: An entire belt of Pyroxeres, Plagioclase and Veldspar (about 15x Plagioclase, 25x Pyroxeres and 40x Veldspar, asteroids up to 50k)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: 5 waves of Sansha's Nation ships.  Each wave has 1 trigger ship.  It is usually (one of) the ships with the highest bounty.  Beware, the asteroids in this mission are rigged with strong smartbombs, so mine them at your own risk.  Although the ships themselves may differ from what you see, the total dps should never change (much) and the numbers below should give you a good idea of what to expect.
These ships are all short range, if you begin the engagement at 50km and kite them, you'll likely not need your hardeners at all.

pockets.heading: FINAL WAVE
lines: Mission Total DPS: EM 464, Therm 391 = 855 dps
Don't mine roids or you'll be attacked by "Beacon", that deals about 2000 damages in 10 seconds.

pockets.heading: Note: Spawns and triggers may vary, this is just an example
Blitz
lines: Kill all the trigger ships and then take out the Chief Infantry. Note that you'll probably need to take out at least some of the other ships if you want your tank to last for more than a few seconds.

pockets.heading: Mineable Asteroids
lines: Considerable amount of ores: Pyroxeres, Plagioclase, Veldspar (All trigger a smartbomb when mined)
If you decide to mine, you get the warning
"Someone triggered a hidden trap placed on one of the asteroids here. The trap causes a powerful Smartbomb to go off, damaging many ships in the vicinity"
. This happens every time a laser cycle finishes and ore is taken from any asteroid. The damage does
The average hit caused from the Smartbomb varies, 280 - 450 at a distance of 17km from the beacon. The frequency is random. The Smartbomb is centered on the Beacon which cannot be destroyed.
See comments section how this can actually be useful.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Starbase Ship-Maintenance Array drops a lot of trade goods.

Blockade3an.title: The Blockade, Level 3

info.Damage dealt: Exp, Kin (Exp-severe missile spamming up to ~45k range from cruisers/BCs)

pockets.heading: Initial Spawn (Auto Aggro)

pockets.heading: Note:
lines: Waves and triggers may vary, this is just an example

pockets.heading: Third Wave:
lines: Two groups, 100 and 140km from warp in.

lines: -3.0% was incurred for destroying Guristas Pirates's Caldari Stasis Tower

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Do not attempt unless you have very good tank AND dps. Kill every Trigger, then the last 5 battlecruisers on the fourth wave to complete misssion.

pockets.heading: Spawn 1:
lines: 1x Destroyer (Corpior Devoter) -- Trigger for next wave

pockets.heading: Spawn 5:
lines: 20km)  Last spawn will spawn on top of you at warp-in

pockets.heading: Note
lines: Once the first spawn is cleared the other spawns are at least 100km out from warp-in point.  Fit sniper setup, they must get closer than 50km to start firing upon you.  Long distance abaddon will not be touched by reinfrocement spawns, except the last spawn which will be close but doesn't hurt.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill only the trigger ships (highest bounty BC except for Spawn 1).

info.Recommended ship classes: Battleship, Command Ship, Strategic Cruiser, HAC

pockets.heading: 1st Spawn (45- 85km)
lines: 5x Heavy Assault Cruiser (Arch Gistum Phalanx/ Smasher)

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: A good Explosive resist tank and MJD  is recommended.

As with all Blockades the mission starts with one tight group including a stasis tower, followed by 4 spawns, triggered by certain ships. The waves are picked randomly out of a pool of several types of waves. The trigger ship is hard to document as it varies with the type of wave you get. The waves spawn in groups so you should observe the spawns you get and try to spot a unique battleship in one of the groups. This is most likely the trigger.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: 1) Maintained optimal range and used Titanium Sabot for targets between 50- 100km and then EMP for targets under 50km. Since everything aggro as soon as it spawns use that to your advantage especially when in a gunboat. Pick off the smaller vessels first and then take out the Battleships.

2) Sniper fit may warp to preferred distance and bookmark it. Kill the Stasis Tower first, then the spawns as they approach starting with the web/ scramble Frigates. Slow boat away from the Stargate if needed. If NPCs swarm, warp to one of the structures in the pocket. Again kill the spawns while kiting them, if needed warp to your bookmark. Repeat. This way the mission is doable with a minimum tank (300 dps angel specific tank is enough if you kill real fast).

pockets.heading: Bottom Group (75- 78km)

pockets.heading: 4th Spawn (50- 53km)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill all the trigger Battleships. You will need to snipe as the waves spawned will put out an incredible amount of DPS.
Kill the final Corpus Pope Battleship. Done.

lines: A Spawn's trigger is usually the highest bounty or single named Battleship, but not always.
Group spawn locations are in respect to the Minmatar Merchant Gate in the center.
It is recommended that you fit Heavy Capacitor Boosters with Cap Booster 800 if you are unfamiliar with this mission.
If the 1st Spawn is composed of Corpus Oracles the last one killed is the trigger.
If the 2nd Spawn is composed of Corpus Monsignor the 1st one killed is the trigger.
Mission is flagged completed after you have killed the final Corpus Pope battleship.

pockets.heading: Video
lines: This video shows one of many ways to do this mission.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: To blitz this mission would be difficult and pointless.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Killing the DED Army General triggers the next Spawn.
DED ships have even resists, so use the highest bonus damage type you have.
Mission completes when the last DED Army General is destroyed.
All Cruisers fire Kinetic Heavy Missiles.
DED Army Colonels fire EM Cruise Missiles.
DED Army Generals fire EM Torpedos.
Drones appear to be targeted by Cruisers only.

pockets.heading: Back (70- 80km)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill all the trigger Battleships. You will need to snipe, or have a perma-tank with dual reppers as the spawns deal an high amount of damage.
Kill the final Centus Tryrant Battleship. Done.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: A Spawn's trigger is usually the highest bounty or single named Battleship, but not always.
Group spawn locations are in respect to the Minmatar Merchant Gate in the center.
: the marked Cruisers may disrupt your weapons heavily, best to kill them first. Their range is ~88km.
It is recommended that you fit extra Tracking Computer/ Enhancer.
Mission is flagged completed after you have killed the final Centus Tyrant Battleship.

pockets.heading: Additional Information
lines: A very rare True Sansha Battleship may appear with the final spawn.

pockets.heading: Standing
lines: Killing all the ships in this mission incurs one -3.0% and several -0.025% standing hits with Sansha Nation.

pockets.heading: Initial Group (28- 31km)
lines: 4- 5x Battleship (Core Admiral/ Vice Admiral/ Rear Admiral/ Port Admiral)

pockets.heading: 1st Spawn (45- 85km)
lines: 9- 10x Cruiser (Corelium Guardian Chief/ Watchman/ Sentinel/ Infantry)
5x Battleship (Core Admiral/ Vice Admiral/ Port Admiral/Rear Admiral)

pockets.heading: 2nd Spawn (50- 90km)
lines: 3- 5x Battleship (Core Admiral/ Vice Admiral/ Rear Admiral/ Port Admiral)

pockets.heading: 3rd Spawn (70- 90km)
lines: 4- 5x Battleship (Core Admiral/ Rear Admiral/ Port Admiral)

pockets.heading: 4th Spawn (70- 90km)
lines: 5x Battleship (Core Rear Admiral/ High Admiral/ Admiral)

pockets.heading: 5th Spawn
lines: 2- 4x Frigate (Coreli Guardian Watchman/ Initiate/ Spy/ Agent)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: When the Core Lord Admiral is killed, the mission is complete. Shooting the triggers first to blitz the mission is possible, but not recommended due to very high incoming damage.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: For Missile Folks a good supply of F.O.F may work well while dampened.

pockets.heading: Additional Info
lines: Although rare, there could be a Shadow Serpentis Battleship along with the final spawn, with the usual chance for faction items drop and higher bounty.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Just kill every trigger in the spawns.

pockets.heading: Structures that drop loot
lines: The Spaceship Hangar Array (located about 108 km from your warp in position) always drops 4 types of random trade goods and 50 units of scrap metal.

BloodOfAngryMenThe4am.title: The Blood Of Angry Men, Level 4

info.Recommended damage dealing: EM/Thermal for ammar EXP/Kinetic for the minmatar bs

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Battleship did not auto-aggro on warp in

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 1x Rogue Minmatar (Target Painting)(heavy EM tank & heavy shield regeneration)
Following spawn right ontop of the warp in

pockets.heading: Additional spawns
lines: 4x Battleships (Imperial Ultara) - Triggered by killing Battleships of group 3 (needs confirmation)
4x Battleships (Imperial Ultara/Tanakh) - Triggered by killing the above spawn.

pockets.heading: BLITZ
lines: kill minmatar battleship get the corpse from the can and warp out (NOTE:EXP/KIN damage are its weakest ressists)

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: In addition to all ships, the Blood Farm structure must be destroyed to mark the mission complete.

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: The Blood Farm drops several random T1 mods.

info.Blitz: Kill only the second group.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill the Industrial Ship and loot the can.

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: - You may have to turn on
in your overview settings to see the Imperial Industrial Ship.

pockets.heading: Group 1 (Auto Aggro)
lines: This group is triggered by shooting at the Repair Outpost.
4x Angel Point Defense battery/Repair Station's Point

pockets.heading: Group 2 (Auto Aggro)
lines: This group is triggered by destroying of the Repair Outpost.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Destroy the repair station and warp out.

pockets.heading: Standing:
lines: Killing the Repair Outpost incurs a -4% standing penalty.
P.S.: As i have done this mission once, and blitzed it, i don't know if the 2 groups trigger additional rats.

pockets.heading: 3rd Group (50- 60km)
lines: 3x Battlecruisers (Corpatis Exorcist aka Blood Raider Spy)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Killing group 3 will flag mission completion.

lines: 4x Repair Station`s Point Defense battery ( Foxfire Rockets, pretty low range, wont hit you until you get < 10 km to them )

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: Destroy the repair station, or else they will be insta-repaired.

pockets.heading: First ambush
lines: 4x Repair Station`s Point Defense battery ( Foxfire Rockets, pretty low range, wont hit you until you get < 10 km to them )

pockets.heading: Merc reinforcements after destroying the Repair Station :
Standing:
lines: Killing the Repair Outpost incurs a -4% standing penalty.

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: Destroy the repair station, or else they will be insta-repaired.
Destroying the aux power generators next to the station, will disable the station's repair capability.

BreakTheirWill1sa.tips:
Destroy the repair station, or else they will be insta-repaired.
Destroying the aux power generators next to the station, will disable the station's repair capability.

pockets.heading: Standing:
lines: Killing the Repair Outpost incurs a -4% standing penalty.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: At warp-in there are only structures, when the Repair Outpost is attacked, the following wave will spawn
Attacking the Auxillary Power Arrays will not cause any spawn

pockets.heading: First Wave
lines: Arrives when you shoot at the Repair Outpost

pockets.heading: Reinforcement Wave 2
lines: Reinforcements will spawn when you shoot any one ship in the first wave or destroy the Repair Outpost

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy repair station, mission complete, warp out

pockets.heading: First Wave:
lines: 6x Cruiser (Corpum Revenant/Corpum Arch Reaver/Corpum Arch Templar)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroying the Repair Outpost completes the mission. You can fly back to your agent when done.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Fit a Drake with a good EM/Therm tank (in order to tank the first wave Cruisers). Get some distance before you start shooting the Outpost to trigger the first wave, ignore the Stasis Tower, kill the Destroyers as they come, align to (escape root), then continue shooting the Outpost. Once you have destroyed the Outpost, warp out.

pockets.heading: Asteroids
lines: There are 21 Scordite asteroids with a total amount of approx. 1,500,000 units of Scordite in the middle.
The two outer rings yield approx. 2,834,000 units of Veldspar. You can fly from roid to roid in a circle at a constant speed while mining them out.

info.Blitz: Destroy repair station, mission complete, warp out

pockets.heading: First Wave:
lines: (will appear when repairstation is attacked at approx 60km)
Reinforments will show up when you shoot any one ship in the first wave

pockets.heading: Second Wave:
lines: (will appear when repairstation is destroyed in two groups, one at 40km and the other at 80km)

* approx. 200dps (11% EM, 40% KN, 49% TH)

Mission Total DPS = 500-550dps

Blitz: Destroy repair station, mission complete, warp out

BreakTheirWill3gu.title: Break Their Will, Level 3

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: At warp-in there are only structures, including the Repair Station.  Attacking the Repair Station will cause the first group of rats to spawn. Shooting the Aux Generators doesn't trigger the spawn.

pockets.heading: First Spawn
lines: when you first hit the repair station
5-6x Cruisers - Pithium Nullifier/Killer/Silencer/Annihilator/etc.  Light Jamming from Annihilator

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Destroy the repair station, or it will insta-repair all the NPC ships atacking you, also you may want to destroy the Stasis Tower (it has more than 100km range).
The damage can get intense you may want to warp in at 50km and snipe.
Destroying the aux power generators next to the station, will disable the station's repair capability.  You may have to warp out and come back to get ccp's system to notice the power is out.
This is reported as not working. Even after warping out, It did not work.
Merc reinforcements spawn:  After you kill the repair station.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Just destroy the repair station and warp out

pockets.heading: Roids
lines: Asteroids are scattered over a 100km about 10-15km apart.

BreakTheirWill3gu.tips: Destroying the aux power generators next to the station, will disable the station's repair capability.  You may have to warp out and come back to get ccp's system to notice the power is out.

BreakTheirWill3se.title: Break Their Will, level 3

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Mission objective requires you to destroy a Repair Station.
Destroy the Aux Power Generators to make sure that the Repair Station doesn't auto heal, then destroy the Repair Station to disable its function to repair the hostile's ships.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: At warp in there are only structures, when the Repair Station (35km) is attacked, the following wave will spawn.
Attacking the Auxiliary Power Arrays (42km) will not cause any spawn.

pockets.heading: First Reinforcement Wave (53- 63km)
lines: Arrives when you attack the Repair Station.
3x Heavy Missile Battery (does explosive damage with Havoc Heavy Missiles)
6x Destroyers (Corelior Artillery/ Cannoneer/ Infantry/ Soldier/ Trooper)
4x Cruisers (Corelum Chief Patroller/ Guard/ Safeguard/ Scout/ Spy/ Watchman)

pockets.heading: Second Reinforcement Wave (34- 81km)
lines: Arrives when you destroy the Repair Station.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the Repair Station, mission complete, warp out

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Other structures do not drop any loot.

BreakTheirWill3se.tips: Destroy the Aux Power Generators to make sure that the Repair Station doesn't auto heal, then destroy the Repair Station to disable its function to repair the hostile's ships.

pockets.heading: (all levels, all factions)
lines: General blitz for all variants of this mission: warp in, lock Repair Outpost, align for your exit stargate/station, blow Repair Outpost, warp home.
Make sure to counter any targetting-related EWAR the NPCs throw at you (Serpentis and Guristas, specifically).

You do not need to bother with the Aux Generators. Neither will the NPCs get close enough to you to deal any relevant damage or scramble you unless you are desperately trying to. You will be webbed by the Stasis Towers (if applicable to your variant).

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: 6 x Frigates (Divine Imperial Napat) orbits at 10km,
12 x Destroyer (Imperial Templar Caius/Crusader) orbits at 8km
4 x Amarr Energy Neutralizer Sentry IIIs

lines: 4 minutes after warp-in there arrives at the Breeding Facilities
2 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Martyr) orbits at 49k
3 x Amarr Slave Transport Ships (Transports don’t always appear, and only stay for 3 minutes then leave)

pockets.heading: Stasis Tower Spawn
lines: 2 x Battlecruisers (Imperial Templar Justicar) orbits at 10km
1 x Battleship (Imperial Templar Martyr) orbits at 49km

pockets.heading: Neutralizer Tower Spawns
lines: Each Neutralizer Tower that is shot will spawn (each):
3 x Cruisers (Divine Imperial Champion/Justicar) orbits of 14-32km

BreaktheirWill1br.title: Break Their Will, Level 1

pockets.heading: Group 1 (Auto Aggro)
lines: 4x Repair Station`s Point Defense battery (i.e. Light missile Sentry w/ 10k ISK bounty)

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Destroy the repair station and warp out.

pockets.heading: Standing:
lines: Killing the Repair Outpost incurs a -4% standing penalty.

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: This mission can be mined repeatedly by destroying all but the repair station.  (Destroying the repair station completes the mission objective.)
If you're not blitzing, destroy the auxilary power generators generators first.  Doing so does not trigger the initial NPC spawn.
Be sure to enable "Large Collidable Structure" within your overview settings under the "Entity" category.  Otherwise, finding the Repair Outpost and Auxiliary Power Arrays is difficult.
Group 1 spawns when the repair station is first fired upon.  Group 2 spawns after the repair station is destroyed.

BreaktheirWill1br.tips:
This mission can be mined repeatedly by destroying all but the repair station.  (Destroying the repair station completes the mission objective.)
If you're not blitzing, destroy the auxilary power generators generators first.  Doing so does not trigger the initial NPC spawn.
Be sure to enable "Large Collidable Structure" within your overview settings under the "Entity" category.  Otherwise, finding the Repair Outpost and Auxiliary Power Arrays is difficult.
Group 1 spawns when the repair station is first fired upon.  Group 2 spawns after the repair station is destroyed.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: No aggro on warp in, no enemies on warp in.
Approaching the Warehouse triggers first Wave.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Retrieve the cargo from the warehouse, and bring it to your agent.

BuzzKill4an.title: Buzz Kill, Level 4

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: 5x Angel Assault Cruiser (Arch Gistum Centurion/ Phalanx)
1x Angel Frigate (Gistii Ruffian/ Thug) Triggers Reinforcement Wave, Webifier/ Warp Disruptor
4x Angel Assault Frigate (Arch Gistii Hunter/ Impaler) Triggers Back-up Wave, Target Painter
3x Angel Assault Frigate (Arch Gistii Hunter/ Impaler) Trigger
3x Angel Assault Frigate (Arch Gistii Impaler/ Hunter)
3x Angel Frigate (Arch Gistii Nomad/ Rufian) Target Painter
4x Angel Assault Cruiser (Arch Gistum Centurion/ Phalanx)
4x Angel Assault Cruiser (Arch Gistum Centurion/ Phalanx)
4x Angel Frigate (Arch Gistii Thug/ Outlaw) Webifier/ Warp Disruptor
4x Angel Cruiser (Arch Gistum Defeater/ Breaker) Trigger
4x Angel Battleship (Gist Warlord/ Saint) Target Painter

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill the initial group, ignore the Assault Frigates, and focus on the Reinforcement wave (triggered by the Frigate).
You may want to kill some or all of the Assault Cruisers and Battlecruisers to reduce incoming damage.
Kill the Disruptor Frigates and all the Battleships, done.

With the new drone changes, it becomes difficult to blitz this particular mission unless you are willing to sacrifice drones at the end (Align to object, deploy drones, let them get aggro, recall and warp, some or all will pop) or to pop all the Pointing Frigates along the way as well. Or use a MJD and snipe the triggers from afar.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Mission is flagged completed after you have killed the last Battleship.
All Battleships will fight using Bane Torpedoes. Other missile damage should be negligible.
As usual divert Drone aggro by pulling them in for a second. Remote Shield Booster is an option for Sentries.
The naming convention under the Overview for
being seen as the default name, instead of
; this is refreshing as in most missions the

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: 1)  A Micro Jump Drive is recommended, as it's much easier to take everything out from a distance.
2)  Fit a Sensor Booster and fly away from the Angel Scout Post (around which all ships spawn) to your optimal range.

8 x Battleships (State Shukuro Nagashin) orbits at 68k
2 x Caldari Energy Neutralizer Sentry IIIs
when all ships are destroyed, even without destroying the Subspace Beacons (and despite what the mission objective states).

pockets.heading: Spawn 1 (optional)
lines: If you destroy the Subspace Beacon on the right
8 x Battleships (State Shukuro Shogun) orbits at 33k

pockets.heading: Spawn 2 (optional)
lines: If you destroy the Subspace Beacon in the middle
6 x Battleships (State Shukuro Turusima) orbits at 23k

lines: If you destroy the Subspace Beacon on the left
6 x Battleships (State Shukuro Nagashin) orbits at 68k

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Nagashins deal a heavier than average amount of thermal damage for Caldari NPCs
Use a Passive Tank, or plan a capacitor that receives an extra 80 units/sec
Consider FoF missiles and setting drones to “Aggressive” for when you are unable to target because of Jammers

CaldariBeacons5.tips:
Nagashins deal a heavier than average amount of thermal damage for Caldari NPCs
Pocket 1 ships deal 2,280 hp/s (Kin: 53%, Therm: 47%)
Pocket 2 ships deal 2,480 hp/s (Kin: 48%, Therm: 52%)
Use a Passive Tank, or plan a capacitor that receives an extra 80 units/sec
Consider FoF missiles and setting drones to “Aggressive” for when you are unable to target because of Jammers

pockets.heading: Second Wave:
lines: Hints:  the cruisers can't hit a frigate circling them (speed tank) at 4km; AB not required.  Zitil has an active armour tank but is most vulnerable to EM damage.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: You don't have to destroy any of the ships, so you can just warp in, grab the goods and warp out. Mind the Elite frigates probability of scrambling.

info.Blitz: 1 min (This depends on how fast your ship can cover 37KM)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: On warp-in, no rats are present.
Spawn 1 appears when picking up goods (50m3) from the objective (Warehouse)

pockets.heading: Spawn 1:
lines: Spawn 2 appears as soon as you kill any destroyers or cruisers of spawn 1.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: You don't have to destroy any of the ships, so you can just warp in, grab the goods (50m3) and warp out.

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Take out the Destroyers first as they are weak to kill but pack a bit of a punch. (If you are not going to blitz)

pockets.heading: Reward and Bonus
lines: Bonus: 80,000 ISK if you get it done before 2 hours and 4 minutes.

pockets.heading: Time
lines: Blitz: 1 min (This depends on how fast your ship can cover 37KM)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Approaching the Warehouse triggers the spawn (at 15km):

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Approach the Warehouse, grab whatever you are there to pick up, warp out (you should not do it in a shuttle, you need something that last a little bit longer)

Edit (by Travis) - The objective is 60m3, so a shuttle cannot complete the mission.  However, my destroyer was able to align and warp before any of the rats even targeted me, so any frigate should be able to blitz.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: You don't have to destroy any of the ships, so you can just warp in, grab the goods from the warehouse and warp out.

pockets.heading: Video
lines: The video in the following link shows you where everyone will show up, and their range. This guide also only shows one of many ways to take out the bad guys.

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: 1x Elite Cruiser (Shecon Pouta) (Elder Corpum Dark Priest/Shadow Sage)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Rush to the warehouse, get the item to retrieve and fly back to your agent. No kills needed to complete.

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: ~ 900,000 isk in drops from all enemies.
~ 600,000 from salvage with basic salvaging skill.

pockets.heading: Mineable Asteroid info
lines: There are 60 Veldspar Asteroids containing 2.27m Units.

info.Damage Dealt: Em/ Thermal (Kinetic missiles from the Battleships)
info.Recommended ship classes: Battleship, Command Ship, Battlecruiser, HAC, Recon, Faction Cruiser (Blitz: fast Frigate or Shuttle)

pockets.heading: First Spawn (15- 63km)
lines: 3x Elite Cruiser (Elder Corpum Shadow Sage/ Dark Priest)

pockets.heading: Second Spawn (16- 52km)
lines: 6x Battleship (Corpus Pope, aka Kubi Gayar/ Archbishop/ Harbinger)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Warp to the mission in a shuttle or fast frigate with a MWD.
Approach and open the Warehouse container, align, loot and warp out.
Deliver the item to your agent, done.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: If you can get outside their effective gun range (about 40 km) you can easily snipe them safely.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: Loot the Warehouse with a shuttle, come back with a Battleship, Micro Jump and snipe if needed.
Done with a T2 fit Dominix from warp in (~646 DPS, 112.9 ehp/s rep, 16 min cap).

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Using a Shuttle or fast Frigate, burn to the Warehouse, align and loot the item.
Return to your agent to complete the mission.

pockets.heading: Additional Information
lines: There is no point in buying the Quafe Ultra from the market, the Warehouse must be looted to trigger the mission's objective sequence.

info.Space type: Deadspace without a gate, MWD works.
info.Recommended ship classes: Battleship, Command Ship, Battlecruiser, HAC, Faction Cruiser, T3 Cruiser (Blitz:T3 Destroyer or simply fit an MWD)

pockets.heading: 2nd Spawn
lines: 3x Battleship (Core Port Admiral/ Rear Admiral/ Dune Conal)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Fly to the pickup point, loot and warp. The Warehouse spawn is triggered on picking up the cargo.
Mission is complete when the Quafe Ultra is delivered to your agent.

info.Recommended ship classes: Battleship, Command Ship, Battlecruiser, HAC, Recon, Faction Cruiser (Blitz: destroyer, frigate or  shuttle)

pockets.heading: 2nd Spawn
lines: 3x Battleship (Core Port Admiral/ Rear Admiral/ Dune Conal)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Using a Shuttle or fast Frigate. Align, loot the item from the warehouse and warp out.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Mission is flagged completed after delivering the item to your agent.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: Blitz the item, then come back in a Battleship and shoot the spawns.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Killing group 1 gives You the loot needed to complete the mission.

pockets.heading: Group 2
lines: Aggro from Group 2 if You get at around 20km range to them.

pockets.heading: 3rd Pocket
lines: Attacking the 1st group will aggro the entire pocket, attacking the 3rd group will aggro the 1st Group also.
Fleet members that warped in and attack will draw aggro from the 2nd group if not previously engaged.

pockets.heading: 2nd Group (10- 24km)
lines: 4x Tower Sentry Drone II (EoM Sentry Gun)
2x Tower Sentry Drone III (EoM Sentry Gun)

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: All of the pockets are in normal space, therefore MWD works and Fleet Members may warp directly to any pocket.
All of the acceleration gates are locked until the pocket is clear of any hostile ships.
Spacial interference prevents the use of stasis Webifiers or "other items of its type" on the EoM Behemoth.
Don't forget to retrieve the dropped VIPs passengers.

info.Damage dealt: Kin/Therm for pocket 1-3 and 5. All kinds for pocket 4

pockets.heading: Spawn 5
lines: Message: The Imp ship has used a smartbomb, activating a burst of energy that collides with all ships within the blast radius!

pockets.heading: Spawn 3
lines: Number of Imps and Friends may vary

pockets.heading: Pocket 5:
lines: The mission will complete when it is destroyed. It will also drop the 10 units of VIPs required to bring back to agent to complete the mission.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Overview: Four groups of ships/towers, auto or proximity aggro (~40km).
Mission complete once you destroy  the "Starbase Shield Generator" (72km) which will drop the shields and then allow you to destroy the "Starbase Main Reactor" (70km).

pockets.heading: Group 2 (35km)
lines: Note: Group 2 and Group 3 may be a single group which aggro's on proximity.
1x Elite Frigate (Elite Federation Matara) Webify/Scramble/Sensor Dampening

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the Starbase Main Reactor, ~70km from the warp in point.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Towers drop t1 ammo, the Starbase Main Reactor drops Uranium and trade goods.

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Ships and towers between 30-60km away. All ships aggro at warp-in.
2 x Amarr Stasis Towers, when shot

2 x Battlecruiser (Imperial Templar Champion/Justicar) orbits at 10-22k
1 x Battleship (Imperial Templar Martyr) orbits at 49k,
2 x Amarr Energy Neutralizer Sentry IIIs

pockets.heading: - Spawn 1
lines: If either Stasis Tower is shot, there spawns

7th Battery Shot - 2 x Frigates (Divine Imperial Imran/Sixtus/Amarr Navy Gamma I Support Frigate)

pockets.heading: - Spawn 5
lines: After a certain period of time there spawns

pockets.heading: Group 1 (Aggro)

pockets.heading: Group 2

lines: After you kill the last of these four cruisers, a further eight cruisers will spawn that you do not need to kill: you'll get a message in local from the Caldari Navy to the effect that they'll handle it from here and the mission ends.

The Communications Tower has a rather hefty number of armor and hull hitpoints for a Level 2, so it may be worth it to blow up the towers and ships first.

ConvoyAttack5am.title: Convoy Attack, Level 5

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Enemy ships sit to your left at 60-110km away from your warp-in point.  Full-Room Aggro upon your first shot:
4 x Frigates (Divine Imperial Napat) orbit at 10k,
(4 x Imperial Templar Diviner) orbits at 21k, Heavy NOS, Tracking Disrupter
(3 x Imperial Templar Dominator) orbits at 17k
(5 x Imperial Templar Martyr) orbits at 49k
(2 x Imperial Templar Torah) orbits at 44k
(3 x Imperial Templar Judgment) orbits at 49k

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: Use a Passive Tank because of the Diviners (NOS) that approach you at 1120m/s.  Or kill them first, or plan a capacitor that receives an extra 80 units/sec.
Freighters deal no damage but orbit at 70km and take over 142,000 HP each to destroy

I have thrown off Full-Room Aggro by leaving the room, returning and selectively aggressing certain groups that have approached quickly and separated from the others.  Diviners and Dominators can be aggressed separately this way.

Killing the Federation Nauclarius triggers Group 5

pockets.heading: Group 3 (30km)
lines: Killing the last ship from this spawn triggers Group 4
