CostOfGreenerGrass2Gallente.tips:
Most ships stay 5km-8km, a couple cruisers stay 20km, plan accordingly.

CategoryMissions

CategoryLevel2

pockets.heading: Warp In
lines: Warp In is 38km from first gate

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Gate leaves you 28km from Cargo Container with objective

pockets.heading: Group 1 (20km) (Auto Aggro)
lines: 7x Frigate (Pithi Invader, Pithi Infiltrator, Pithi Arrogator)

pockets.heading: Blitz [Pocket 2]
lines: Once through gate, fly to and loot cargo container and leave.
There are 5x frigates and 2x destroyers, but you need NOT engage them if you are fast enough [hence the AB].

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: 5 Frigates (killing last guard triggers next spawn)

pockets.heading: Single Group
lines: Aggro from entire group from warp-in point.
1x Cruiser (Ytari Niaga, Zerak Cheryn or Kuran "Scarface" Lonan)
The last rat killed will drop 1 unit of Special Delivery that is required to be brought back to agent to complete the mission. None of the NPCs in the entire mission respawn.
The beacon is 15km from the group of rats, meaning you can try to warp in at 100km getting some distance. But the rats are very fast, and will swarm you in a few seconds.
Note: Cruiser (Ytari Niaga, Zerak Cheryn or Kuran "Scarface" Lonan) have a small chance to drop fraction module ( Dread Guristas Co-Processor from Ytari Niaga) or implant

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: The Casino will drop 20 units each of two random types of commodity or perhaps tourists.

pockets.heading: Standing
lines: 2.4% standing penalty with opposing faction to agent.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: 3x Elite Frigate (Mercenary Wingman)  Webifier/ Warp Disruptor

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: All ships must be cleared to complete the mission.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: The Abandoned Stargate Drops Metal Scraps (50)

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Ratah Niaga's ship has high thermal resistance. Use kinetic damage to kill it. He will try to orbit at ~250km flying away at 145m/s. Best to kill him first before he gets away or fit a MWD or MJD to go after him.

pockets.heading: Loot and Bounty
lines: All the named Battleships have a small chance to drop faction loot.

pockets.heading: Damage Information
lines:
Name  Weapon  Group DPS 
 EM  Exp  Kin  Th 
 Ratah Niaga  Paradise Precision Cruise Missile  162  36  91  200 
 Tauron  Paradise Cruise Missile  159  36  103  292 
 Taisu Magdesh  Devastator Cruise Missile  149  101  95  180
Note: group DPS excludes Sentry Guns.

info.Web/scramble: T2 Frigates have a chance to web and/or scramble. T2 Cruisers have a chance to web.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Everything agros upon warp in. One of the battleships will be a trigger for the second spawn to appear.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Everything agros upon warp in. This room contains the Rebel Output that you must destroy to complete the mission. Spawn 2 will appear partway through destroying the outpost.

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Both groups are spawned on warp-in
Note - Neither group aggroed on warp-in, each group is aggroed separately

pockets.heading: Pocket #1
lines: Attacking the Terrorist causes the second group to spawn, on his destruction, the third group spawns.

info.Blitz: Kill the Commander and the mission will be complete.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 9x Frigates (Federation Matara, Federation Praktor Belos, Federation Arcus)

pockets.heading: Distant Groups (2 groups, but they warp in sychronization)
lines: 12x Battlecruisers (Federation Praktor Arx, Praktor Bearcus, Pezos, Praeco)
3x Battlecruisers (Federation Praktor Erenus) - Medium Neuts on each. They have microwarps so they will get to you very fast.
12x Cruisers (Federation Praktor Centurion, Nauclarius, Praktor Hippeus, Praktor Ouragos, Praktor Optioon, Praktor Legionarius)

pockets.heading: Passive group (stayed at their distant position and did not engage until agressed)
lines: 6x Battlecruisers (Federation Praktor Arx, Praktor Bearcus, Pezos, Praeco)
Kill the Commander and the mission will be complete.
0.2% loss per standing tick, and you should not take more than 45 minutes (3 ticks), negligible compared to the derived standing loss (around 3%)
3x Federation Navy Command Sergeant Major I

Incoming DPS is comparable to a L5 mission (beyond 1000 dps easily on a battleship hull), but you can stay out of their effective range (which is below 60 km) and snipe them. As this is deadspace you can not warp to bookmarks - you would land on the warpin-beacon anyway - but you can warp to range of a bookmark (any bookmark in the mission deadspace will work) and land at the chosen range from the warpin-beacon. Start flying away when they get into their effective range and pick them off.

pockets.heading: Group 2: 25km
lines: Mission difficulty is low for a Level 2.  Group 2 will appear when Transport got a hit in armor, cargo is dropped when Transport is destroyed.
Killing Frigates will result in standings loss with Gallente.
Blow up transport ship, grab DNA and warp away.

pockets.heading: Group 2: 35km
lines: No aggro upon warp in.  Group 2 will appear when Transport got a hit in armor, cargo is dropped when Transport is destroyed.
Blow up the transport ship, grab cargo and warp away.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1 (no aggro)
lines: All groups aggro on proximity, but independently. Gate is locked.

pockets.heading: Group 2 (20km, appears when you shoot Group 1)
Group 3 (34km, appears when you shoot Group 1)
lines: 6x Frigates (Mercenary Elite, Mercenary Fighter, Mercenary Wingman)

pockets.heading: Group 4 (trigger: none appears after a short time)
Group 5 (trigger unknown when last of group 2 is killed)
Blitz:
lines: Not possible, must kill all ships

info.Faction: Mercenaries (Caldari-type ships, dropping Caldari Navy tags, but no Caldari standings penalty)

pockets.heading: Warp In
lines: All jam, though not for long

pockets.heading: First Wave
lines: Either the Moa or the last ship is the trigger for the second wave.
The Moa has been observed to not spawn.
When you first warp in, if there is no Moa, the trigger will be one of the two ships that are a different type from the rest. Usually it is the two that are the first to aggro.

pockets.heading: Subsequent Waves
lines: There are at least 3 subsequent waves, but they vary in composition and order. Consider the following as examples of what you might encounter.

pockets.heading: Example Spawn 1
lines: The recon ships jam, a lot. The last Caracal triggers the third wave.
Tip: kill the recon ships before triggering the third wave, or, if you use a t1 cruiser like I did, you may need to call for help.

pockets.heading: Example Spawn 2
lines: The last BC or the last ship triggers the next wave.

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Use two Sensor Boosters with ECCM scripts to reduce chances of being jamed. (Only if needed, sometimes jammers never spawn.)
Kill the Recon Ships (Jammers) before triggering the third wave.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy ships in first wave (Blackbirds only, not the Moa) and destroy the repair outpost.
If second wave is triggered, continue to focus on Blackbirds until mission complete.

lines: Rats' names vary. The below is just an example.

DirtyJob5.title: A Dirty Job, Level 5

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Ship at 20km. No aggro until first shot.

pockets.heading: Carrier Spawns
lines: Each original Fighter will replace itself 8 more times if destroyed
3 x Frigates (Mercenary Elite Fighter) orbits at 8km,
4 x Frigates (Mercenary Elite Fighter) orbits at 8km,
3 x Frigates (Mercenary Elite Fighter) orbits at 8km,
1 x Frigates (Mercenary Elite Fighter) orbits at 8km,
2 x Frigates (Mercenary Elite Fighter) orbits at 8km,

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Use a Passive Tank, get the Carrier’s NOS on your drones,  or plan a capacitor that receives and extra 40 units/s
Maximum damage dealing of Fighters plus a Mercenary Spawn is 1341 hp/s (Therm 40%, Expl: 25%, Kin: 23%, EM 12%)
Mission is flagged complete when the Carrier is destroyed

DirtyJob5.tips:
Use a Passive Tank, get the Carrier’s NOS on your drones,  or plan a capacitor that receives and extra 40 units/s
Maximum damage dealing of Fighters plus a Mercenary Spawn is 1341 hp/s (Therm 40%, Expl: 25%, Kin: 23%, EM 12%)
Mission is flagged complete when the Carrier is destroyed

pockets.heading: Group 1 (~40- 46km)
lines: The hostiles will attack and destroy the Gallente Towers and aggro shortly after.

pockets.heading: Group 2 (~48km)
lines: Group 2 spawns about five minutes after warp in.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: No standing loss with Caldari, despite what the agent says.

info.Blitz: Kill Gallente Diplomat.

pockets.heading: Get the Gallente (1 of 2)
lines: Spawns appear as you warp in.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: 1x Iteron Mark V (Needed to be killed or you will fail the mission)
!Note : Careful sometimes the mission is kill the Minmatar and do not kill the Gallente !!

Not really hard-shielded, but combined damage from two groups could likely kill you in process, so - bring some certain amount of firepower or be able to outrun initial aggro. Single-repped Myrm with ~50 resists all-around was held just long enough for a kill score, warped off with 5% armor left.

pockets.heading: Delegation Destruction (2 of 2)
lines: Spawns appear as you warp in.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Kill the Flagship first, because it may warp off, but not 100% sure of this.
It's very, VERY hard to crack, unless you're in battleship yourself, and incoming damage from whole spawn is very high also.
If you can't tank 500+ DPS EX/TM, I suggest you forget about blitz.

Take destroyers down fast. They are (relatively) slow and short-ranged, not particularly hard to outrun, so you have plently of time for your drones to chew through them one by one. Use light drones, however...
It didn't warped off for me, so I vent on with Dualrep+AB Myrmidon, cleared adds, then refitted for usual 1rep+2Gyro and took a liberty of stocking heavy drones in the bay. Still, it was slow kill.

info.Faction: Angel, Blood Raider, Guristas and Serpentis
info.Damage Dealt: Varies with Faction (Omni Tank), EM/ Thermal from Anire Scarlet
info.Recommended damage dealing: Explosive (Angel Cartel), Kinetic/ Thermal (Guristas & Serpentis), EM (Blood Raiders)

pockets.heading: Initial Pocket
lines: 5x Battleship (Gist Malakim/ Nephilim/ Warlord) Target Painter
Acceleration gate to next pocket is locked and at 20km.

pockets.heading: 2nd Pocket
lines: 5x Battlecruiser (Pithatis Enforcer/ Death Dealer/ Revolter/ Assasin/ Executor/ Assaulter)
4x Elite Cruiser (Corpum Arch Priest/ Sage/ Shadow Sage/ Dark Priest)
Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 29km.

pockets.heading: 3rd Pocket
lines: 3x Battleship (Core Flotilla Admiral/ Vice Admiral) Dampener
Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 19km.

pockets.heading: 4th Pocket
lines: 2x Elite Frigate (Arch Gistii Rogue/ Hijacker) Warp Disruptor
4x Elite Cruiser (Arch Gistum Breaker/ Liquidator/ Defeater)
3x Elite Cruiser (Dire Pithum Abolisher/ Annihilator) ECM

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Use an afterburner, burn through each pocket, and pop maybe one high value BS on the way.
Kill Anire Scarlet in the last pocket for 5 mil bounty and head home. That's 10 to 11 mil for maybe 15 minutes play.
If you manage to alpha Scarlet twice, you will not even have to go to the last pocket.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Anire Scarlet is flying an Absolution and does heavy EM/ Thermal damage. Attack her first to reduce incoming damage, she will warp away until the last pocket. Be aware that attacking her draws pocket aggro.

If you manage to kill her before she warps off, she will spawn again in the next pocket, again with the bounty and this time she will also drop - basic implant. I've used EMP L with 1400mm T2 artillery.

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: Scarlet's Station is extremely well-tanked (~500,000 HP) and may drop random ammo (not worth the time).

pockets.heading: Additional Information
lines: As of Aug 2014 there are no re-spawn, so no farming.
This is an omni tank and damage mission, so fit accordingly.
You may warp to a fleet member directly in any pocket, but cannot warp directly to any of the previous pockets.
Despite Anire Scarlet's 5 million ISK bounty and being the mission completion trigger, she is no better tanked than any Battlecruiser and is very easy to kill.
Keep an eye on your Drones, they tend to go after the Sentry Towers (4th pocket) if set to aggressive.

The 2nd Spawn (4th pocket) deals high incoming damage (compared to all previous spawns in this mission), so be full on cap and hp before triggering it, although it is far away (102- 108km) and may be sniped before causing much damage.
In the 3rd Pocket, the spawn is of the same faction as the initial pocket spawn's Battleships.
In the 4th Pocket, the spawn's faction is based on the 1st group's faction, if Guristas, then the spawn will be Blood Raider, if Angels then Serpentis.

pockets.heading: Endless Battle, Level 1 (Tutorial)
lines: Last edited by DesmontMcCallock Sat, 14 Jul 2012 08:18 UTC
Detection and elimination of pirates in our solar system is a constant battle. Can you help us overcome this fast growing plague?
Warp to the mission location found in your journal and eliminate the saboteurs. Once they are killed, return to your agent.

This mission leads to Part 2: Encryption Code Book (Courier)

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Use a large kinetic smartbomb to dispose very quickly.
Use drones to dispose the rest that are too far away for the smartbomb

lines: 2.4% Gallente standing loss (due to Ship Kill).

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: The trigger ships will spawn the next wave the moment they are attacked, not when they are destroyed. Consider setting your drones to passive to avoid being overwhelmed.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: 3 groups, warp-in aggro from one random group, no linked aggro. Moving too close to one group will aggro it.

The following ships are not necessarily divided by type into groups. E.g. on warp-in one group will aggro, but this group can consist of 3x Gallente Navy Megathron. Not all 7x Megathron will aggro on warp-in.
Drones are not attacked by non attacked groups.

lines: Mission flagged complete when killing all ships in Group 3.

pockets.heading: Tip #1:
lines: Initial warpin will grab you aggro off the first set of NPC's, kill these off first, do not move when you drop out of warp unless you can safely align away from the spawns. The second group will aggro the closer you get to the can, so start approaching the can and then stop once this group aggros you.

Third and fourth aggros come from that center group, again once you have killed the second group move closer to the can until you pick up aggro off 2 BS's and a couple of frigs/cruisers. then once done, finish off the rest

pockets.heading: Tip #2
lines: Destroy the first aggroing group then stay still, target the navy orion and destroy it, this will break up the aggro and will not aggro the other ships next to it. (Tested 7 times).
Federation Navy Fleet Colonel I x 3
Federation Navy Fleet Colonel II x 8
Federation Navy Fleet Sergeant II x 1
Federation Navy Fleet Sergeant III x 5

pockets.heading: WAVE 4 90-95km

Only the Stargate drops loot (standard commodities and some contraband)
Don't forget to destroy the Stargate before warping back to your agent! (
A Bunker and Heavy Missile Battery will hit you with -2.4% faction hit if you destroy them.  Only needed hit is -0.02% that occurs with 1 of the Republic Fleet Typhoons

lines: All ships are named as "Unidentified Mercenary Frigate / Cruiser".
Exact ship types in spawns vary but numbers and hull size does not.

pockets.heading: Spawn 5
lines: The mission is complete when you destroy all hostile ships, including all re-spawns.
Every Frigate and the first cruiser reinforcement spawn.

pockets.heading: Tags
lines: Caldari Navy Captain Insignia II x5
Caldari Navy Captain Insignia III x7
Caldari Navy Commodore Insignia II x38

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill all ships in "initial spawn" and "Spawn 3"

pockets.heading: Initial Pocket
lines: 12x Frigate (Strain Splinter Alvi/ Silverfish Alvi/ Strain Silverfish Alvi)
4x Sentry (Drone Cruise Missile Battery/ Drone Stasis Sentry I/ Drone Energy Neutralizer Sentry I)

pockets.heading: Bonus Pocket
lines: 5x Frigate (Strain Sunder Alvi/ Strain Raider Alvi) Warp Disruptor
4x Cruiser (Striker Alvatis/ Defeater Alvatis/ Crippler Alvatis)
5x Frigate (Strain Sunder Alvi/ Strain Raider Alvi) Warp Disruptor
3x Cruiser (Striker Alvatis/ Defeater Alvatis/ Crippler Alvatis)
5x Frigate (Strain Sunder Alvi/ Strain Raider Alvi) Warp Disruptor
3x Cruiser (Striker Alvatis/ Defeater Alvatis/ Crippler Alvatis)

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Spawns appear at one minute intervals. Kill the point first.
A MJD is recommended as warping out may cause a re-spawn.
Incoming damage may exceed 4,000- 6,000 DPS. Fit accordingly.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: Done in a Golem with an XL Shield Boost burst-tank. Align out, hit Bastion and try to keep your shield at 100%. Spawns will hit hard, focus on the Battleships and use Drones to take out the Strain Sunder and Strain Raider Alvis to allow a warp out if necessary. Ship's capacitor stayed above 50%.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the Infested Station and warp out.

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: The <Faction> Carrier drops a <Faction> Fleet Rear-Admiral tag.

pockets.heading: Loot + Bounty
lines: Loot + Salvage: 1st pocket: ~1.65 mil, bonus pocket: ~5.5 mil.

FallingNationComesCost3.title: Falling the nation comes at a cost, level 3

pockets.heading: Single pocket
lines: Just warp in, kill the 3 ships and the mission is flagged completed.

Side note: I believe this mission changes the NPC with the faction you are doing the mission. I did this mission with True power corp (sansha) and I got sanshas. so if you do this mission with amarr you will get Renegade Amarr's Slaver, and so on.

pockets.heading: Group 1: 20km (auto-aggro)
lines: The smuggler's stargate drops about 50 scrap metal and some illegal drugs. Not worth destroying, as it has an obscene amount of HP.
1x Imperial Industrial (destroyed by the Pirate as you're flying towards it)
Mission contains considerable amount (~150) of very sizeable asteroids:
There is a cargo container (jetcan) with the mission objective in it (10 units of Bandine) next to the pirate miners.
Pick it up to finish the mission.
This mission contains a lot of very large 'roids, and can be quite lucrative for a good miner.
8x Frigate(Mercenary Pirates[Mercenary Rookie]) (you only get to kill 3 of them yourself)
The 2 sides shoot at each other and there's all sorts of wrecks left at the end.  You only get to kill 3 frigates.

I'm not sure if you can shoot the DED ships.  They are about 60km away when you warp in.  The DED ships warp out as soon as all the pirates are dead.  Provided that you have a range of 50-70km, you can take them out.  They do not agro, however, and you can only shoot at them until the pirates are dead.
All Mercenary ships will be destroyed, only a few of the DED ships ones will be. They contain a lot of loot

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Gate to pocket is unguarded.  Group 1 auto aggros, Group 2 spawns once the Sector Commander is damaged to armor.
Mission is complete once Sector Commander is destroyed.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the Sector Commander, warp out.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Three initial groups, aggro from groups 1 and 2. Group 3 will aggro when the Public Confidence Operative or the missile batteries are attacked. Destroying the last ship in Group 3 triggers Spawn 2. Last ship in Spawn 2 drops a cargo container with the objective item.

pockets.heading: Group 2
lines: Spawn once first group is attacked.

pockets.heading: Group 3
lines: Spawn once first group is attacked.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Destroy Badly Damaged Megathron, grab cargo from the cargo container, deliver back to station.

Special Ship Restrictions: Shuttle, Rookie Ship, T1/T2 Frigate, or Destroyer - Only

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Gallentean Guards all have very low hp, but do a considerable amount of damage
Gallentean Guards are all various Apis drones, and do EM/Thermal. No drone loot
Gallentean Guards do not incur any standing loss

FortheBirds1.tips:

lines: Of special note is there there's absolutely no standing loss towards Minmatar, Concord or Amarr incurred during all of this, as far as I could tell from my standings transactions logs. Amarr ships drop tags, as do CONCORD and Minmatar. Also likely the only time you can kill CONCORD and not get fragged by the NPCs.

Fortress5Ga.title: The Fortress, Level 5

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Wave 1 Spawns when the Capital Ship Maintenance Array goes below 25% shield.
Wave 2 Spawns when the Array goes below 50% armor.
Wave 3 Spawns when the Array goes below 50% hull.
Waves 1 and 3 are fighters, and do more DPS than frigates.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Ignore initial spawns and triggers. Destroy Starbase Capital Ship Maintenance Array.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Starbase Capital Ship Maintenance Array drops trade goods and metal scraps. The Other structures drop no loot.

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: You can warp in at 100KM by warping to 0, stopping your ship, and then warping to 100KM.
Expect every frigate to web, scramble, or both.
Be prepared for frequent sensor dampening to come from the battlecruisers.

Fortress5Ga.tips:
You can warp in at 100KM by warping to 0, stopping your ship, and then warping to 100KM.
Expect every frigate to web, scramble, or both.
Be prepared for frequent sensor dampening to come from the battlecruisers.

6 x Battlecruisers (Imperial Templar Champion/Justicar) orbits at 10-22km
6 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Dominator/Ultara) orbits at 17-49km
8 x Amarr Energy Neutralizer Sentry IIIs

6 x Cruisers (Divine Imperial Ambrose/Basil) orbits at 7-19km,
8 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Martyr) orbits at 49km
When the Maintenance Array is reduced to 50% Hull there spawns
10 x Fighters (Imperial Fighter) Capital Ship Maintenance Array Guards, orbit at 3km

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Use a Passive Tank and save time by not having to destroy Energy Neutralizer Sentries
Maximum damage dealing of initial groups are 1,635hp/s (EM 60%,  Therm 40%)
Mission flagged complete Maintenance Array is destroyed, whether all ships are destroyed or not

lines: 8x Elite Frigates (3x chief republic ivan, 5x chief republic magni) (web/scram)
6x BC (4x republic tribal norn, 2x republic tribal nutia)
6x BS (4x republic tribal jotun, 2x republic tribal sigur)

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: Triggered when the ship maint array gets into armor (or very low shields)
10x Republic Fighter (frigate icon but they hit like fighters)

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: Triggered when the ship maint array gets into low armor
4x Elite Frigates (3x chief republic ivan, 1x chief republic magni) (web/scram)

Source images from original stub article:
- make a page out of this :) I've looked at the screenshots, and use them for reference. They are not usable as screenshots in the report.

pockets.heading: Single pocket
lines: All ships auto-aggro a few seconds after warp-in.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Kill Slaver Ship to get complete, scoop up the Freed Slaves from can to turn in. No standing loss for only Slaver Ship.

pockets.heading: Brief
lines: A Serpentis Captain wants to surrender. Destroy the Serpentis ships, return informant to agent.
(1) Corelum Chief Safeguard (The Informant), kill this ship, Informant drops in can at kill.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill Corelum Chief Safeguard, grab the Informant from dropped can, mission completes, 2nd group spawns, ingnore and deliver Informant to agent.

pockets.heading: Mineable Asteroids
lines: There are mineable asteroids however they are rigged with smart bombs... can be done in a hulk with a good shield tank, other ships if have shield repair drones to repair as you are hit

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: •	Very Simple Mission, Corelum Chief Safeguard gives a decent fight, the rest are easy for a well fitted Cruiser.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Upon warp-in there are 5 ships that aggro. There are 2 spawns. Upon destruction of the last ship in the group, spawns will show up and auto aggro.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: The target [Radio telescope] is 29km away when you warp in.  Just target and kill it.  The Initial Group of Gallente ships mostly can't hit beyond 8,000 meters and only did 3,000 hp total damage before I took out the target.  No sign of either webbing or warp jamming in Initial Group.  Very easy mission; you could do it in a level 2 cruiser [Omen, Caracal, Vexor, Stabber].

pockets.heading: Standings
lines: No standing lose on destroying the Radio Telescope.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: No ships at gate. Group 1 and 2 initially present in the pocket.
Spawn 1 appears after the first Industrial is destroyed. To complete the mission, destroy the three Federation Industrials (67km).

pockets.heading: Warp-in
lines: Spawn 1 will sometimes warp in as you approach the gate.
Spawn 2 will sometimes warp in after Spawn 1 has been destroyed
Gate is locked until all spawns are destroyed; if there are no spawns, gate is unlocked.

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: The spawn arrives when you approach or shoot the Infested Laboratory. It arrives on the warp in point.

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: Arrives after you kill the 1st 5 Frigates
The Laboratory drops some Trade Goods and Scrap Metal

pockets.heading: Notes
lines: The Laboratory is inside the Hollow Asteroid.  Kill all of the frigates before attempting to navigate to retrieve the drop.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Loot the Ancient Amarrian Relic from the cargo container.

Gatetonowhere4.title: Gate to Nowhere, Level 4 Amarr Storyline

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Last Battleship killed of Initial Group triggers another group (100 km away from the gate to Pocket 2):
4 x Battleships (3* Republic Tribal Sigur, 1* Republic Tribal Ymir)
Use the acceleration gate (40 km away from warp in point) to reach

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Initial Group (at less than 10 km distance)
4 x Battleships (3* Republic Tribal Jarl, 1* Republic Tribal Jotun)
3 x Cruisers (Republic Tribal Japur / Republic Tribal Manadis)
3 x Battleships (Republic Tribal Sigur/Republic Tribal Jotun)
4 x Cruiser (Republic Tribal Rodul/Republic Tribal Ormur/Republic Tribal Manadis)
3 x Battlecruiser (Republic Tribal Norn/Republic Tribal Nutia)
4 x Battleships (3* Republic Tribal Jotun, 1* Republic Tribal Sigur)
Killing the last ship completes the mission and removes the gate from the first pocket - no need to warp back as per message, there was nothing there.
9 x Republic Fleet High Captain I

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: Lots of Minmatar Battleships, many of them with close-range weapons that you can outrun with an afterburner.
Respawn aggro drones (not confirmed) - didn't get any drone aggro.

Gatetonowhere4.tips: Respawn aggro drones (not confirmed) - didn't get any drone aggro.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Each initial Fiend will trigger a Wave 1 spawn, and killing the wave will trigger a Wave 2 spawn.
Best to kill all Imps first, then one Fiend, then complete its waves before killing another of the initial Fiends.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill Group 3 Fiend, then Wave 1 that is triggered, and then Wave 2.

info.Blitz: 3-5 minutes

pockets.heading: Group 3
lines: For each group you kill, you'll get an additional spawn of:

pockets.heading: First Wave:
lines: When each EoM Demon is killed you get:

pockets.heading: Second Wave:
lines: When both EoM Demons of the group are killed you get:

pockets.heading: Third Wave:
lines: 2x Frigates (EoM Demon) (Center and Right Spawn Chain)
Two of the previous triggers will spawn Demons, while the third will spawn Succubi.
When both Demons/Succubi of this group are killed you get:

pockets.heading: Fourth Wave:
lines: 1x Cruiser (EoM Priest)  (divided neatly by about 20-30k each, slow moving you can down each one before they close in too much)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill the left group of EoMs and each subsequent spawn without even touching mid and right groups. Once you kill cruiser, mission is done.
At the Demon + Succubus spawn, you only have to kill the trigger and leave the Succubus.

pockets.heading: Rewards and Bonus
lines: Bonus: 167,000 ISK if you complete it within 2 hours and 52 minutes.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Best tip is, warp in deploy drones and let them do all the work.  Trivial in a Vexor.
Can be done with basic T1 drones. Even after the 2013 AI update. They didn't shoot at any of my Hobgoblins 1.
You should have long range guns/drones.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket All Spawns ~45-55km from warp-in point
lines: Aggro a few seconds after you warp in

Prophets spawn in three groups of two. When both prophets in a group are killed it triggers a spawn and its chain. It is recommended to target one from each group and kill them first. Then kill the remaining ships one at a time and eliminate the chain of spawns after it. Note that this means you get a total of three of each of the Reinforcement Spawns!
An easy way to tackle this is to approach from either the left or right hand side and just pick off the ships as they approach.

pockets.heading: Reinforcement Spawn 1
lines: When you kill the cruiser, it triggers Reinforcement Spawn 2

pockets.heading: Reinforcement Spawn 2
lines: When you kill the cruiser, it triggers Reinforcement Spawn 3

pockets.heading: Reinforcement Spawn 3
lines: When you kill the cruiser, it triggers Reinforcement Spawn 4

pockets.heading: Reinforcement Spawn 4
lines: Example Image of how killing the Prophets triggers the Reinforcement Spawns:

pockets.heading: Asteroids
lines: Make sure you do not turn the mission in until after you are done mining, if you want to mine. (Or just make sure there's always at least one ship in the area after you've turned it in.) Bookmarking the asteroids to warp in close doesn't work, you always warp to the start point unless mining after turning it in.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill right spawn and all ships of this chain.

info.Web/Scramble: EoM Saboteur  (Extra spawn, from the left group wave)

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: To manage aggro, work on a single wave, then kill the next
Flag the Cruisers at the beginning to make it easier to keep an eye on the triggers.
The mission is flagged completed once you have killed the last

pockets.heading: Part 1 of 5: Misplacing Supplies
lines: Pick up and deliver 25 units of frozen food for your agent.

pockets.heading: Part 2 of 5: Distasteful Matters
lines: Asteroid belt with Pyroxeres and Veldspar

pockets.heading: Part 3 of 5: Poisoning the Well
lines: Deliver 1 unit of food borne toxin.

pockets.heading: Part 4 of 5: Drastic Measures
lines: There is NO faction hit for killing the concord ship.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: All agro on warp in from about 40km
7 units of freed slaves drop from the asteroid colony.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: 6x Cruiser (Scions of the the Superior Gene) in Caracals warp in at 70-80km. Orbits at 17km.

pockets.heading: Multiple Spawns
lines: 4x Tolmak's Zealots (Friendly, kill if you want)
Gate is intially locked. It will unlock when the first wave is cleared.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: 6 Cruiser (Scions of the the Superior Gene) Caracal start firing from 12-14km. Also orbits at 17km.

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: The Scions of the Superior Gene are a minor extremist cult. They believe that the Jovians are gods, and their technology is sacred – too pure to be used by the lowly empires. They have a small fleet of well-armed ships used exclusively to "purify" those who they feel have offended the Jovians.

Tolmak has managed to convert a number of people to his religious message. Some of them are so fanatical they're willing to fight for him. These zealots form a motley fleet of whatever small ships they have been able to buy with donations from their planetside brethren.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Clear Pocket 1, Grab Tolmak from container in pocket 2, wait for completion, and warp out.

info.Blitz: Kill Satori and the Spider Drone. Might as well loot the Storage Silo, too.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2:
lines: Blitz: Kill just the Cruiser, leave the turrets alone.

pockets.heading: Pocket 3:
lines: To kill the forcefield you will need to right click the station battery and choose Add Collidable Structure to Overview.
Blitz: Kill everything but the turrets.

pockets.heading: Pocket 4:
lines: Structures with loot: Guristas Outpost Residential Hub, Narcotics Warehouse, Major Assembly Array

pockets.heading: Pocket 5:
lines: Blitz: Kill Satori and the Spider Drone. Might as well loot the Storage Silo, too.

pockets.heading: Bonus Pocket 6:
lines: Bonus Stage - Acceleration Gate needs a Guristas Palladium Tag (
Structures with loot: Guristas War Installation (drops are not valuable, some people reported about 1-2m, others got as little as 2000 isk, including me - really not worth the time.)

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: Loot: ~2,000,000 (10m or more with good implant drop from Storage Silo)

pockets.heading: Group 2:
lines: There are some med ammo loot from the cargo rig, and Guristas bunker.

pockets.heading: Triggers
lines: Main rule: Webbing frigs like Webifier and Kyoukan
Exception: The last battleship in the next to last wave of pocket 3
The last webifier/Kyoukan in pocket 5 triggers on attack. All others trigger on kill.
Destroying the indicated structures before shooting the triggers will prevent the respawns.
Note: Spawns can be slightly different, such as another type of BC or BS, but the number of each class of NPCs is as reported.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the Ion Field Projection Battery and Moon Harvester (prevents all spawns)
Starbase Hangar does not need to be destroyed.
Starbase Hanger, Moon Harvester, and Ion Field Projection Battery all dropped loot.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the Guristas Medium Refinery, Subspace Frequency Generator and Asteroid Mining Post before any of the triggers.
Structures drop no loot. Asteroid Factory has so much armor there's not much point in shooting it.

pockets.heading: Pocket 4
lines: Amarr batteries doing alpha strike at 1,800 EM dmg so take them first if you aren't tanked against EM.

pockets.heading: Blitz

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Pocket 2 - Destroy the Ion Field Projection Battery and Moon Harvester, then kill all ships
Pocket 3 - Destroy the Guristas Medium Refinery, Subspace Frequency Generator and Asteroid Mining Post, then kill all ships
Pocket 4 - There are 3 weak structures in the whole room, destroy them, then kill all ships
Pocket 5 - Kill all Battleships and Battlecruisers from the first spawn

lines: You need a Guristas Diamond tag to activate the gate and is NOT consumed. The gate remains unlocked for another 10 seconds.
The Guristas Storage Facility in this room has a (very low) chance of dropping a Dread Guristas mod.
Faction drop removed since Trinity 1.2 update

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: The groups will spawn in intervals after you arrive, but it's just a few seconds between each spawn.
The spawns may vary, this is just an example.
Sometimes you may get agro when you warp in, sometimes you don't.
Drones are not attacked by non attacked groups.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: *Mission is completed after killing the group with the Spies; attacking them will sometimes draw aggro, but not always.
*This is an easy mission to do afk in a drone boat if you want bounties instead of blitzing it.

Easiest to blitz with long range BS. Just microjump past the groups and fire at the group with the spies, leave when done.

info.Faction: Rogue Drones, Amarr, Caldari and a few mercenaries
info.Damage Dealt: Amarr: EM, Therm; Caldari: Kin, Therm

pockets.heading: Human Cattle (1 of 5):
lines: 4 sentry drones and 3 missile batteries at the warp-in point. All aggro on warp in. You have to dispatch the drones to open the cargo can (disguised as a habitation module) and pick up the datachip needed for the mission. There are a bunch of other structures none of which dropped loot for me.
Standings: destroying the Caldari missile batteries nets you -2.4% with Caldari State.

pockets.heading: Human Cattle (2 of 5):
lines: Transport the datachip you retrieved to a different station. Straightforward transport mission.

pockets.heading: Human Cattle (3 of 5):
lines: 4 frigates (Caldari Navy) sat at warp-in point. All aggro immediately. After a short time reinforcements arrive - 9 more frigs which appear pretty much at combat range, these are not triggered by the initial force as far as I can see. The residence in the middle drop some trade goods.

pockets.heading: Human Cattle (4 of 5):
lines: Warp to the gate which is locked and 6 Mercenary Fighters appear. One will drop the prisoners you need for the mission. Alternative wave is 5 Fighters and 1 interceptor.
Note: Interceptor will occasionally warp scramble, lost my first cruiser here.  Takes a lot of dps to beat the shields on it, will web within 10k.

pockets.heading: Human Cattle (5 of 5):
lines: Deadspace encounter. For some reason you are dropped some distance from the gate, there are a couple of structures but no ships waiting for you here. Just fly through the gate as normal.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1:
lines: Several groups of ships, mixed force of Amarr and Caldari vessels.
9 frigs/destroyers at 15k range which all aggro on warp in. Approximately ten more frigs/destroyers in two loose groups plus two cruisers separately.
Blitzing this section pocket 1 is possible, turn and run as soon as they are in range and pick them off one by one, takes a little longer but is achievable

pockets.heading: Pocket 3:
lines: As soon as you warp in you complete the mission. There is 1 support frig (scrambles, but you can warp before it locks/scrambles) at about 20k range which aggros shortly after warp in and a whole lot of Amarrian navy vessels at about 130k range. Approach to about 65K and the Armageddons open fire, Turn and run again and you can pick off a few ships. It may take a few runs to complete this blitz section due to the sheer volume of ships. "Not for the faint hearted"
8x Amarr Navy Gamma I Support Frigate
3x Amarr Navy Gamma II Support Frigate
12x Amarr Navy Delta I Support Frigate
5x Amarr Navy Delta II Support Frigate
Drops about 2500 m3 of loot in total, including Large Tachyon Beam Lasers and a chance of some Caldari Navy Fulmination Heavy Assault missiles.

pockets.heading: Hint
lines: This is actually a level 1 mission that points towards an
. Read the pop ups and the item in can that drops.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 3x Mercenary Cruisers (Imperial Paladin hull, Tracking Disruption)
No standings loss. All must be killed to take the gate, which is at 11km from the warp-in.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 2x Frigates (Imperial Matendi, Imperial Forian) - possible negligible standings loss.

pockets.heading: Group 3
lines: 1x Amarr Slaver - negligible (0.02% - ie 0.0002 absolute) standings loss.

pockets.heading: Suggested Blitz
lines: Kill the first pocket with a standard combat ship and then destroy the slaver in the second pocket. Change ships to a T1 industrial (will take something like 30 minutes to train to I, if required). The fitting should include a tractor beam, medium prop mod, and passive/buffer shield tank of large shield extenders and hardeners. Return to the second pocket, tractoring the mission objective can while aligning out, loot it and warp out.

IntakiAndMordusLegion3mo.title: Intaki and Mordus Legion, Level 3

pockets.heading: Summary
lines: All ships come at you as soon as you initiate combat. They will orbit you at varying distances, from 2500m to 20km, and the battleship will try to stay at 30km. They fire a variety of hybrid weapons and all sizes of tracking kinetic missiles. Overall damage taken is high.

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Get close to the Battleship and orbit it so it can't hit you.
If your ship is fast enough to avoid the hybrid turrets, you only need kinetic resistance to survive the missiles.

IntheMidstofDeadspace4p1.title: In the Midst Of Deadspace Part 1, Level 4

info.Web/scramble: Caldari support frigates in the first pocket, amarr support frigates in the second and third
info.Recommended damage dealing: EM/Thermal against Amarr, Kinetic/Thermal against Caldari

pockets.heading: Group 2 (20-27km)
lines: 2x Frigates (2x Caldari Navy Delta II Support Frigate)

pockets.heading: Group 1 (5-32km)
lines: 4x Frigates (4x Amarr Navy Gamma II Support Frigate)
Take them out first they will web you and are the main dmg dealers early on
2x Battleships (1x Amarr Navy Apocalypse, 1x Amarr Navy Armageddon)

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: 5 Visible groups in this stage. Left, Right, Top, Bottom and Back. No aggro on warp in but attack aggro varies, explained below.

pockets.heading: Left Group(68-73)
lines: Attacking left group causes aggro from the back group
4x Frigates (2x Amarr Navy Gamma I Support Frigates, 1x Amarr Navy Delta I Support Frigate, 1x Amarr Navy Delta II Support Frigate)

pockets.heading: Right Group (72-76)
lines: Attacking right group causes aggro from the bottom group
4x Frigates (2x Amarr Navy Delta II Support Frigates, 1x Amarr Navy Delta I Support Frigate, 1x Amarr Navy Gamma I Support Frigate)
2x Battleships (1x Amarr Navy Armageddon, 1x Amarr Navy Apocalypse)

pockets.heading: Top Group (68-74)
lines: 4x Frigates (2x Amarr Navy Gamma I Support Frigates, 2x Amarr Navy Delta II Support Frigates)
2x Battleships (1x Amarr Navy Armageddon, 1x Amarr Navy Apocalypse)

pockets.heading: Bottom Group (68-74)
lines: 3x Frigates (2x Amarr Navy Gamma I Support Frigates, 1x Amarr Navy Gamma II Support Frigate)

pockets.heading: Back Group (85-105)
lines: 3x Frigates (3x Amarr Navy Gamma II Support Frigate)

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Fire on the bottom group to get aggro from 3 groups. Different groups may aggro but the strength is the same.
Amarr Navy Jakars deal a lot of damage and tank very strongly with EM being the lowest resist at 50%.
The Sentries will only fire on you if you get close to them (Around 30-40km).
If you can, kill the frigs while they approach with their MWDs active.

Otherwise consider: All Interceptors orbit between 3000 m and 6300 m, thus Smartbombs can be used to destroy them quickly, but faction 		   ones (e.g. Imperial Navy Large EMP Smartbomb) are required to eliminate all interceptors. Tech 1 large smartbombs do not have enough for this job. 	 Drones work fine but the number of interceptors in the third pocket is rather high.
The mission objective (Amarr Light Marines) is dropped by the last ship of the back group.

The proper way to do this mission safely is to attack the LEFT group first, but this is tricky to do unless you have the range to attack 	 them without approaching - the low group has proximity aggro around 50km (?) which means neither you, your buddies or your drones can get too close

to them. Anyway, attacking the left group agroes the back group as well, and that group contains the mission objective. Start heading away  with as good speed as you can and downing frigates with guns, and drones when the enemy is beyond agro range of the low group. This is best done with a sniper fit (i.e. able to hit for good damage beyond 50 km). You can then attack the other groups if you want to (or not, to "blitz").
When doing the mission in a Tengu, be sure to kill the Frigs first and be sure to have a decent 10mn AB equiped so you can speedtank most of the larger ships.
2.4% loss with the Amarr Empire (for Navy Apoc battleship in the first room and sentry tower in the second) per standing tick (15 minutes). NO loss with the Caldari State.
Part 2 is a simple courier mission.

Amarr Navy Jakars deal a lot of damage and tank very strongly with EM being the lowest resist at 50%.
The Sentries will only fire on you if you get close to them (Around 30-40km).
If you can, kill the frigs while they approach with their MWDs active.
Otherwise consider: All Interceptors orbit between 3000 m and 6300 m, thus Smartbombs can be used to destroy them quickly, but faction 		   ones (e.g. Imperial Navy Large EMP Smartbomb) are required to eliminate all interceptors. Tech 1 large smartbombs do not have enough for this job. 	 Drones work fine but the number of interceptors in the third pocket is rather high.

The mission objective (Amarr Light Marines) is dropped by the last ship of the back group.

The proper way to do this mission safely is to attack the LEFT group first, but this is tricky to do unless you have the range to attack 	 them without approaching - the low group has proximity aggro around 50km (?) which means neither you, your buddies or your drones can get too close
to them. Anyway, attacking the left group agroes the back group as well, and that group contains the mission objective. Start heading away  with as good speed as you can and downing frigates with guns, and drones when the enemy is beyond agro range of the low group. This is best done with a sniper fit (i.e. able to hit for good damage beyond 50 km). You can then attack the other groups if you want to (or not, to "blitz").

When doing the mission in a Tengu, be sure to kill the Frigs first and be sure to have a decent 10mn AB equiped so you can speedtank most of the larger ships.

IntheMidstofDeadspace4p5.title: In the Midst Of Deadspace Part 5, Level 4

info.Damage dealt: EM/Therm from the Khanid Mashtori, Kin/Therm from Caldari
info.Web/scramble: Spider drones, some caldari frigs may scram
info.Recommended damage dealing: Thermal for khanid, Kinetic for caldari

pockets.heading: Left Group (Kill this 1st)
lines: 2x Cruisers (Taibu State Sohei/Tendai (Blackbird/Flameburst missiles/A lot of ECM))

pockets.heading: Middle Group (Kill this 3rd)
lines: Attacking the missile batteries will aggro the whole pocket. When you attack the left group, one of the CM battery will open fire on you, do not engage it!
Don't forget to destroy the manufacturing plant (which drops 100 units of Garbage)!
It's doable with low (40%) EM resist as long as you have a good buffer, the first battleship dies relatively fast.
It is recommended that you bring a salvager to this mission as the tags + salvage actually makes up a large amount of the mission's profit.

If you cannot deal with the ships in the pocket, fit a sniping fit and shoot at the plant from 150 KM+, the ECM should not hit you at all, and if they become an issue simply snipe them first and kite around.
0.02% loss with the Caldari State for for destroying "Caldari State's Khanid Mashtori"
0.02% loss with the Caldari State per standing tick (15 minutes) after that
2.4% loss for destroying the manufacturing planet

pockets.heading: Pockets 1 and 2

Acceleration gate in Pocket 2 is 10km away.

lines: If you can, fit an afterburner as you have to fly about 50 km to get to the gates in the first two pockets.

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: Everything aggros within seconds once you warp in.

Destroy the force field, retrieve the container from the Imperial Armory ( do not destroy it, you have to fly to it - consider using a frigatte with MWD after clearing the Amarr Navy ships and the force field).
The gate permit received as a reward is required for

IntheMidstofDeadspace4p4.title: In The Midst of Deadspace Part 4, Level 4

pockets.heading: Left Group (20-25 km)
lines: -1x Amarr Navy Delta II Support Frigate
-4x Amarr Navy Gamma I Support Frigate

pockets.heading: Right Group (28-34 km)
lines: -1x Amarr Navy Delta II Support Frigate
-4x Amarr Navy Gamma I Support Frigate
Attack the middle group first as it aggroes separately. Aggroing the left or right groups will also aggro the middle group. The middle group will not aggro if you move a minimum of about 40km away.
No loot from structures.  The NPCs drop lots of loot though.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Your agent contacts you and orders you to destroy the Stargate before reinforcements arrive. Reports from a few other pilots suggest that these reinforcements dont spawn even after waiting for 2-3 hours. However be on your guard as the composition of these "reinforcements" are unknown and may be on a random timer.
The stargate has roughly 250.000 HP, so be sure bring maximum damage ammo and drones (the gate has 0 resists).
The first respawn appears relatively quickly and may already be present at warp in:
5x frigates (warp scram) (these were not present when entering with a Battlecruiser, or Command Ship)

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: In pocket 1, the Imperial Guard frigates approach fast making them difficult to snipe from far away. Bring small drones to take out the frigates, which will web you. The Imperial Security Commanders (Amarr Navy Jakar BS) have a significantly stronger tank than the Imperial Security Captains (Amarr Navy Apocalypse BS).

In pocket 2, remember to kill the warp scramblers. If you lose your ship you cannot get back to loot it (unless you buy another Permit on contract). Damage is not overwhelming if you got an adequate tank (doable in passive tanked Drake)
Approx 1hr after I entered the pocket (just as I was finishing looting it), 5x Imperial Avengers and 1x Imperial Equalizer respawned in the pocket.
Then two imperial templar torahs appeared about 18 minutes into the mission.
I believe I have seen the initial rats before on this mission but this was definitely the first time I ever saw the torahs come in during the mission.

Teiresias adds: There may be some variation in the mission drones here, rather than Imperial Dominator, i got Imperial Ultara. (Armageddon NPC) For the 18 minute respawn there are two Imperial Templar Ultara (not Torah)
Use EM Torps. The BS's have very strong tanks. Recommend EM Drones if only for the Divine Imperial Equalizers.

The stargate took about half as many torps to kill as the guide said (I had fired 186 when it blew, so probably 180 to kill it. Each torp did 558 damage, so that's about 100k HP + whatever my drones did, I estimate 150k hp absolute maximum.
2.4% loss with the Amarr Empire per standing tick (15 minutes).

lines: Last kill of far group drops cargo cannister holding the prisoners needed for mission completion.
Rogue Pirates deal heavy EM missile damage

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Recommended ship types: Battlecruiser, Faction Cruiser, Cruiser, Assault Ship

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Three groups at initial warp in, no aggro. All groups aggro independently.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Habitat holds 3x Drazin Keycard - needed to activate gate to second stage. There are three incase you would need to warp out and back : each gate activation consumes one keycard.

pockets.heading: Asteroids
lines: There are no more asteroids for mining.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: This stage varied quite a bit on the 2 occasions I tried. The Zerak Cheryn version is at 10-20k on warp in & in his Gallente cruiser can be extremely harsh at close range and would be best taken out first if you can tank the two webbing frigates. The Kuran 'Scarface' Lonan version (Caldari based) is at 40-50k on warp in & and is easy to tank.

pockets.heading: Single Group
lines: 1x Cruiser (Drazin Jaruk/Korrani Salemo (MOA-web)/Kuran 'Scarface' Lonan/Lynk (web)/Zerak Cheryn (ewar invulnerable) (web))
Get prisoners from dropped cargo container.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Habitation modules drop miscel trade goods
Recommended ship types: Battlecruiser, Faction Cruiser, Cruiser

pockets.heading: Single Group @60-65km
lines: Attacking the Darkonnen Envoy after talking to him does not affect mission. May drop a +4 implant.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: 4 groups at warp in, no instant aggro.
Attack in any order - all groups aggro'd independently.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Destroy middle bottom group (transports) drops cargo container containing 5 prisoners. Mission Completes.
Recommended ship types: Battlecruiser, Faction Cruiser, Cruiser, Assault Ship

pockets.heading: Structures that drop loot:
lines: Extras: NOS by Corpior Converter and/or Corpum Priest
Recommended ship types: Battlecruiser, Faction Cruiser, Cruiser

pockets.heading: Single Stage
lines: Warp in, 4 groups. Attack in any order - all groups aggro independently.

pockets.heading: Group 4 @60-70km
lines: 3x Cruiser (Corpum Arch Sage/Arch Priest) - one of these drops the prisoners & killing completes the mission.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: once you've dealt with the initial 2 Cruisers you could just go for the Arch Sage group.
Extras: NOS (Corpum Priest/Corpum Sage/Corpus Harbinger/Corpus Archbishop), Weapon Disruption (Corpii Seeker/Corpii Collector)
Recommended ship types: Battlecruiser, HAC, Faction Cruiser

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Warp in, 5 groups. Once dealing with the instant aggro from group 1 the remaining groups are at extreme range. All ships may aggro on attacking any one ship. Ships may also switch target to aggro drones if drones attack the sentries. The Tower Sentries are proximity activated and will aggro as soon as you get within 80km, so going for one of the middle ones will possibly put you in range of 2 others. Tower Sentries range is limited to 80km.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Note: the large numbers of structures present can cause this stage to lag.

pockets.heading: Group 1 (middle-left) @10-15km - Initial aggro at warp in.
Structures
lines: Some Storage Facilities drop misc trade goods & 50 Metal Scraps
Some Habitation Modules drop misc trade goods of different kinds
Some Cargo Rigs drop ammo types

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: Warp in, 3 groups. Attack in any order - all groups aggro independently.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Dark Blood Chapel drops 2/3 hardwire implants.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: The ship named "Harbinger" may drop a +3 Implant.

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: Asteroid Factory no loot / extremely strong armour
Attacking the Asteroid Factory will aggro the Maru Envoy

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Groups aggro one at a time if you shoot at them one at a time

pockets.heading: Asteroids
lines: 5 Prisoners will be in the last ship destroyed

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Groups aggro one at a time if you shoot at them one at a time

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Storage Facility may drop various commodities

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Groups aggro one at a time if you shoot at them one at a time

pockets.heading: Group 4
lines: last ship destroyed drop the 5 prisoners

pockets.heading: Asteroids
lines: Completed with: T2 General-Purpose Fit Nighthawk DR: Easy if you blitz it. Hard if you kill everything. (Ixtelle)

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: Popping the target structure agros everything. Taking out the ship groups one by one before you target the structure is probably easier.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the target structure and warp. It pops very easily.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Structure next to target may drop  a Basic, +3 implant

info.Blitz: kill group 3, warp out.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Komni Envoy (BS, Rattlesnake). Does not trigger anything. Also EW invulnerable. Might drop an implant.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Blitz: skip first pocket, kill group 2 in Pocket 2, loot can, leave.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Group 4 aggroes when Group 3 is engaged.

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: Group 2-4 will not aggro until attacked, unless you attack the control tower -- then they ALL aggro immediately.
After you warp out against group 3 or 4, the remaining ships will return to their start position and wait. Re-entering the room will not cause them to aggro again unless attacked.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: (Tag the can, finish the mission, and then warp back to the can to pick up an implant.)
- Minor: Ship names for the lists.

info.Blitz: destroy the manufacturing outpost only

pockets.heading: Reinforcement 1
lines: Blitz: destroy the industrials from group 1

pockets.heading: Warp in (11km)
lines: Tip: dont forget the workers from the industrial

pockets.heading: Warp in
lines: Blitz: destroy the manufacturing outpost only

pockets.heading: Group #2 at 20KM
lines: Appear as backup 3 minutes after aggression

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy industrials, which have quite a bit of hp, to complete the mission.
No Faction standing loss for killing the industrial ships.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Space type: Deadspace (mwd does not work)

pockets.heading: Group #2 at 10KM
lines: Appear as backup 4 minutes after aggression

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy industrial, which has quite a bit of hp, collect workers (30m3) from container to complete the mission.
No Faction standing loss for killing the industrial ships.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Space type: Deadspace (mwd does not work)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Mission complete with just blowing up the Manufacturing Outpost (Large Collidable Structure).
Faction standing loss of -2.4% for destroying (Gallente Federation's Caldari Deadspace Refining Outpost)

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Manufacturing Outpost - Mission objective, Dropped nothing
Workers Quarters and Administration - Dropped nothing

info.Damage dealt: Kin/Therm for pocket 1-3 and 5. All kinds for pocket 4

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: No Aggro at warp-in. Drones doesn't get aggro. Easy to pick off the groups.

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: No aggro at warp in. Easy to pick off group by group. Drones doesn't get aggro.

pockets.heading: Group 3
lines: Warps in when you have killed group 2

pockets.heading: Pocket 4
lines: For shield tankers, take out the Mercenary Commanders unless you wield an em-hardener. For armor tankers, take out the wingmen, unless you wield an exp-hardener. Rest is kin/therm dmg.
Aggro from 4 mercenary overlords. Drones will aggro the entire pocket.
Gang members that fire on anything including the 4 overlords will get aggro from the rest, if not aggroed.

pockets.heading: Tip: you can afterburn away from the group and then kill the 4 bs first then fly in and kill the rest.
Group 1
lines: Can is dropped by the Behemoth
First pocket has veldspar, second pocket has veld + scor. 3rd pocket veldspar, 4th pocket omber + veld

pockets.heading: 1st spawn after firing the first shot
3rd spawn (after killing the 2nd group)
lines: Ships MIGHT have triggers, but I'm not sure. I usually go from frigates to BS's. New spawns appeared when I cleared them. :)
Also, 3 Storage silos, but I forgot to destroy them so not sure if there's any loot inside.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Amarr owned starbase structures [POS structures] in the area. Suggest NOT attacking them as you're in Amarr space.
I left the Amarr Colonel's insignia in space, not wanting to provoke their wrath on my cruiser.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill Geebel's cruiser and tank the rest. Grab him and warp out. Likely easy to do in a Drake ... add a tractor beam to speed up.

pockets.heading: Lasers Softly Beaming, Level 2
lines: Last edited by DesmontMcCallock Sat, 14 Jul 2012 05:48 UTC

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: You start out with just Geeral Tash Murkon, the target. When he's halfway dead, the second group comes to the rescue.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: You only have to destroy Geeral's ship and bring him in to fullfill the mission.

LiberateTheMiners5am.title: Liberate the Miners, Level 5

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: All groups aggro within 10 seconds of warp-in

pockets.heading: Tower Sentries
lines: 2 x Amarr Energy Neutralizer Sentry IIIs (Destroying Neutralizers will spawn replacements 3 times, after which there will spawn 6 eWar frigates)

pockets.heading: Group 1 – Broken Metallic Crystal Asteroid
lines: 4 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Martyr) orbits at 49k

pockets.heading: Group 2 – Amarr Control Tower
lines: 2 x Frigates (Divine Imperial Napat) (separate) orbits at 10k,
4 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Ultara) orbits at 49k,

pockets.heading: Group 3 – Cloven Grey Asteroid
lines: 4 x Battleships (Imperial Martyr*/Imperial Templar Torah) orbits at 17-44k,

pockets.heading: - Spawn 1
lines: 4 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Dominator/Martyr) orbits at 17-49k

pockets.heading: - Spawn 2
lines: 4 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Dominator/Martyr ) orbits at 17-49k,

pockets.heading: - Spawn 3
lines: 4 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Dominator/Martyr) orbits at 17-49k,

pockets.heading: - Spawn 4
lines: 2 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Judgment) orbits at 49k

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Use a Passive Tank and save time by not having to destroy Energy Neutralizer Sentries which re-spawn themselves 3 times, and then spawn frigates
Or plan a capacitor that receives an additional 80 units/s
Maximum damage dealing of initial groups are 1806 hp/s (EM 58%, Therm 42%)
Mission flagged complete when all ships are destroyed

LeftHook3ga.title: The Left Hook, Level 3

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Overview: Single pocket with 1 group and 2 spawns.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: Attacking the Gallente Tactical Support Center triggers spawn 1.

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: Damaging the armor of the Gallente Tactical Support Center triggers spawn 2

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: Mission is complete when Gallente Tactical Support Center is destroyed.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the Gallente Tactical Support Center, warp out.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Attacking the Tactical Support Center triggers the second and third spawns, destroy each new spawn before re-targeting it.
This mission can also be run with a sniper fit Manticore. Then just orbit and shoot the Tactical Support Center at max range (e.g. 65km) and speed tank all NPCs.

LeftHook3ga.tips:
Attacking the Tactical Support Center triggers the second and third spawns, destroy each new spawn before re-targeting it.
This mission can also be run with a sniper fit Manticore. Then just orbit and shoot the Tactical Support Center at max range (e.g. 65km) and speed tank all NPCs.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Upon warp-in, no NPCs.  Agent will message you telling you to attack the outpost.
Note:  All hostiles sensor-dampen, but not very often.  All hostiles aggro soon after spawn and may attack drones.

pockets.heading: Wave 1 (Shortly after attacking control tower):
lines: 1x Gallente Lieutenant (Elite Federation Navis) spawns at 20 km

pockets.heading: Wave 5 (On destruction of Waves 1-4):
lines: 7x Federation Cruisers (3x Federation Hastatus, 3x Federation Nauclarius, 1x Federation Misthios)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Killing only the Gallente Lieutenant shows the mission as completing.

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Blowing up the Starbase Control Tower is tougher than normal, but results in the entire outpost exploding building by building in a great fireball.

pockets.heading: Blitz: Kill Gallente Federation Control Tower (and Gallente Lieutenant, mission was completed with only the Control Tower down for me)
lines: Some or all of the fighters need to be killed also.

pockets.heading: Initial Spawn
lines: 2x Federation Fighter (show up as frigates but they're the equivalent of carrier fighters.  these spawn without attacking anything.)
Typical hits with 87% resists are 50-100.  One LAR2, one DC2, and 2x each T2 hardeners can tank about 8 of these things.

pockets.heading: Spawns triggered by shooting the control tower
lines: These are not in order; they spawn rapidly, a few at a time.
9x Elite Frigates (3x elite fed manica, 2x elite fed matara, 3x elite fed phalarica, 1x elite fed libertus) (scramble, web)
9x Battlecruisers (3x fed prak auxilia, 6x fed prak arx) (damps)
2x HAC (elite fed navis, elite fed mentes) (damps?)
5x BS (2x fed prak phanix, 2x fed prak hexeris, 1x fed prak praeses)

pockets.heading: Spawn Triggered by shooting the Lieutenant

LiberateTheMiners5ca.title: Liberate the Miners, Level 5

info.Web/Scramble: Stasis Towers, All Frigates 25-50% chances of Web and/or Scramble

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: All groups aggro within 10 seconds of warp-in

pockets.heading: Tower Sentries
lines: 2 x Caldari Energy Neutralizer Sentry IIIs (Destroying Neutralizers will spawn replacements 3 times, after which there will spawn 6 jamming frigates)

pockets.heading: Group 1 – Broken Metallic Crystal Asteroid
lines: 4 x Battleships (State Shukuro Shogun) orbits at 33k

pockets.heading: Group 2 – Caldari Control Tower
lines: 4 x Frigates (Taibu State Nagasa/Shinai) orbits at 3k,
2 x Frigates (Taibu State Tachi) (separate) orbits at 10k,
4 x Battleships (State Shukuro Daijo/Bishamon) orbits at 33k,

pockets.heading: Group 3 – Cloven Grey Asteroid
lines: 4 x Battleships (State Shukuro Taisho/Tenno*) orbits at 50k/29k,

pockets.heading: - Spawn 1
lines: 4 x Battleships (State Shukuro Shogun/Bishamon) orbits at 33k

pockets.heading: - Spawn 3
lines: 4 x Battleships (State Shukuro Bishamon/Shogun) orbits at 33k,

pockets.heading: - Spawn 4
lines: 2 x Battleships (State Shukuro Nagashin) orbits at 68k

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Consider FoF missiles and setting drones to “Aggressive” for when you are unable to target because of Jammers
Use a Passive Tank and save time by not having to destroy Energy Neutralizer Sentries which re-spawn themselves 3 times, and then spawn frigates
Or plan a capacitor that receives an additional 80 units/s
Maximum damage dealing of initial groups are 1,740 hp/s (Kin: 84%, Therm: 16%)
Final Nagashins quickly retreat to 68k orbits so try to be in close position before they spawn
Mission flagged complete when all ships are destroyed

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: You arrive in a toxic cloud similar to Recon 3/3. It

do damage. A starbase control tower is the only entity in the cloud. You will receive instructions from your agent in local to attack the tower. Doing so, mission objective (Gallente Lieutenant) spawns at tower. His wingmen will spawn shortly after.

LocationLocation5am.title: Location, Location, Level 5

pockets.heading: Initial Group
lines: Contact’s ship is present at Warp-In at 15km away.  But 20 seconds later you are notified in Local that, Oh sh--, “It’s a Trap!”
The Contact's ship vanishes and instead an Amarr Fleet uncloaks near the same spot. Ships are 25-40km to the right of Warp-In
3 x Frigates (Divine Imperial Bahir) orbits at 10km,
3 x Cruisers (Divine Imperial Ambrose/Basil) orbits at 7-19km,
12 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Dominator*/Torah/Martyr^^) orbits of 17-49km,
3 x Amarr Energy Neutralizer Sentry IIIs

pockets.heading: - Spawn 1
lines: 3 x Frigates (Divine Imperial Imran) orbits at 4km,

pockets.heading: - Spawn 2
lines: 2 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Dominator/Martyr) orbits at 17-49km

pockets.heading: - Spawn 3
lines: 3 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Martyr) orbits at 49km

pockets.heading: Each Missile Battery is a Trigger
lines: Triggered ships spawn at the Warp-In Beacon when the following Batteries are destroyed

pockets.heading: Battery 1 (Top) - Spawns:
lines: 5 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Ultara/Dominator) orbits of 17-49km

pockets.heading: Battery 2 (Left) - Spawns:
lines: 3 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Judgment) orbits at 49km,
6 x Battlecruisers (Imperial Templar Phalanx) orbits at 22km, Trigger
5 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Judgment) orbits at 49km Objective Complete

pockets.heading: Battery 3 (Middle) - Spawns:
lines: 3 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Diviner) orbits at 21km,

pockets.heading: Battery 4 (Right) - Spawns:
lines: 5 x Battlecruisers (Imperial Champion/Templar Justicar) orbits at 9-22km

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Use a Passive Tank or plan a capacitor that receives an additional 120 units/s
Maximum damage dealing of initial group is 1814 hp/s (EM 58%, Therm 42%)
Do not shoot Missile Batteries first (unless you can tank over 4000 hp/s...)
Mission totals 33 Battleships, 16 Battlecruisers, 3 Cruisers, 6 Frigates
Mission flagged complete when all "Battery 2 (Left)" spawns are destroyed

Part 2 of 5
HardWay5ca The Hard Way (2 of 5)

pockets.heading: First Pocket
lines: At warp-in the acceleration gate is 30 km away. When approaching the gate the enemies show up at 40+ km (7 frigates: 5 Coreli Scout and 2 Coreli Initiate) and start aggro immediately.
The gate can only be used by T1 frigates/destroyers/cruisers.

pockets.heading: Second Pocket
lines: In the second room the enemies are waiting at around 20 km and start aggro (2 frigates: 2 Coreli Agents and 2 destroyers: Corelior Soldier, Corelior Trooper).
The mission target is in the container guarded by the enemies.
There are no structures in the mission.
The second room carries like 350k units each of Pyroxeres, Scordite and Veldspar.

pockets.heading: Lost That Bet (1 of 5)
lines: Cargo: one unit of Dolls (specific item) (1.0 m3)

pockets.heading: Lost That Bet (2 of 5)
lines: Pickup: one unit of Dolls (repackaged) (1.0 m3)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Mercenary Rookie shows up and disappears - keep waiting
Mercenary Rookie appears again, drops the dolls and disappears.

pockets.heading: Lost That Bet (3 of 5)
lines: Pickup: four units of Dolls (repackaged) (4.0 m3)

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: One "Cargo Container - Dolls", about 30km away. Go figure.

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: Once more. Did I mention you want to bring an afterburner?

pockets.heading: Pocket 4
lines: Mission completion trigger: distance to container.

pockets.heading: Lost That Bet (4 of 5)
lines: Pickup: one unit of Dolls (repackaged) (1.0 m3)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: 25 Veldspar Asteroids (1 unit of Veldspar each).
Removal of all asteroids triggers container spawn and mission completion.
Bring a ship with lots of max targets. LOTS.

pockets.heading: Lost That Bet (5 of 5)
lines: Pickup: one unit of Corpse of Enlil Bel (1.0 m3)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: 1x Named Frigate (Mercenary Elite Fighter) -- you kill this.
It throws Flameburst [therm] light missiles, but slowly.  Two semi-decent weapons will be enough.

pockets.heading: Mineable Asteroid info
lines: Asteroids vary from 30.000 to 90.000 Units each.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Take the Broken Mining Equipment from the Parts Container, warp out.
Note: You may take up to 8,000 damage on a Blitz run with low resistances.
Done with 219 DPS tank (Rogue Drones specific).

MassDrivers5am.title: Mass Drivers, Level 5

pockets.heading: Gate Pocket
lines: Upon Warp-In you find yourself surrounded by eight gates whose relative positions form the shape of a cube around your ship.  Each gate takes you into the same pocket, but each one leaves you at different position in relation to the centralized NPC targets.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: The landing sites are in the same configuration as the original gates and form a cube around the NPC targets.

pockets.heading: Initial Group
lines: 4 x Cruisers (Divine Imperial Justicar/Champion) orbits at 14k/32k
3 x Battlecruisers (Imperial Templar Phalanx) orbits at 22k
2 x Amarr Energy Neutralizer Sentry II
1 x Amarr Energy Neutralizer Sentry III

pockets.heading: Spawn 1a
lines: 3 x Battlecruisers (Imperial Templar Seer) orbits at 22k,

pockets.heading: Spawn 1b
lines: 4 x Battlecruisers (Imperial Templar Justicar) orbits at 10k,

pockets.heading: Spawn 1c
lines: 4 x Battlecruisers (Imperial Champion/Imperial Templar Justicar) orbits at 22k/10k

pockets.heading: Spawn 2a
lines: 5 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Dominator/Ultara) orbits at 17k/49k,

pockets.heading: Spawn 2b
lines: 5 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Torah/Ultara) orbits at 44k/49k

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Use a Passive Tank or plan a capacitor that receives an extra 80 units/sec
Neutralizer Sentries re-target if you reach 100km but rarely hit past that
Lower gates land you slightly farther from the Initial Group’s center than the upper gates
Maximum damage dealing of all ships in initial group 2356 hp/s (EM: 57%, TH: 43%)

lines: 1x Cruiser named "Contact" (Corelum Chief Spy/Corelum Chief Scout)

pockets.heading: Warp in
lines: Upon Warp-In you find yourself surrounded by eight gates whose relative positions form the shape of a cube around your ship. Each gate takes you into the same pocket, but each one leaves you at different position in relation to the centralized NPC targets.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: The landing sites are in the same configuration as the original gates and form a cube around the NPC targets.
9 x Battleships (Federation Praktor Polemo/Dionia*/Hyperion/Panix^) *NOS and Sensor Dampening, ^

pockets.heading: Group:
lines: The stash might drop a +3 implant.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Warp in is very near the Acceleration Gate (3500m)
Auto aggro from Group 1 at warp-in (53 km).
Group 2 has a proximity aggro of 25km.
Deploying drones to attack Group 1 will aggro Group 2.

pockets.heading: Group 2: Control Tower (40-45km)
lines: Group 1 does not always aggro, if it doesn't shooting group 1 will also aggro group 2.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Warp in is very near the Acceleration Gate (3500m)
Auto aggro from Group 1 at warp-in.
Deploying drones to attack Group 1 will aggro the entire pocket.

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: Auto aggro from Group 1. Group 3 will aggro after several seconds.
Group 2 (located in the middle) remains neutral.
Any drones attacking Group 3 will be targeted and attacked by Group 2.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Mission is flagged completed after you have eliminated all ships from Group 3.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Eliminate all ships from Group 3 in pocket 3. Warp out.

pockets.heading: NOTES
lines: When first posted, there were questions about whether an Angel Cartel Gistum Defeater was outside of the gate for an anti-Amarr mission.  If anyone else getting this mission could confirm it that would be useful.

info.Video: Ishtar, Nightmare, Machariel, Dominix, Raven (T2 fit)

pockets.heading: 2nd Pocket
lines: Attacking the 1st group will aggro the 2nd group.

pockets.heading: 3rd Pocket
lines: Group 2 has a proximity aggro of ~80km.

pockets.heading: 1st Group (53- 57km)
lines: 4- 6x Frigate (Coreli Guardian Spy/ Guardian Agent/ Defender/ Protector)

pockets.heading: 4th Pocket
lines: Attacking the left group draws aggro from the middle group. Both the left and the middle group give proximity aggro at 75 km.

pockets.heading: Left Group (90- 109km)
lines: 2x Frigate (Coreli Guardian Agent/ Spy/ Scout/ Initiate)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: The gate to the 1st pocket is not locked. Warp right in.
In the final pocket kill the left group with the Battleships (100km), done.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: In the 2nd pocket, approach and aggro the 2nd group so that they close in while you shoot the 1st group.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 3x Elite Frigate (Chief Republic Baldur / Ofeg / Isak)

MassiveAttack4sa.title: Massive Attack, Level 4

info.Space type: Deadspace with Gates (MWD works as of March 6, 2010)
info.Recommended ship classes: T2/T3 Cruiser, Battlecruiser; Battleship if you have low skills & can't use T2

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Group 2 has a proximity aggro of 25km.
Deploying drones to attack Group 1 will aggro Group 2.

pockets.heading: Group 2: Control Tower (40-45km)
lines: Group 1 does not always aggro. If it doesn't, engaging group 1 will aggro group 2, but group 2 can be safely engaged without aggroing group 1.
