pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Mission is flagged completed after you have eliminated all ships from Group 3.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: All warp gates are locked. Eliminate all groups from pocket 1 & 2.
Eliminate all ships from Group 3 in pocket 3. Warp out.

pockets.heading: Mining
lines: Pocket 3 has 35 Veldspar roids = 1468414 Units but they are far away

MassiveAttack4sa.tips: Mission is flagged completed after you have eliminated all ships from Group 3.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy Ore Processing Plant, Warp out.

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: The mission objective Ore processing station drops 5 mining crystals, some ores and some cap charges.

pockets.heading: Initial Group (auto-aggro)
lines: After destroying all ships, the waves start. This is indicated by a message about a Cynofield opening.
The Cynosural field opens about 25 km from the initial warp in point.

pockets.heading: Wave 1 (auto-aggro)
lines: After destroying all ships, the next group spawns.

pockets.heading: Wave 2 (auto-aggro)
lines: After destroying all ships, the final group appears.

pockets.heading: Wave 3 (auto-aggro)
lines: After having killed all ships you receive the following message:
The automated base defenses register that combat has ceased, uncloaking a nearby cache of valuables.
You'll find a now revealed Bunker labelled "Cloaked Cache" which contains scrap metal and the mission's objective (Salvaged Electronics).

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Destroyed Bunkers may drop T1 module(s) and scrap metals.
The two Battlestations have a lot of hitpoints.
Battlestations dropped no loot.  (2 runs personaly, can someone verify)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: No Blitz as all the ships have to be killed in order for the cloaked cache to be revealed.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: You warp-in directly to beacon. You can´t warp to optimal range and also no bookmarks possible.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: You will find a single Hulk called Illegal Miner(
). Destroying it triggers a series of spawns.
Miner will appear about 30km away from warp-in point.

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: 3x Battleship (Suicide Squad)- Spawn 50km away from warp-in point and will auto target you after a few seconds
Example of Spawn: 3 x Corpus Patriarch (1,162,500.00 isk ea.)

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: 4x Battleships (Suicide Squad).  Spawn at 84km from warp-in point, move to range at 48-50km
Example of Spawn: 4 x Corpus Pope (1,218,750.00 isk ea.) (Very low damage until within 50km)

pockets.heading: Spawn 3
lines: 4x Battleships (Suicide Squad) Spawn 80km from warp-in point then slowly move to range.
Last killed BS triggers mission completed.
Example of Spawn: 4 x Corpus Pope (1,218,750.00 isk ea.) (Very low damage until within 50km)

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: No blitz, no structures, no mineable asteroids

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Note: They spawn once you get close to the Private Hangar.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Private Hangar drops misc trade goods

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Bypass the first pocket and just run to the 2nd acceleration gate, kill the frigate for the loot
Mission: Encounter: retreive the data chip

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: No blitz, need to kill all the ships, last one drops the container
Mission type: Encounter: kill all the rebels

pockets.heading: Reinforcement Spawn (40km)
lines: 4 Frigates (Republic Tribal Gleede x2, Republic Kvarm x2)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Killing the Minmatar Contact completes the mission

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: After warp-in, only three towers, groups spawn every few seconds

pockets.heading: Group 6
lines: attacking the towers aggros entire pocket

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy "Powerful EM Forcefield", mash lesser drone hive, scoop contents.

Choice of aggro: shoot the shield before the last group spawns, and you will only have aggro from group 2 until the shield dies (then groups 6+7 join in); alternatively, wait until after the last group spawned before shooting the shield for full stage aggro and safe drone usage.

pockets.heading: Note
lines: To destroy the "Powerful EM Forcefield", add Entity --> Large Collidable Structure to your overview.  Target lock the shield, and open fire.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Lesser Drone Hive contains objective and may also contain 1 alloy

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: No spawn on entry, can warp at range.
Spawn is triggered by approaching the Acceleration Gate (13km) or the Damaged Gallente Passenger Liner (22km)

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Auto aggro at warp-in by Groups 1 and 2.
The Damaged Gallente Passenger Liner is 34km from the warp in beacon but does
You must destroy all ships in this pocket and loot a Cargo Container that is dropped when the last ship is destroyed.

pockets.heading: Group 2: (48km)
lines: On killing last battleship of Groups 1 and 2.

pockets.heading: Spawn: (48km)
lines: Aggro after firing at Group 3 (or hitting them with a Target Painter)

pockets.heading: Spawn: (45km)
lines: Approaching within 15km of the Damaged Gallente Passenger Liner or killing the last ship in Group 4.

pockets.heading: Spawn: (45km)
lines: Killing the last ship in Group 5 drops a Cargo Container at the Damaged Gallente Passenger Liner. This contains 1 x Survivor which is the mission objective.

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: Triggering Groups 3 and 4 of Pocket 2 may cause an uncomfortable amount of DPS heading your way. If you had difficulty tanking the first 2 groups of that pocket you might want to call a friend.
0.02% with Caldari State if you remain in the site. Warp out and return will incur another 0.02%.

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: This group spawns once last ship in group 1 is destroyed.
It appears at the same location as the Industrials.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Tank the room and destroy the four Industrials.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Mission is complete once four industrials are destroyed.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket:
lines: All enemies are designated as "Escort" ships, scanning or showing info reveals their type.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 1x Frigate (Caldari Navy Officer) (uses EM heavy missiles)

pockets.heading: Group 3
lines: 2x Elite Frigates (Caldari Navy Delta II Support) (web)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: No blitz at all, you have to destroy all Caldari Military Transports to get green "mission objective complete" indicator

pockets.heading: Standing Loss
lines: This penalty was incurred for destroying Caldari State's Caldari Navy Officer
The Missing Reporters - Bad Timing (2 of 3)
Damage dealt: All Kinds, Kin Heavy Missiles

pockets.heading: Single Pocket:
lines: 6 groups, each guarding a structure, one of the structures is the target. (Designated as "Local Prison")
Shooting Local Prison will aggro everything. Maneuvering and shooting one group will aggro only that group.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Do not attack any ships!  Just Destroy the "Local Prison" structure as quickly as possible then warp away.  During your assault on the prison, everything will start shooting at you.  For this reason it is safest to pre-align then insta-warp when it detonates.  Wait a minute then warp back to the mission.  This time there should be zero aggro so you can go and pick up the contents of the dropped storage containers at your leisure, then turn in the mission.

If you're in a battlecruiser, you can safely approach it to 0m and then attack it. You should have way enough tank to loot the can and warp out in time, on my attempt I warped out with ~85% shield left.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Habitation Module drops random trade goods.
The Missing Reporters - Slavers Beware (3 of 3)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Just kill the slave traders and take the can.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill Lieutenants only. Can complete remotely.

(It's possible to just take out one(*) to complete the mission. Just keep the conversation up with the agent, look for the green check mark. When that comes up, just remotely complete the mission. (At which point, it doesn't matter if the drone blows up.)
(*) : Must be one Lieutenant from the final spawn.

pockets.heading: Rewards and Bonus
lines: Bonus: 254,000 ISK if you get it done within 5 hours and 59 minutes.

MordusFolly4Mordus.title: Mordus Folly, Level 4

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: No hostiles on the initial acceleration gate.
The last Mordus ship drops the mission objective, it's recommended to leave one frigate until the end so picking up takes no time.
Every new wave aggros you and your drones, so keep them safe.

pockets.heading: Wave 1 (50km, autoaggro)
lines: Does not drop anything and killing it is not required to complete mission
Killing the last one triggers wave 3
1x Battleship (Mordus Fleet Commander) - 5mil bounty & random implant

pockets.heading: Wave 2
lines: (50km, triggered by killing the cruisers in wave 1)

pockets.heading: Wave 3
lines: (58km, triggered by killing the group of 3 battleships in wave 1)
Killing the last one triggers wave 4

pockets.heading: Wave 4
lines: (50km, triggered by killing the group of 2 battleships in wave 3)

pockets.heading: Mineable Asteroids
lines: Mission contains a field of about 40 Veldspar asteroids with a diameter of around 40 km.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Five Abandoned Containers with t1 loot (usually 1 item per container). Tractor beam doesn't work on them.

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: Mission type: Encounter (Destroy the Caldari Supply Depot)
Recommended ships: Tengu, Maelstrom, Raven, Rattlesnake, Dominix/DNI

pockets.heading: Wave 1 (50km)
lines: 1x Taibu State Tachi Frigate (ECM) - will aggro cruisers when fired on
3x State Shukuro Bajo Battlecruisers - can be aggroed alone
4x State Shukuro Daijo BS - orbits at 35km

pockets.heading: Wave 1
lines: Triggered (if Wave 1 is alive and) the supply depot has lost about 25% armor.

pockets.heading: Wave 2a
lines: 3x Cruisers  - will cause BS aggro when fired upon

pockets.heading: Wave 2b
lines: Timed trigger after the three cruisers before (?)

pockets.heading: Wave 4
lines: Nagashins move relatively slowly so if you move closer to their spawn point you can approach them after they spawn and destroy them before they get out of range.

Alternative to Wave 3 ( If you destroy the depot first then the initial Bishamons will not cause Wave 3 as listed, instead the last Dajo triggered a 4 Bishamon spawn and the regular Wave 4 triggered by the last Bishamon.
Mission completes when supply depot is destroyed.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Caldari Supply Depot - 255,000 hp, mission completion trigger.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Heavy use of missiles. Using defender missiles can help mitigate some of the damage.
Destroying the supply depot incurs no standing penalty.

If you want to blitz (i.e. destroy the supply depot without attacking any ships to avoid losing Caldari standings), you will need to permatank around 850-900 dps of 75% Kin/25% Therm damage because the whole initial group will attack you. If your ship has low sensor strength (e.g. Marauders, Command Ships, T3s), you will need to bring high-damage drones (Vespa 2 or Hammerhead 2), because the ECM cruisers can keep you jammed much of the time.

Droneboat with Sentries works great, just get Aggro and let the Sentries (Bouncer II or Warden II) attack the Depot, orbit your own Sentries to reduce Missile/Torp-Damage and just ignore the NPCs and the jamming. If your tank holds (no problem with anti Kin/Therm-Setup), you don't have to care for the ECM and do not get a standing hit to Caldari State.
Tags to be looted (can vary slightly):
0.02% from Caldari State per standing tick
No loss for destroying the depot!

MordusFolly4Mordus.tips:

Destroying the supply depot incurs no standing penalty.
If you want to blitz (i.e. destroy the supply depot without attacking any ships to avoid losing Caldari standings), you will need to permatank around 850-900 dps of 75% Kin/25% Therm damage because the whole initial group will attack you. If your ship has low sensor strength (e.g. Marauders, Command Ships, T3s), you will need to bring high-damage drones (Vespa 2 or Hammerhead 2), because the ECM cruisers can keep you jammed much of the time.
Droneboat with Sentries works great, just get Aggro and let the Sentries (Bouncer II or Warden II) attack the Depot, orbit your own Sentries to reduce Missile/Torp-Damage and just ignore the NPCs and the jamming. If your tank holds (no problem with anti Kin/Therm-Setup), you don't have to care for the ECM and do not get a standing hit to Caldari State.

Tags to be looted (can vary slightly):








Standing loss:

pockets.heading: Entry
lines: Ships have short range and No Web/Scramble.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines:
Take out Group 2

Video

http://youtu.be/b1OQlidtHp8
I blitz it in the video by taking out the cruiser.

Asteroids

16  Veldspar Rocks. Total of 119,424 m3 

CategoryMissions
CategoryLevel2

MordusHeadhunters5.title: The Mordus Headhunters, Level 5

info.Web/Scramble: Mordus Bounty Hunters – Chances: (90% Web, 10% Scramble)

pockets.heading: First Pocket
lines: Gate restricted to T2 Battleship sized hulls and below

pockets.heading: Initial Group
lines: No Aggro until your first shot.  Frigates can be Aggro'ed separately.  Shooting any Battleship will cause a spawn.
(3 x Mordus Bounty Hunter) orbits at 8k, Web/Scramble
(2 x Mordus Mammoth) orbits at 50k, Trigger 1a when shot
(3 x Mordus Gigamar) orbits at 45k, Trigger 2 when shot

pockets.heading: Spawn 1a
lines: Upon Shooting a Mammoth, there spawns above the Station Ruins:
3 x Frigates (Mordus Bounty Hunter) orbits at 8k

pockets.heading: Spawn 1b
lines: Upon destruction of the final cruiser, there spawns within the asteroids:

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: Upon Shooting a Gigamar, there spawns within the asteroids:
3 x Frigates (Mordus Bounty Hunter) orbits at 8k

pockets.heading: Initial Group
lines: Full Room Aggro shortly after warp-in:

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: Upon Shooting a Sequestor, there spawns next to the warp-in:
3 x Frigates (Mordus Bounty Hunter) orbits at 8k,

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: 3 x Frigates (Mordus Bounty Hunter) orbits at 8k

pockets.heading: Initial Group
lines: 3 x Frigates (Mordus Bounty Hunter) orbits at 8k
4 x Battleships (3 x Mordus Mammoth) orbits at 50k
(1 x Mordus Fleet Commander) Trigger when shot

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: Upon Shooting the Mordus Fleet Commander, there spawns on four sides at 30k from warp-in:
12 x Frigates (Mordus Bounty Hunter) orbits at 8k
Mission Objective is to clear all of Third Pocket

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: No Energy Neutralizer Sentries means this mission is Active Tank friendly
Spawns will more often than not aggro teammates and drones, therefore;
If using a logistics ship it is better to trigger spawns before having it enter the room
Pocket 3’s maximum damage dealing of all ships: 1,980hp/s (Kin: 72 %, Therm: 28%)

MordusHeadhunters5.tips:
No Energy Neutralizer Sentries means this mission is Active Tank friendly
Spawns will more often than not aggro teammates and drones, therefore;
If using a logistics ship it is better to trigger spawns before having it enter the room
Pocket 3’s maximum damage dealing of all ships: 1,980hp/s (Kin: 72 %, Therm: 28%)

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: The small armories may drop an assortment of small to large ammo and light to heavy missiles

pockets.heading: Standing Loss
lines: -0.0267% - This penalty was incurred for destroying Mordu's Legion Command's Mordus Leopard
-0.03% - This penalty was incurred for destroying Mordu's Legion Command's Mordus Lion
-0.03% - This penalty was incurred for destroying Mordu's Legion Command's Mordus Lion

pockets.heading: 1st Pocket
lines: Auto aggro. Attack draws group 2 aggro.

pockets.heading: 2nd Pocket
lines: 2x Interceptor (Mordus Bounty Hunter) Webifier/ Warp Disruptor
12x Cruiser (Mordus Bobcat/ Cheetah/ Lepoard/ Lion/ Puma)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: 2nd Pocket: Kill the 3rd group (with the Mordus Mammoth). To avoid getting stage aggro, fly towards the right edge of the group and wait until the group aggro your ship. You can then attack the ships without aggro from the rest of the room.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Using Sentry drones within ~80km of a group causes the whole room to aggro. However, in each stage it's possible to position yourself so that you can happily take out at least the first group without aggro from the others (except as noted).

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: For pilots using Abbadon, Apocalypse, and Paladins w/ Megapulse lasers there is a very safe way of doing this mission:
Get into optimal range to take out both Bounty Hunters (~55km) with Radio. This will aggro the entire room, turn left and fly transversal to the incoming group.
Target priority should be Frigate (Light Drones), Cruiser and then Battleship once they reach 20- 25km.

pockets.heading: Mining
lines: 1st Pocket: 14x Plagioclase, 8x Pyroxeres, and 29x Veldspar asteroids (~26- 81km).

info.Recommended damage dealing: Explosive for the Republic Fleet ships /(Kinetic for the Mercenary)

pockets.heading: Spawn
lines: Triggered by destruction of the last ship of Group 1
4x Battleships (Republic Tribal Ymir / Republic Tribal Sigur)

Destruction of Spawn triggers the appearance of a 6th Container, this one called also 'Amarr Battleship Wreckage', but with a different type 'Amarrian Battleship Wreck'. Either use the type or just ignore the other containers to find that 6th container which holds the gate key (an 'Acceleration Gate Authentication Matrix') needed to get to Pocket 2.

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: Triggered by destruction of last battleship in Group 1, appearing at close range
3x Battleships (Republic Tribal Jarl / Republic Tribal Jotun)

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: Triggered by destruction of last battleship in Spawn 1, appearing at 30k
4x Battlecruisers (Republic Tribal Norn / Republic Tribal Nutia)
3x Battleships (Republic Tribal Jotun / Republic Tribal Sigur)

pockets.heading: Spawn 3
lines: any of the battleships of Spawn 2
In contrast to other spawns agresses drones
Killing the Mercenaries completes the mission.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Pocket 1 can not be blitzed as the container with the key is triggered by the last ship's destruction.
Pocket 2 can hardly be blitzed as you have to remove two spawns to be able to trigger the mission objective.
See my comments for further info (below).

pockets.heading: Group: 30km from Warp in Point (Automatic Aggro)
lines: 3x Cruiser (Rogue Pirate Escort) - Fires Sabretooth (EM) Missiles

MoteInTheEye5ga.title: A Mote in the Eye, Level 5, Storyline

info.Space type: Deadspace, no gates, mwd does not work

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Initiate warp and cancel. Then warp to optimal (mission is snipable).

info.Faction: Gallente (privateers drop Gallente tags and shooting them hurts Gallente standing)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Clear first room and activate gate.  Kill scrambling frigates, then kill Privateer Commander, scoop the objective and warp out.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Both federation frigates are destroyed within about 5 sec of warp in and Unidentified space ship warps out.

pockets.heading: Courier
lines: Complex is composed of 4 rooms in a square. The diagonal gates cross to the opposite corner while the other two cross along the side they are on. You start in the lower right corner of the square.
You will find the Unidentified Spaceship in one of the four rooms randomly sitting 35km off the Beacon you land on.
Target the Unidentified Spaceship and mission completes as he warps away. If you do not target him before he warps away he will be in one of the other 3 rooms.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Industrial is destroyed upon engaging the frigates.
Mission completes when all enemies are killed.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Gate to next pocket is 79 km from arrival point.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Gate to next pocket is 68 km from arrival point.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Gate to next pocket is 80 km from arrival point

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Gate to next pocket is 69 km from arrival point

pockets.heading: Misc
lines: 180m in assorted garbage loot and tags

NewFrontiers3.title: New Frontiers, Level 3

info.Damage dealt: All kinds (46% Expl, 29% Kin, 15% Therm, 10% EM)

pockets.heading: Summary
lines: All gates in the missions are unlocked.
Several missions have Energy Neutralizer Towers.

pockets.heading: Raw Materials (1 of 7)
lines: mission difficulty: Very Hard (after the 3e part)
Recommended ship types: Battlecruiser, HAC, Battleship

pockets.heading: Warp-in
lines: 3x Industrial (Mercenary Miner) (warp away after about a minute)

pockets.heading: Wave 6
lines: Bring mining modules or drones to mine the Green Arisite roid.
- Note: You must mine the Green Arisite yourself. Buying it from someone will not be adequate to complete the mission.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Mine the Green Arisite and leave. Be careful when approaching the Green Arisite roid not to close since they'll aggro.

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: The 3 Merc Miners will disappear after a certain time so if you want to kill them, target them first. They drop drugs when killed. Attacking the Miners spawns the 2nd wave of ships.
The 5th and 6th waves of ships may not spawn (all missions are slightly randomised).
There are also approx 16433 units of Omber, 591937 units of Veldspar and 1995 units of Gneiss to be mined.
To find the Green Arisite, add Gneiss to your overview.
IT is possible to get hauler spawns that drop 40k Pyerite or the like

pockets.heading: Mad Scientist (2 of 7)
lines: Damage dealt: All kinds (29% Expl, 24% Kin/Therm, 22% EM)
Recommended ships: Passive tanked Battlecruiser or HAC

pockets.heading: Warp In
lines: All will spawn almost immediately after you warp in. The Raiders/Sunders orbit at 2-4km. There are only few drone cruisers, so it is not a heavy pocket. Destroy the 2 bunkers to stop more respawning.

pockets.heading: Wave 3
lines: An Alvus Mother drone might spawn.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: kill the neut towers first and align when you land so you can warp out  when you running low on cap
(you warp in in 35-45km from all, which aggro immediately):

pockets.heading: Wave 4
lines: Destroy "Professor Delainen's Lab". The professor is in the can dropped by the lab.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Ignore pocket 1, head straight for the lab in pocket 2. You may prefer to kill the Stasis Towers first.
Damage dealt: All kinds (48% Expl, 25% Kin, 24% Therm 3% EM)
: I recommend an adaptive and a thermal hardener, I took
less damage than with an adaptive/explosive. Never dropped below 75% shields. (with the explo I got down to 25%)
Don't shoot the turrets, they do barely any damage and will spawn additional waves.

pockets.heading: Warp In
lines: 1x Drone Battleship (Supreme Alvus Parasite "Delainen-ROM Symbiote"), which drops mission loot.

pockets.heading: Wave 3
lines: (When the Drone Battleship dies, or is near death)

pockets.heading: Wave 4
lines: (When the Light Missile Batteries are attacked)

pockets.heading: Wave 6
lines: If you shoot the Drone Bunker right away, you get lots of drone spawns in short succession (new spawn every 3-5seconds). In total there were about 30-45 drones and I had to warp out once at the beginning.
Smartbombing works great with many close-range drones.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill the Battleship and get the Elite Drone AI from the can it drops and take to your agent. Watch out for drone aggro.
Damage dealt: All kinds (54% Expl, 22% Kin, 19% Therm, 5% EM)
Recommended ship types: passive tanked Battlecruiser or HAC
The BS Drone (has different names) drops the can you need with the "Hive Mind CPU".

pockets.heading: Warp In
lines: (group about 55-60km, neut range is extreme, stasis towers lock range is only about 28km)

pockets.heading: Wave 7
lines: After few minutes, the Battleship Drone will spawn (Alvus Ruler, Supreme Alvus Parasite, possibly others). It has high damage, even at 50km, so be careful. As you shoot the BS, another group of drones (Wave 7) will spawn.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Go in passive tanked, ignore all sentries and neut towers.  While waiting for the BS, kill off the first spawn.  Wait for the BS to come out of the range of the stasis towers (you won't have cap to tractor the loot can), then go for it, pick up the can, finito.

pockets.heading: Alternative Blitz
lines: Go in passive tanked, but kill the Stasis Towers early. There's plenty of time to take care of the triggered Strain spawn before the BS drone with the mission loot spawns, and this way you can attack it earlier (while still closer to the structures).

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Smartbombs are a good idea again.
Stay out of the range of the stasis towers.
It is best to go for passive tanking and take the towers one by one (starting with the energy neutralizers). Destroy each spawn before continuing to the next tower.

If you are active tanked, then: primary the energy neutralizers, kill each spawn as it arrives and before proceeding to the next tower. Primary Strain drones (scramblers), and then the Violator Drones as they do the most damage.
Damage dealt: All kinds (46% Expl, 29% Kin, 15% Therm, 10% EM)

pockets.heading: Warp In
lines: Arrive at deadspace to find 20 or so small/med rogue drones, and briefly the BS.

pockets.heading: Second Pocket
lines: Around 30 small/med drones and the Mother Drone BS you need to destroy.

pockets.heading: Wave 2
lines: (Spawns when Wave 1 frigates are killed off)

pockets.heading: Wave 3
lines: (Spawns when all from Wave 1 are killed off)

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: Kill any drones that target you, and then the BS.
New drone spawns don't always aggro, and can be ignored.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Go straight for the BS, ignore everything else. DPS is a bit heavier than in Part 5.

NewFrontiers3.tips:
The 3 Merc Miners will disappear after a certain time so if you want to kill them, target them first. They drop drugs when killed. Attacking the Miners spawns the 2nd wave of ships.
The 5th and 6th waves of ships may not spawn (all missions are slightly randomised).
There are also approx 16433 units of Omber, 591937 units of Veldspar and 1995 units of Gneiss to be mined.
To find the Green Arisite, add Gneiss to your overview.
IT is possible to get hauler spawns that drop 40k Pyerite or the like

Smartbombs are a good idea again.
Stay out of the range of the stasis towers.
It is best to go for passive tanking and take the towers one by one (starting with the energy neutralizers). Destroy each spawn before continuing to the next tower.
If you are active tanked, then: primary the energy neutralizers, kill each spawn as it arrives and before proceeding to the next tower. Primary Strain drones (scramblers), and then the Violator Drones as they do the most damage.


Nanite Express (6 of 7)


Can be completed remotely


Ascendance (7 of 7)








Kill any drones that target you, and then the BS.
New drone spawns don't always aggro, and can be ignored.

pockets.heading: Group:
lines: New Slaves - A New Rebellion (3 of 5)

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Gate can only accept Frigate, Cruiser and Destroyer.
Captain Kalis in group 1 will call for reinforcements immediately.

pockets.heading: Group 4:
lines: New Slaves - To Catch a Spy (5 of 5)
Completed in Firetail DR: Very Hard (Thoran Karlien)

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Gate only handles Frigate, Cruiser, Destroyer and Interceptor
9x Minmitar Frigate, 1x Minmatar Cruiser in 3 groups.
Some aggro on arrival, others aggroed after engaging one of the Frigates.

pockets.heading: A New Venture – Education is Key (1 of 5)
lines: Objective: Pick up a skill book. 01.m3 of volume required.

pockets.heading: A New Venture – Right People (2 of 5)
lines: Objective: Pick up one unit of homeless. 3.0m3 required.

pockets.heading: A New Venture – Healthy Competition (3 of 5)
lines: Destroy the ship and return with 80.0m3 of construction tools.
The supply ship does not aggro even when being attacked.

pockets.heading: A New Venture – Rough Market (4 of 5)
lines: When you first warp in, there will be several kamikaze pilots and missile batteries. Soon after warp, the POS station your agent created explodes, killing most of the NPCs, leaving 3 Mercenary Rookies which are easy kills.

pockets.heading: A New Venture – Final Negotiations (5 of 5)
lines: Warp in, shoot up the cruiser. The cruiser drops tourists. It does no significant damage.

NineTenthsOfTheWormhole4sa.title: Nine Tenths Of The Wormhole (level 4) (STORYLINE – Sansha)

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: • blitz impossilbe all ships must die

info.Blitz: destroy the industrial, loot the container, ignore the mercs.

pockets.heading: Single pocket
lines: Mission completes when you destroy the Federation Industrial.  Remember to collect the stolen goods (80 m3).  The hauler probably wont be on your overview but will have a red + like the other mission rats.
Blitz: destroy the industrial, loot the container, ignore the mercs.

info.Faction: Gallente Federation Navy (although mission states Caldari!)

pockets.heading: Mission briefing
lines: There is a monument where a battle in the Gallente-Caldari war occurred within Gallente space. We once tolerated pilgrimaging Caldari, but with this war we cannot allow the Caldari any excuse to proceed this deep within our space. Such leniency would only invite terrorism. I need you to destroy the monument, and any witnesses to the event.

pockets.heading: Objective
lines: Destroy the monument and leave no witnesses alive

pockets.heading: Single Pocket:
lines: Upon warp in, the pocket is empty. There are 7 monuments in a circle. Ships will spawn after destroying the monument in the middle. Mission is deemed complete after killing the last ship.

pockets.heading: Isk
lines:
Note

No standing loss with Gallente

Video: http://youtu.be/z2lZ1RaTCHA



CategoryMissions
CategoryLevel3

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Pick up the 4x scientists (4m³) at the Survey Post container (~10km) then place them in the Mining Outpost container (~30km).
Killing the last Drone in each spawn triggers the next.
Killing the last Drone flags the mission complete.

=_Note:_=
The dust cloud here causes area damage to any player-owned entities nearby, including drones.
Triggered by the first rogue drone spawn, the damage inflicted seems to continue until the last rogue drone is killed.
After that, the area is safe for mining.
Overall damage seems to be around 400-500 HP total, so it's quite manageable even in a frigate.

pockets.heading: Group 2, 10km (if you destroy the Fuel Depot)
lines: The destruction of the fuel depot is not required for the completion of the mission.

pockets.heading: Operation Hamstring, Level 3
lines: Last edited by JeanInkura:details Tue, 07 Mar 2017 20:35 UTC

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Destroy the Armory to complete the mission, it drops assorted ammo.

OperationWyrmsbane5se.title: Operation Wyrmsbane, Level 5

info.Web/Scramble: Web & Scram - Coreli Guardian (Protector, Safeguard, Guard, Spy, Watchman)

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: When you warp in, there is a single mixed group. Aggro is automatic.

pockets.heading: Spawn 3:
lines: Spawns at a distance of 2,000 - 2,500 m from Shard
This whole spawn must be eliminated to be able to access the can after it is hacked successfully.

pockets.heading: Spawn 4:
lines: Triggered when the Serpentis Stronghold is at about 5-10% Armor
Spawn starts within 20 km of Stronghold

pockets.heading: Structure Loot:
lines: Serpentis Info Shard will drop regular radar site loot (e.g. datacore, decryptors or decryptor parts)
Serpentis Stronghold drops nothing of interest

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: It is strongly suggested that you use Logistics support to keep your tank alive.
Remember to have a hacking module (Codebreaker) in case there is a Serpentis Info Shard (does not appear every time).

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: You only need to kill the Serpentis Stronghold to complete the mission.

OperationWyrmsbane5se.tips:
It is strongly suggested that you use Logistics support to keep your tank alive.
Remember to have a hacking module (Codebreaker) in case there is a Serpentis Info Shard (does not appear every time).
OperationWyrmsbane5se.loot:
Cruise Missles from the Bunkers
Serpentis Info Shard will drop regular radar site loot (e.g. datacore, decryptors or decryptor parts)
Serpentis Stronghold drops nothing of interest

OustTheClaimJumpers5ga.title: Oust the Claimjumpers, Level 5

info.Space type: Deadspace (mwd does not work) with single entry gate

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: When you warp in, there is a single mixed group. Aggro is automatic.

pockets.heading: Initial Group:
lines: 12x Battleships Federation (Praktor Hyperion, Covinus, Praktor Navis Praetor, Praktor Hyperion, Praktor Hexeris, Praktor Phanix, Praktor Praeses)
6x Elite Frigates Elite Federation (Libertus, Manica, Matara) (Web/Scramble)

pockets.heading: Spawn 1:
lines: Triggered when the Last BS is popped from the Initial Group

pockets.heading: Spawn 2:
lines: Triggered when the Last BS is popped from the Spawn 1

pockets.heading: Spawn 3:
lines: Triggered when the Last BS is popped from the Spawn 2

pockets.heading: Spawn 4:
lines: Each Energy Neutralizer Tower III has 2 replacement spawns (e.g. Initial ENT --> Replacement Tower 1 --> Replacement Tower 2)
Once these 6 towers have been destroyed, the next spawn appears

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: It is recommend that you use Logistics support to help keep your passive tank alive to avoid warp outs

A CNR / Golem can do this mission with careful energy / tank management, but MUST have 2x Medium Energy Transfer Array II's going on it at all times and 4x Large Shield Reps. Your cap will drain, but the Neutralizer tower cycles allow you to turn your tank back on between cycles.
Shoot all but one of the initial BS's to reduce your tank damage taken

OustTheClaimJumpers5ga.tips:
It is recommend that you use Logistics support to help keep your passive tank alive to avoid warp outs
A CNR / Golem can do this mission with careful energy / tank management, but MUST have 2x Medium Energy Transfer Array II's going on it at all times and 4x Large Shield Reps. Your cap will drain, but the Neutralizer tower cycles allow you to turn your tank back on between cycles.
Shoot all but one of the initial BS's to reduce your tank damage taken

pockets.heading: Warp in - All frigates
lines: On warp in all aggro but just being near the tower is enough to complete the mission.
Most of them use Thorn rockets too.

pockets.heading: Warp in - All frigates
lines: On warp in all aggro, destroy the tower it only takes a few despite high health

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Destroy the Caldari ships; bring scientist back to agent's station.
After the Ion Field Batteries have been destroyed in pocket #2, head back to first pocket to destroy the Prototype Macroshield Generators.

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Auto-aggro on initial group and spawns. Watch out for continuous
Enemy ships at roughly 40km from warp-in.

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: Triggered by destroying one of the battleships of Spawn 1 (one of the Domination Alvus)

pockets.heading: Spawn 3 (Final)
lines: Triggered by the destruction of spawn 2.

Mission complete on Spawn 3 and "Patient Zero" building's destruction. (Mission completes also when Patient Zero is destroyed and spawn 2 and 3 have not yet been spawned - just leave some ships from spawn 1 alive)

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: The destruction of the "Patient Zero" structure is the mission objective. No loot.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: damage, enabling e.g. salvaging with an alt in a fragile ship or deploying drones to destroy frigate NPCs.

pockets.heading: Ore
lines: 16 roids of Veldspar: ~  861 000 units of Veldspar
16 roids of Scordite: ~1 100 000 units of Scordite

PersistentEnemy4caga.title: Persistent Enemy, Level 4 Caldari State Storyline Mission

info.Faction: optional Minmatar or Amarr, depending on your choices in Pocket 1.

pockets.heading: Warp-in
lines: Initially at the warp-in there is an acceleration gate and a stationary SOE Rescue Vessel. There are no hostiles.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Pocket One consists of no hostiles two cans: one labeled Minmatar Embassy Housing, one labeled Amarr Embassy Housing and an Acceleration Gate to Pocket 2.  Shortly after warping in you are given a message that you can only save one.

Pick up the embassy staff from one of the housing cans, and the other blows up. Contrary to the mission advice, you do not seem to lose faction standing for the faction that you leave behind, or receive any improvements if you rescue one or both.

Note: It is possible to rescue both diplomats at once, but it will require a fleet and proper timing. Once you rescue one, you will have only a few seconds to rescue the second before the embassy building explodes, so you'll need a second pilot at the other embassy to grab the other diplomat at the same time you do. Either way, an opposing fleet will be present at the destination of the second gate (ie, the mission entrance) following your rescue. A third pilot with a well-tanked battleship can withstand the enemy fleet while other pilots complete the drop-off.

There is an acceleration gate here that returns to the warp-in/mission entrance and it will place you at 50km from the container, but if you prefer it is possible to warp out and then warp back to the mission.

pockets.heading: Second Gate (Mission Entrance)
lines: In addition to the SOE Rescue Vessel present when you first warped-in, you now have faction ships of the faction you didn't save out for your blood (See list below), but you do not have to kill them to complete the mission. Ships will vary depending on which empire space you are in.
There is no reason to take the gate as it will simply return you to P1. The mission is complete once the diplomatic staff are placed inside the

pockets.heading: Method
lines: ':Use a fast frigate or interceptor. Pick up the diplomat in P1. Return to the warp in, drop them off, and warp away. Mission is complete.
': Instead of returning to the entrance start point immediately, you can go get your ship of choice to kill all enemies at the warp-in point.  Simply ensure you transfer
the rescued diplomat into your combat ship's cargohold.  Upon returning to the warp-in/mission entrance you can kill everything with your large ship and deposit the diplomat.

pockets.heading: Minmatar
lines: Unknown (Minmatar?) loot = approx 11.9 Mil ISK if you salvage everything

pockets.heading: Standing
lines: No standing loss from killing ships in pocket 2.

pockets.heading: Single Group
lines: No auto-aggro.  Entire pocket aggros when you open fire.
Objective drops in a can from the last Industrial.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket:
lines: You warp straight into the pack.

pockets.heading: Single pocket:
lines: You warp straight into the pack. Aggro at once.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 10x Frigates (Republic Takan, Republic Otur, Republic Gleeda, Republic Baldur)

pockets.heading: Group (Huge Blob)
lines: Note: The group doesn't aggro totally when shot.

pockets.heading: Aggro notes:
lines: -Group 1 and 2 are linked, aggro when shot.
-Group 3 doesn't aggro if not shot, it also fires on drones.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: 4 groups at 60km or more from the warp in. Each group can be aggroed separately, aggroing the closest group aggroes all groups

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: No auto-aggro.  Groups 1 & 2 aggro together and Groups 3 & 4 aggro together.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: No auto-aggro.  Groups 1, 2 & 4 aggro individually.  Shooting Group 3 will aggro entire pocket.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: You can aggro one group at a time, but if you get close to a group you will aggro it.
Closing in on the acceleration gate will agro group 4.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: No aggro upon warping in. Groups will aggro individually upon aggression and distance.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Same as the first pocket: No aggro upon warping in. Groups will aggro individually upon aggression and distance.

info.Blitz: 2-5 min

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Take out pocket one, and Only kill group 3 in pocket 2.

pockets.heading: Video
lines: There is many ways to do this mission, but this is one of them.

pockets.heading: Guarding the Gate
lines: Acceleration Gate to next pocket is at 38km.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: No aggro on warp in. Shoot anything and the entire pocket aggros.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: War installation drops t1 loot.  (Takes a fair amount of damage, drops random ammo and loot, not worth the time it takes to blow it up.)

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Only Group 1 aggros on warp in.

pockets.heading: Group 3 (50-65km)
lines: It's possible to shoot the groups in the given order without aggro from the others. However shooting group 3 will aggro group 2.

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: Pocket 3 appears to be a random addition to this mission, you might get it, you might not. If you do get it, it is required for mission completion

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Group 2 not required for completion. Group 3 can be range-aggressed without pulling Group 2 (however you then get drone aggro from Group 2).

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Hostiles will aggro when attacked. Kill all hostiles in this pocket to unlock the acceleration gate.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Each group will aggro independently when attacked.
Acceleration gate sits at 65-70km. You need to kill all ships in this pocket to unlock it.

pockets.heading: Group 2 (80-90km)
lines: 5-7x Frigates (Coreli Defender/ Guard/ Protector/ Safeguard/ Soldier)
5x Cruisers (Corelum Chief Defender/ Patroller/ Protector/ Watchman)

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: 12x Starbase Major Assembly Array: Minerals & Alloys (each worth ~10k)
The loot from the War Installation is not worth the  time it takes to destroy it (because of the large amount of hit points)
(One reported destruction required over 1,000 Heavy missiles)

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: Full pocket aggro upon attacking Group 3.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill all hostiles in pocket 1 & 2. Group 3 in the last pocket. That should flag the mission complete.
You do not have to destroy the War Installation to finish the mission.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: You warp in to an empty pocket but soon find yourself surrounded by a swarm of Hostiles.
Group spawn is slightly delayed and distances vary. The spawn order is group 4, 2, 1 and then 3 and 5.
Group 1 will auto aggro after some time.
Proximity aggro is a major factor in this mission. Please be aware that you can aggro a neutral group by just moving too close to it.
The proximity distance for Group 4 is about 80km. It is recommended that you do not move your ship.
All other groups remain neutral until attacked or approached.

pockets.heading: Group 3 (60- 70km, Amarr Trade Station Ruins, Left)
Group 4 (75- 90km, Amarr Trade Station Ruins, Right)
lines: 4x Battleship (Gist Commander/ General/ War General/ Warlord)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Eliminate all ships from Group 5 and warp out.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Attacking group 1 does not aggro any other groups.
Attacking group 2 will aggro group 3 (and vice-versa).
Attacking group 4 will aggro group 5 (and vice-versa).
To throw off aggro from group 5, wait until an enemy ship from group 5 has locked your ship. Warp out, then warp back in.
If you have to move be careful not to approach the neutral groups, move up or down as you are surrounded from the sides.
Recommended order of elimination : Group 1, 5 (if you do not warp out to throw-off aggro), 4, 2 and 3.
Except Gist Saint and the Battlecruiser, the Battleships are all coming in range of 5- 8 km. Great for salvaging afterwards.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: Sniped all Hostiles from the Beacon in order of proximity, from nearest to farthest. Easily done in a T2 fit Dominix with T2 Bouncer, ~620 DPS, 112hp/s rep. Did not get scrammed. However, this approach is not always feasible.

pockets.heading: Mining
lines: 25 Veldspar Asteroids 28 to 135km from warp in.

PirateInvasion4sa.title: Pirate Invasion, Level 4

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: At warp-in, you will see Group 4. Four other groups will spawn several seconds later.
The spawn order is Group 2, Group 1, Group 3 and finally Group 5.
It is recommended that you DO NOT MOVE your ship.
The proximity aggro bubble for Group 4 is about 80km and you may get aggroed EITHER during warp-in or if you move towards it.
Groups 2, 3, 4 & 5 will remain neutral until attacked or aggroed via proximity.
As of 11-08-2014 Group 5 stopped Auto-aggroing and follows same rules as Groups 2, 3 & 4
The two Loyal elite frigates in Group 1 will frequently warp scramble you in under 20 secs.
Attacking Group 1 does not aggro any other groups. You can safely deploy drones to attack this group.
Attacking Group 2 aggros Group 3 (and vice versa). You can safely deploy drones after the pair have been aggroed.
Attacking Group 4 aggros Group 5 (attacking Group 5 didn't aggro group 4). You can safely deploy drones after the pair have been aggroed.
Group 4 may aggro drones if they get too close to that group.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Throw off aggro from Group 5 : Wait until an enemy ship from Group 5 have locked your ship. Warp out, then warp back in. No longer needed, doesn't auto-aggro.
Be absolutely careful not to move towards the neutral groups. Move away from them to minimize setting off the proximity aggro.
Recommended order of elimination : Group 1, Group 5 (if you do not warp out to throw-off aggro) & Group 4, finally Group 2 & Group 3.
Mission is flagged completed when ALL ships in Group 5 are killed.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Eliminate all ships from Group 5 and warp out.

pockets.heading: Standing
lines: Killing all the ships in the mission results in 4x -0.025 standing loss
This penalty was incurred for destroying:

PirateInvasion4sa.tips:
Throw off aggro from Group 5 : Wait until an enemy ship from Group 5 have locked your ship. Warp out, then warp back in. No longer needed, doesn't auto-aggro.
Be absolutely careful not to move towards the neutral groups. Move away from them to minimize setting off the proximity aggro.
Recommended order of elimination : Group 1, Group 5 (if you do not warp out to throw-off aggro) & Group 4, finally Group 2 & Group 3.
Mission is flagged completed when ALL ships in Group 5 are killed.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: The Low-tech Energy Harvester drops any combination of 3 items: 100 small hybrid ammo, 100 small projectile ammo, 10 cap boosters or 10 random freight goods.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: It would be useful to take a webifier if you can't hit a fast drone near yourself without it. When you jump in Splinter Alvi is only about 5 km away from you and Aggro.
If you will destroy the Cargo Rig, you will find L and M charges for Hybrids and Projectiles and Light Missiles.

info.Damage dealt: Explosive, Kinetic and some deal thermal.

pockets.heading: Initial wave at warp in (delayed or no aggro)
2nd ambush (Either time triggered or when the BS hits structure)
8th ambush (Triggered by destruction of Arch Gistii Hijacker)
Pocket 2:
lines: All spawns will happen around the gate. So it's snipable if you get some distance to the gate.

pockets.heading: 2nd ambush (Two of the Tribunis will trigger each half of it)
3rd ambush (Time triggered or by destruction of the CR)
4th ambush (Time triggered or by attacking 3rd ambush)
5th ambush (Time triggered or by attacking a General or BS)
6th ambush (Upon destruction of the last BS or General)
Pocket 3:
lines: The initial wave will assemble over a short period of time. No aggro, so you can snipe this one.

pockets.heading: 2nd ambush (Upon desctruction of one of the Phalanx')
3rd ambush (Upon desctuction of one or all the BCs)
4th ambush (Upon destruction of the DD in 3rd ambush) (No aggro)
5th ambush (upon destruction of one of the CR in 4th ambush) (No aggro)
Small Blitz:
lines: No need to shoot the gistior trasher in the 3rd stage, mission completes without that trigger.
Mission is also completed before the 4th ambush. Maybe before the 3rd.

info.Recommended ship classes: HAC, Battlecruiser, Command Ship (Battleships not allowed to enter)

pockets.heading: Standing Loss
lines: For killing everything except the Chief Republic Rodul (Don't need him to complete mission, takes forever to kill.)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket with gate to mission area
lines: Your objective is to destroy the FTL Transmitter, along with the initial spawn.

pockets.heading: Group 1 (10km-25km)
lines: 5/6 x Cruiser (Freedom Patriot) - do heavy damage; destroying the last of these triggers Group 3

pockets.heading: Group 2 (44km-50km)
lines: Firing on the FTL transmitter triggers Group 2 ((delayed)FTL receive hull damage)
1 x Elite Battlecruiser (Chief Republic Rodul) - Very large tank, (35seconds to kill with 480 DPS).
4/5 x Destroyer (Republic Tribal Faxi / Austri) - Drones Aggro.

pockets.heading: Group 3 (47km-52km)
lines: Triggered immediately by destroying all Freedom Patriots in Group 1.
Even if you leave some or all of the Freedom Patriots alive, this group will spawn after a while.

lines: Beware of the jamming, other than that this mission is a piece of cake. Drone carriers and F.O.F. missile platforms have the advantage of maintaining full tank and don't pay attention to the jam as the weapons lock on targets themselves, while gunships need to boost their signal strength and give a slot to that.

lines: 2 groups. Aggro at warpin from 1 small group at a 20km distance. Next group is larger and at around 30km distance.

lines: 3 groups. Aggro at warpin from 1 group at a 30km distance. Next group is at 45km, and the last group spreads out between a 65-85km distance.

Drone carriers and F.O.F. missile platforms have the advantage of maintaining full tank and don't pay attention to the jam as the weapons lock on targets themselves, while gunships need to boost their signal strength and give a slot to that.
There are no triggered respawns.
Tags drop from all ships.

pockets.heading: At the 1st Gate
lines: When you warp in there is one drone giving you a message:
This is binary and converted to ASCII it says: "PREPARE TO DIE, N00B."

lines: Four groups.  Only the closest group aggros on warp in. Upon attacking group 2, group 3 may aggro

pockets.heading: Pocket 4 (Amarr ships)
lines: The Amarr fleet spawn is timed, not (necessarily) dependent on attacking the control tower. Both groups auto aggro upon warp in.

The mission repeatedly tells you to hurry up, and they mean it. It will take approx 2h before the Amarr fleet spawns.  This fleet will include more ships than just those noted below.  Some spawns may include ships that can web/scramble.

pockets.heading: Tips:

You can fit a tractor beam to pull in the data chip can quickly, if you don't want to sacrifice a mid slot to an afterburner
Watch out for the Seers, which will nos you at 25 km, and are pretty fast
Remember to destroy the Control Tower to collect the data chip
Don't take too long, or the fleet will get you (see Xalib Zondos' story in comments)

info.Video: Cerberus Part 1, Cerberus Part 2 Kronos - Minimal Amarr Standing Loss

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Warp in at about 50km from the nearest group.
10x HACs (may be battlecruisers when entering as BC?)
When you fire on the Prophecy pretty much everything aggros except the Prophecy may not aggro.
There are two timed spawn (only a few minutes after you warp in and quickly after each other) of each
Destroying the Prophecy causes a spawn of:
Final spawn, caused by destroying the previous spawn:

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: 0.018% with Amarr Empire (per standing tick - can be done in 15 minutes easily with a Paladin for example - did not destroy the towers)
Recommended ships: Paladin, Golem, CNR, Raven, Domi
There are 6 mines at warp-in 22km - 70km away.
After one mine explodes 4 new mines spawn. After shooting 4 more mines there's another spawn of 4 mines + the "Amarrian drone mine 1".
After blowing up "Amarrian drone mine 1" the mission is over.

Upon firing on the Mines, 4 Amarr Smart Drones (really Rogue Drone Cruisers and Battlecruisers) will appear around the mine, and your ship (and any in your fleet on the grid) will take 600-1000 damage. Destroy the drones after each mine to avoid being swamped.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: For snipers: snipe all of the mines from as far away as you can. Keep shooting the mines until the "Amarrian drone mine 1" spawns. Blow that one up, and mission is completed. (Note: When I did the mission Drones didn't attack until blowing up the last 3 mines - NikalVaszol.) Using this blitz you can do the mission in less than 10 minutes, easily.

For ships with high alpha strike: if  you can kill a mine in one volley (by grouping your turrets/launchers), it will not spawn any NPCs. Mines have 1200 hp each. Using this method you can complete the mission in two minutes in absolute safety.
Loot: No loot, ~1.4 m3 (3-4M isk worth) of salvage.
2.4% with Amarr Empire (per standing tick) for destroying the mines (show as "Amarr Lookout")
Note: If you decline this, you'll get an alternative 5 of 5.
Recommended damage dealing: therm, EM for Amarr Recon Ships
Recommended ships: Paladin, Sleipnir, Golem, CNR, Raven, Domi, Drake

pockets.heading: Group 1

pockets.heading: Spawn 2-5

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Outpost Defender drones do 100 dps each, orbit at 3 km, and will MWD towards you at 2000 m/s. EMP smartbombs can be quite useful here.
2.4% with Amarr Empire "for destroying Amarr Empire's Outpost Defender" !
Recommended ships: Paladin, Sleipnir, Golem, CNR, Raven, Domi

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: You warp in the first pocket using an accelleration gate, no aggro on warp in. There are 3 groups, with increasingly larger size ships, all faction (so no bounty). The 2 groups closest to you (40km and 80km) can be pulled or sniped. If you need to get closer to the 3rd group to pull them (120km) they will aggro you when you are 80 to 90km away. The gate at about 45 km distance is locked, so you need to remove all ships anyway. The optimal range of the battleships is around 40 km usually.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: First group will aggro on warp in (or a few seconds later), 2nd group seems to aggro after group 1 goes.

pockets.heading: Group 3 (70km)
lines: You could pull them together with the other groups if you feel confident, otherwise don't get too close and they will not target you or your drones.

pockets.heading: Alternate 5 of 5
lines: Courier Mission (100,000 units of Mexallon; 1000 m³ volume)

PotandKettle4.tips:
Outpost Defender drones do 100 dps each, orbit at 3 km, and will MWD towards you at 2000 m/s. EMP smartbombs can be quite useful here.

info.Space type: DeadSpace, Allows direct warp to bookmarks or gang mates

pockets.heading: Part 1 of 2
lines: , Allows direct warp to bookmarks or gang mates

pockets.heading: First a few things to know about this mission
lines: - It’s bugged, you can’t finish it properly yet. Yes I have bug reported this. And you can still finish it (you have to travel 10,000km in a ship, twice).
- You can warp directly into any part of the mission despite it being a deadspace.
- The rats don’t warp scramble (or at least they haven’t scrammed me)
- Spawns vary in numbers a bit for the 3 main rooms, numbers below are just guidelines.

- This fix worked for my mission, but CCP may change/fix this mission. I reported this fix and workaround at 17 June 2011 (confirmed still bugged and work around still works at 12 May 2012), see how out of date this is before trying the mission.

pockets.heading: The bug
lines: There are 3 rooms in this mission that have a basic structure of 2 gates 1 active that leads to a guard room and 1 inactive that leads to the next room. Kill all the spawns in the room for a key to drop take that to the guard room and kill all the spawns there for the guard post to appear, drop the key in the guard post for the inactive gate to become active. This works for the first room but it does not work for the second or third room.

pockets.heading: The Fix
lines: Since you can warp to anywhere in the mission grab a fast ship, align yourself with the gate and travel 10,000km to get to the room, bookmark and come back with a fleet. With a 5 km/s cepter it took roughly 30 minutes to travel to the next room. This won’t work for the second broken gate as the inactive gate is also facing the wrong direction (it’s instead facing the same way as the guard post so if you try and travel you’ll just end up at the guard post) the real direction is roughly 90 degrees to the left of where it is pointing which is very hard to get to if you try to align yourself with that gate.

However all 3 rooms and the final room are in a straight line. So if you warp from the first room to the second room you should be facing the right direction to reach the 3rd room and same for the 4th. You will however need to make sure it’s the same spot your warping between in these two rooms, therefore bookmark the beacons and warp between those to align yourself to travel to the next room.

pockets.heading: Warp in
lines: Initially nothing here except an acceleration gate that leads you to the first room
However during the first guard post room this acceleration gate will become inactive
MAKE SURE TO MAKE BOOKMARKS IN ALL THE ROOMS
Various concord type rats will also spawn here at various stages of the mission. At the end there will be a total of roughly:

pockets.heading: Wave 1 - Drones
lines: Present at warp in - immediate agro

pockets.heading: Wave 2 – Drones - After Killing a couple of ships
Wave 3 – Concord – When nearly all the drones are dead
Gate house room
lines: 1 concord cruiser which spawns another cruiser 3 times then a battleship spawns
Killing the battleship makes the guard post appear, drop your key in here and the gate back in the room will become active.

pockets.heading: Back in room 1
lines: A large new wave of concord ships has appeared - immediate agro

pockets.heading: Wave 1 - Drones
lines: Present at warp in - immediate agro

pockets.heading: Wave 2 – Drones – spawns after killing a small amount of ships
Guard Post 2
lines: 4 Cruisers which spawn another wave of 4 cruisers 3 times, then 3 cruisers and a battleship

pockets.heading: Back in Room 2
lines: A large new wave of concord ships has appeared - immediate agro

pockets.heading: Wave 1 - Drones
lines: Present at warp in - immediate agro

pockets.heading: Wave 2 – Drones – After killing a small number of drones
Wave 3 – Concord – After killing nearly all drones
Guard Post 3
lines: 4 Cruisers which spawn another wave of 4 cruisers 3 times, then 3 cruisers and a battleship

pockets.heading: Back in Room 3
lines: A large new wave of concord ships has appeared - immediate agro

pockets.heading: Wave 1 – Concord
lines: Present at warp in - immediate agro

pockets.heading: Final Wave – Concord
lines: Destroy this battleship for the solitary confinement spawn container to show up, go up to container and 2 containers will appear outside of it with the mission objective in them (take both containers).

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: - The third rooms concord spawn starts off at close range which lets the cruisers and frigs get damage on you much earlier, it is the hardest to tank of all the spawns

- Concord frigs and cruisers often orbit at point blank range (especially the ones at the initial warp in) Smart bombs are extremely effective (even t1 have enough range). However the concord cruisers have a very high shield regen, you will need to bring 2 Large smartbombs or they will out rep the damage.
- This mission can be farmed for loot/tags/bounty as it resets every dt and bookmarks from a previous dt will still work.

pockets.heading: Part 2 of 2
lines: Very short, you just have to take the DNA from the first mission and drop it in one of the two cans.
A few ships appear the closer you get to the can you choose, some cruisers frigs and 1 battleship. When you drop it in the can a can drops with a 12th teer overseer's affects (9.9 mil)
Both options seem to give the same result

All spawns appear within 5km of Cell Block D and auto-aggro at close range.

pockets.heading: Sixth Wave:
lines: Once mission completion has been triggered, Cell Block D respawns and you can retrieve the Caldari Operative.

pockets.heading: Standings
lines: Besides the "Derived Modification" normally received for any Storyline Mission, you will get standings losses of at most -0.02% each for "Combat - Ship Kill" for the Caldari State. These secondary standing losses are on the standard 15 minute standings timer, so divide how long it takes you by 15 minutes and round up, and that is how many of these you will get.  These are unavoidable, but negligible.  At Social Level 4, expect a 9% gain with the faction you are working for and a 36% gain with the corporation you are working for.

Destroying closest Asteroid Micro-Colony (62,000 hp) and the Imperial Templar Diviner triggers Objective Complete

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Everything agroes automaticly, but some agroes faster than others. Also, 10 ships able to Web/Scramble, so be aware. Also heavy cap drain.
The ships listed under Spawn will spawn over time, or when you kill rats. And they can agro mates/drones.

10x Destroyers (Federation Praktor Phalarica, Federation Praktor Machina)

6x Battleships (Federation Praktor Hexeris, Federation Praktor Hyperion, Federation Praktor Dionia, Federation Praktor Polemo) (NOS from Dionia)

pockets.heading: Initial Group
lines: Ships spawn steadily over 8 minutes.  Ships 50 -100km from warp-in
1 x Caldari Energy Vampire (Caldari Energy Neutralizer)
2 x Caldari Energy Neutralizer Sentry III

pockets.heading: - Timed Spawns
lines: Spawns that appear over time, one at a time, in this order:

pockets.heading: - Neutralizer Spawns
lines: Just shooting each Neutralizer will spawn a total of:

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Use a Passive Tank or plan a capacitor that receives an additional 120 units/s
For the Timed Spawns WATCH OUT if you have drones or logistics in the area. The spawns will more than like target them first.
Set drones to Passive if you don't want them triggering the Neutralizer Spawns.  RECOMMENDED
Destroying closest Asteroid Micro-Colony (62,000 hp) and it's spawn (State Shukuro Turishima)  triggers Objective Complete

Recon2.title: Recon, Level 2

pockets.heading: Objective
lines: Fly to the acceleration gate which has been locked down by the mining corporation. See if they will let you through. Then report back to your agent.
Tip:  the gate is a "large collidable object", make sure to turn that on in your overview to see it.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Approach the gate, approximately 60 to 75 km from warp in
When you get close [10 km], or attack the station, there is an ambush by...

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 2x Mercenary Sentry Gun (Tower Sentry Guristas I)
2x Mercenary Light Missile Battery (Angel Light Missile Battery)

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Completion Trigger is based on distance to the gate and not on triggering the ambush.
If you attack the station and trigger the ambush you will have to approach the gate anyway.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Fly to the gate in a shuttle, trigger the ambush, warp out.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Mining Station drops random loot, but has a large amount of hp.
Recommended generic setup: 10K EHP+ Omni Tank, or Pure speed

pockets.heading: Warp In
lines: You warp directly into a cloud. Warp-out gate is 60km away, activate it to complete the mission.
Waves deal all kinds of damage evenly and occur at 5, 25, 45, 65, 95, 115, 135, 155, 175, and 205 seconds after the initial damage.
Every wave has 4 separate damage types.
Total unresisted damage starts at about 200 (50 per type) and slightly goes up to about 1400 (350 per type).
The final wave will be more than 4000 (more than 1000 per type) unresisted damage.
See the full breakdown in the comments.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: The solution for the average level 2 mission runner is obviously not to get hit by the final wave.
Use a fast ship with an afterburner and a buffer tank (like shield extenders) to get to the gate before that wave hits.
There is a very large number of asteroids (91 in total) in the pocket after the Toxic Cloud

Recon2.tips:
Completion Trigger is based on distance to the gate and not on triggering the ambush.
If you attack the station and trigger the ambush you will have to approach the gate anyway.

The solution for the average level 2 mission runner is obviously not to get hit by the final wave.
Use a fast ship with an afterburner and a buffer tank (like shield extenders) to get to the gate before that wave hits.
There is a very large number of asteroids (91 in total) in the pocket after the Toxic Cloud

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: The gates are not locked, so you can blitz this mission in a shuttle without a single kill. Distance to gate ~ 25km
4 waves of enemies will spawn(30 seconds to 1 minute apart each) composed of 1 destroyer and 2 cruisers/elite cruisers OR 3 cruisers/elite cruisers.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Mission completes shortly after you arrive.

pockets.heading: Group 2 (Spawns after about 1 minute)
lines: Pocket 2 contains a very nice belt with 6,447,561 units of Veldspar ready to mine. Belt radius ~40km around beacon point.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Four spawns, timed base, every 20 to 30 sec. All spawns are instant aggro. Ship names may change but ship class are the same in each spawn.

pockets.heading: Remarks:
lines: - The NOS range is around 30-40 km.
- Bring a long-range weapons fit or medium drones and stay outside NOS range. Make sure to fit an Afterburner to achieve that.
break the Elite Cruisers' tank, but expect that to take a while. Typically ~40 minutes total for this pocket.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: You will get mission completed when entering this pocket, so you don't have to kill the spawns there. The spawns are a bit random, ship name may change and you can get one ship more or less in each class ship group.

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: x3/4 Elite Cruiser (Elder Corpum Dark Priest/Elder Corpum Shadow Sage)

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: x2/3 Elite Cruiser (Elder Corpum Dark Priest)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Use a shuttle (or any other preferred ((fast)) ship), get to the gate fast, use it, then warp out when you get to pocket 2. Mission is completed

info.Blitz: Take a fast frigate with afterburner.  As soon as you warp into pocket 1, burn for the gate and warp.  You'll need at least 200-300 points of tank, as you'll take a little fire.  Once you drop out of warp in pocket 2, the mission will complete, and you can warp out before the bad guys can lock you.

pockets.heading: Second Wave:
lines: Take a fast frigate with afterburner.  As soon as you warp into pocket 1, burn for the gate and warp.  You'll need at least 200-300 points of tank, as you'll take a little fire.  Once you drop out of warp in pocket 2, the mission will complete, and you can warp out before the bad guys can lock you.

pockets.heading: Level 4 Recon (common parts 2 and 3)
lines: Last edited by JeanInkura:Replaces old-style internal links with new pipe-split links. Mon, 16 Oct 2017 08:49 UTC
Damage dealt: Thermal (41%)/ Kinetic (24%)/ EM (21%)/ Explosive (14%)
Recommended ship class: T2/ T3 Cruiser and higher or a fast Frigate to blitz.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: The locked acceleration gate (mission objective) is 72km away from the warp-in point.
The Mining Corporation Headquarters station is about 10km away.
The 1st ambush spawn is triggered when the Mining Corporation Headquarters station is attacked OR when your ship is within 10km from locked acceleration gate.
The 2nd ambush spawn is triggered when your ship is within 10km from locked acceleration gate.

pockets.heading: 1st Ambush Spawn
lines: 2x Mercenary Sentry Gun (Tower Sentry Caldari III)

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: To manage aggro, trigger the first ambush by attacking the Mining Corporation Headquarters station.
The mission is flagged completed once you have triggered both spawns, by either approaching to within 10km of the acceleration gate or destroying the station.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Fly to the gate in a small fast ship or micro jump a Battleship or Battlecruiser to trigger the ambush, align and warp out as soon as the mission completes.
The Mercenary Wingman frigates will spawn on top of the warp gate. You may get webbed/ scrambled if you're not fast enough in warping out.

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: The Mining Corporation Headquarters has very high HP (~306,550) and drops mainly T1 modules and some Faction ammo.

pockets.heading: Loot and Bounty
lines: Recommended ships: Corvette, any well tanked Battleship (Raven, Dominix), Battlecruiser (Drake, Myrmidon, Hurricane) or a fast Cruiser (Stabber).

pockets.heading: 1st Pocket
lines: There are no NPC ships to kill. The warp gate is 60km away from the warp-in point. The gate is configured to reject Capsules and Capitals.

The toxic environment will damage your ship in consecutive toxic cloud waves. Each wave deals an equal amount of each type of raw damage with no resists applied. Damage amount increases with each successive wave.
After the final giant toxic cloud wave there will be no more damage coming from the toxic environment.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: The toxic cloud waves will be reset after you have warped out.

The waves take 4:00 min, if you warp back shortly after the final wave, they don't reset and you can fly to the gate unmolested.  If you come back too fast they are still going and you can die. If you wait too long or if someone else warps in, the wave sequence may reset.

The way to do this safely is to start a 4 minute timer as you start to warp, then warp out as soon as you land (about half the time a Shuttle can make it out), re-dock and get a new shuttle if needed, when the 4 minutes is up, warp in, fly to the gate.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: Fit an omni-tank with a minimum sustainable 200 ehp per damage type.
Fit a Microwarpdrive (or afterburner) to quickly cover the distance to the warp gate to save time and if your tank does not meet the minimum requirement.
If you're in a slow battleship fit a Micro Jump Drive, align to the gate and jump, you'll only have to fly about 15km this way.
The mission is flagged completed once you have activated the warp gate and landed in the second room.

pockets.heading: Mining
lines: If you can get your Miner through the cloud, in the second Pocket, you find:
: Attempting to warp to the asteroid field in the second pocket using a bookmark will land you in the first room with the toxic cloud, resulting in a very quick death for any unprepared mining ship.

pockets.heading: Notes:
lines: Sensor damping in this pocket is obscene.
Expect targeting range to be reduced to 10km - plan accordingly!

pockets.heading: Asteroids:
lines: Very considerable amount of Veldspar, ~200 sizeable asteroids.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Use a shuttle or any other (fast) preferred ship, get to the gate, use it and warp out when you get to pocket 2, mission completed.  Can not use pod.

info.Space type: Deadspace 2e pocket warpdisrupting cloud (dont use slow ships with turrets!!)

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Four groups of three ships which spawn at short intervals (~20 seconds)
Take out the smaller ship (Destroyer) first in each group then work on the Cruisers then Elite (Loyal) Cruisers
each spawn = one Destroyer and two Cruiser size ships
Cruiser size; 25% chance of BC, 25% chance of T1 Cruiser, 50% chance of Elite [Loyal] Cruiser
expect approx. 450dps from full-aggro in both pockets
new spawns WILL target your drones, so pull them back in quickly after killing Destroyer with them.
The Centum Loyal Slaughterers are the hardest to kill and use tracking disruptors.  Plan accordingly.

pockets.heading: examples of possible spawns
lines: 1x or 2x Centum Loyal Execrator, Hellhound, Slaughterer

pockets.heading: Full-aggro List
lines: ( => 1km/s ) and hurry to get to the acceleration gate. After You activated the gate and are in Pocket 2 wait some seconds until the journal is blinking. This indicates that the mission goal is accomplished and You can move to the agent.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: The gates are not locked, so you can blitz this mission without a single kill.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Groups spawn approximately 1 minute apart, starting just after warp-in.
Will spawn approximately 30-45km away and big ships orbit around 32km.
All groups aggro on spawn, though they will aggro drones that are out as well.

pockets.heading: Spawn 4:
lines: Bunker has chance of loot, but did not drop for author.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Aggro on Warp-in, warp in at about 30km, big ships orbit at around 30-35k.

pockets.heading: Spawn 2:
lines: Go to warp gate, activate it, when you reach the next pocket you are done!

pockets.heading: Mining
lines: Second pocket has 146 Veldspar Asteroids with an average quantity of 40k, totaling approx 5.8m Veldspar, all within 40k of warpin, over half within 15k (after 25k travel to first gate).

Recon4br.title: Recon (1 of 3), Level 4

info.Recommended ship classes: Battleship, Command Ship, Strategic Cruiser, HAC. (or fast frigate, shuttle etc for blitz)

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Auto aggro from Spawn 1 after several seconds.
New spawns will appear at an interval between 60-90 secs
These spawns will start from the three Shipyard structures, each about 20-30km from the warp-in point.
Drones will get aggroed by the later spawns, so retrieve/deploy them as necessary to avoid damage.
Once Spawn 1 has been initiated, the Shipyards will keep spawning ships regardless of your location. If you had warped out, there will be a full gang waiting when next you warp-in.
The full gang's DPS estimate is ~900-1100dps.
The loot from the battleships is generally rather good (usually about 2m/each).

pockets.heading: Spawn 1 (Auto-aggro):
lines: 1x Elite Cruiser (Elder Corpum Dark Priest/Shadow Sage)

pockets.heading: Spawn 2 (Auto-aggro):
lines: 1x Elite Cruiser (Elder Corpum Dark Priest/Shadow Sage)

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: You do not need to kill any hostile ships in this pocket. The warp gate is unlocked and sits about 24km from the warp-in point.
You can use any fast frigate/cruiser (over 500m/s) to evasively tank Spawn 1 and quickly cover the distance to warp off through the gate.
Mission is flagged completed once you have activated the gate and warped into Pocket 2.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: You will receive the mission completed message/journal update.
You can just warp off without needing to kill any hostile ships in this pocket.
Auto aggro from Spawn 1 after several seconds.
Next spawn will appear in 60-90 secs

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: After receiving the mission completed message/journal update, you can just warp off.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Pocket 1: Just fly to the warp gate and activate it.
Pocket 2: Warp off after receiving the mission completed message/journal update.

info.Damage dealt: all types (Pocket 1: Exp 46%/Kin 23%/therm 19%/EM 10%, Pocket 2: All types, but varies on percentages )

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: The gates are not locked, so you can blitz this mission in a shuttle without a single kill.
The changes in rev 2.2 replaces a lot of ships with fewer, deadlier ships, with the same DPS overall.

In general, keep moving either towards the other gate or towards a distant object.  Every minute, another group will respawn.  If you are not killing them fast enough, you can get overwhelmed.  There are a couple scramble possibilities, and most of them do damage from a distance (36km).   Once they all spawn, it can make things rather difficult for a weakly tanked ship.  So be careful.

pockets.heading: Respawn 4
lines: 2x Battleship (Gist Cherubim, thermal damage / Gist Seraphim, EM damage)
25km slowboat to Pocket 2, no loot drops from structures.

pockets.heading: Respawn 2

Area deals enough damage to reduce my Rattlesnake's almost perfect passive tank (I have T1 Defense Field Purgers instead of T2, and level 4 in the shield compensation skills) to 56% (stable) by the time I fly to the next gate.

Standing increase is excellent with this storyline mission.
This being a typical mercenary mission, all NPCs will close to a range of 15k or less, similar to
. If you can handle the DPS and deal good DPS this is very easy and quick (10 minutes) to finish.

RitualistRaid4.title: Ritualist Raids, Level 4

info.Recommended ship classes: Battleship, Command Ship, Battlecruiser, HAC, Recon, Faction Cruiser.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Proximity aggro range for the Blood Cruise Missile Batteries is about 30km.
The warp gate is locked until all hostile ships have been eliminated.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Eliminate the battlecruisers, destroyers and cruise missile batteries first, to reduce incoming DPS.
If you do not move when you first warp-in Cruise Batteries will not aggro you.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: At warp-in, you will get proximity aggroed from the sentry guns and missile batteries that sits within 30km range.
No NPC ships will aggro UNTIL you start your attack.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: The sentry guns/missile batteries, each have an aggro & shooting range of 30km. Before starting your attack, move away > 30km to remove them as a threat.
Eliminate the battlecruisers and destroyers first, to reduce incoming DPS.
Mission is flagged completed once you have destroyed the Blood Raiders Cathedral and eliminated all defending 2x battleships and 6x destroyers.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: - Blood Raider Cathedral (not Chapel) drops trade goods
- Blood Raider Battle Station drops nothing :-)
