RightHandofZazzmatazz4.title: Right Hand of Zazzmatazz, Level 4

info.Video: Ishtar (Blitz), Nightmare, Apocalypse Navy Issue, Dominix, Raven Navy Issue

pockets.heading: Group 1 (58- 61km)
lines: 2x Battleship (Mercenary Overlord, aka Zor/ Seven Macleari)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill Zor, destroy the Outpost Headquarters and warp out.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Incoming DPS will get intense at close range, make sure your ship is tanked properly or fitted with MJD to jump to sniper range if needed.
, which is used to blitz the
Zor deals long range damage, so some tank is needed even on sniper fitted ships.
The frigates will web and may kill T2 small drones, best to use T1 drones.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: Kill Zor first to reduce the incoming DPS. If he is out of range, kill the closest Cruisers and hit Zor once he is in optimal.
Take out several Cruisers to quickly manage aggro, shoot the Battleships and then the rest of the Cruisers and the Frigates.
Start with the Frigates from group 2, then the Cruisers before they get into their optimal range (~15km) and finally the two Battleships.

pockets.heading: Logistics
lines: Non ganged logistics ships do not get aggro from group 2.

pockets.heading: Ship Detail
lines: Qty  Name  Orbit(km)  Velocity(m/s)  Shield(hp)  Armor(hp)  Shield Resist(%): EM/Exp/Kin/Th  Armor Resist(%): EM/Exp/Kin/Th  DPS: EM/Exp/Kin/Th

RightHandofZazzmatazz4.tips:
Incoming DPS will get intense at close range, make sure your ship is tanked properly or fitted with MJD to jump to sniper range if needed.
Zor drops Zbikoki's Hacker Card, which is used to blitz the Worlds Collide L4 mission.
Zor occasionally drops Zor's Custom Navigation Hyper-Link - a ~80 mil implant.
Zor deals long range damage, so some tank is needed even on sniper fitted ships.
The frigates will web and may kill T2 small drones, best to use T1 drones.

pockets.heading: Group 1 (15km) (Automatic aggro)
lines: 6x Alvi (Raider Alvi, Splinter Alvi, Infester Alvi)
May spawn the elite 'Strain Infester Alvi' which Scrams and Webs.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: None, complete on all NPCs dead.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Pocket 1: Asteroid Mining Post, Dropped nothing

pockets.heading: Group 1 (20km)
lines: Triggers spawn upon random ship's destruction

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill all drones in pocket 1. Group 1 in pocket 2(sometimes Group 2 has to be killed too, appears to be random). Warp out.

info.Video: Ishtar, Raven Navy Issue, Dominix, Machariel, Abaddon

pockets.heading: 1st Pocket
lines: Upon warp in, you will find a single hostile, the
, which will call in reinforcements upon reaching a certain level of damage:

0- 2x Elite Frigate (Strain Render Alvi) Webifier/ Warp Disruptor
0- 1x Elite Frigate (Strain Splinter Alvi) Webifier/ Warp Disruptor
Acceleration gate to the next pocket is at 7km.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: Stop shooting the Mother Drone and take out each spawn, this avoids getting swarmed and possibly overwhelmed by their combined DPS.
If your ship is well tanked, you may opt to finish the Mother Drone first and take out the swarm as it approaches.
The highest DPS in this Pocket comes from the Mother Drone.

pockets.heading: Loot and Bounty
lines: Mother Ship drops an Elite Drone AI.

RogueEradication5.title: Rogue Eradication, Level 5

pockets.heading: First Pocket
lines: At gate's destination, NPCs await your ship in two clusters: One behind you, and one to your left.  All ships, missile batteries, and sentries are between 20 – 25km away. Full Room aggro upon warp-in.
2 x Frigates (Strain Raider Alvi) orbits at 7 km
2 x Cruisers (Strain Atomizer Alvum) orbits at 19 km
(8 x Matriarch Alvus) orbits at 39 km
(4 x Alvus Ruler) orbits at 31 km
2 x Drone Energy Neutralizer Sentry IIIs

pockets.heading: Second Pocket
lines: Acceleration Gate dangerously lands your ship on top of a Drone Bunker and several Wall structures that can entangle your ship.  Landing spots vary slightly per gate activation so entanglement is chance based. All NPCs surround you between 1 – 9 km away, and retreat to their respective orbits.  Full Room aggro upon warp-in.
(7 x Matriarch Alvus) orbits at 39 km
(7 x Alvus Queen) orbits at 36 km
2 x Drone Energy Neutralizer Sentry IIIs

pockets.heading: Structures:
lines: Dropped no loot in both pockets

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: Plan your tank's resistances and repair for up to 2010 hp/s of damage from initial agro. Dealt as:
Use a passive tank. Or plan a capacitor that recharges or receives 80 Units/s.
Mission is flagged complete when all ships are destroyed

RogueEradication5.tips:
Plan your tank's resistances and repair for up to 2010 hp/s of damage from initial agro. Dealt as:
Pocket 1 - 1,728 hp/s (Therm: 46%, Expl: 26%, Kin: 22%, EM: 6%)
Pocket 2 - 2,010 hp/s (Therm: 36%, Expl: 35%, Kin: 15%, EM: 14%)
Use a passive tank. Or plan a capacitor that recharges or receives 80 Units/s.
Mission is flagged complete when all ships are destroyed

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: At gate's destination, NPCs surround your warp-in point at distances between 15 – 25km with Missile Batteries at 55km.  Full Room aggro upon warp-in.
Position and Orientation of your ship at warp-in

pockets.heading: Initial Group:
lines: 4x Frigates (Strain Barracude Alvi/Devilfish Alvi) orbits at 2-10 km
3x Destroyers (Shatter Alvior/Ripper Alvior) orbits at 3 km,
4x Cruisers (Atomizer Alvum/Nuker Alvum*) orbits at 17-19 km,
(all destroyers and cruisers need to be destroyed for trigger)
7x Battleships (Alvus Queen/Alvus Ruler/Supreme Alvus Parasite) orbits at 31-36 km

pockets.heading: - Spawn 2a
lines: 4x Frigates (Strain Hunter Alvi) orbits at 11 km
3x Cruisers (Strain Nuker Alvum) orbits at 17 km,
(all 7 ships are part of one "trigger group")
3-4x Battleships (Matriarch Alvus/Alvus Queen) orbits at 36 km, Triggers 2c
1x Battleship (Inettria Volur or other named battleship) orbits at 40km, Objective

pockets.heading: Tactics/Notes/Spoilers:
lines: Plan your tank's resistances and repair for 1718 hp/s of damage from initial agro.  Dealt as: (Exp: 33%, Therm: 26%, Kin: 25%, EM: 16%)
Use a passive tank. Or plan a capacitor that recharges or receives 80 Units/s.
Lowering Incoming Damage:  Missile Batteries, Frigates and Destroyers won’t spawn more ships so consider taking them out first to reduce incoming damage.
Mission is flagged complete when the named battleship (Spawn 2c) is destroyed.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill all ships of trigger group 2a (7 ships)
Kill all ships of spawn group 2a (7 ships)
Kill all ships of spawn group 2b (3-4 ships)
Kill all ships of spawn group 2c (1 ship)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: The Slave Pen taking hull damage triggers the spawn after about 5-7 minutes
Spawn will occur in about 9-11 minutes even if you ignore the Slave Pen

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destory Slave Pen, Loot Prisoners, Warp Out

pockets.heading: Single Group
lines: 3x Cruisers (Corpum Arch Priest/Arch Sage/Arch Templar/Revenant/Dark Corpum Arch Engraver)

pockets.heading: Asteroids
lines: Scordite roids 10x - 25k per asteroid = total of 250k
Veldspar roids 6x - 90k per asteroid = total of 540k
Safe to tanked AFK mine after clearing. 1-2 low level rats will harass you but are easily tanked. Remember not to turn in mission.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: The gate lands you right in the middle of a defensive square structure with sentries & ships on each corner @ 5 to 16km with a 15 second-ish delay before being aggro'd.

pockets.heading: Single group
lines: Note that sentries have 250km range though and will still hit you at 100km. This should however be tankable long enough to pick off the ships as they come toward you.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Walls & Elevators do not have loot.
Sentry Guns drop Medium Frequency Crystals.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: In the last pocket you only have to kill the Slavers this completes the mission and you can warp out. Other kills are optional.

pockets.heading: Standing
lines: Killing the Slave Pen in part 1 incurs a -4.0% standing penalty with The Blood Raider Covenant

RogueSlaveTrader4.title: The Rogue Slave Trader (1 of 2), Level 4

info.Recommended ship classes: Battleship, Command Ship, HAC, Strategic Cruiser.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: The Sansha Slaver battleship will spawn (near the Beacon) ~10 minutes after warp-in.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill or ignore the initial group and destroy the Slave Pen.
Pickup the Prisoners and warp out.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Don't forget to destroy the Slave Pen (~40km) and pickup the Prisoners, you may want to fit an Afterburner or use a Tractor Beam.
When the Spawn [finally] arrives he will attack the Noctis salvaging, be prepared or just don't bother waiting for it.

pockets.heading: Loot and Bounty
lines: Recommended ship classes: Battleship, Command Ship, HAC, Strategic Cruiser.
: The incoming DPS is fairly heavy. Make sure your ship has a proper tank or fit a Micro Jump Drive to snipe.

pockets.heading: Initial Gate
lines: Auto aggro from the group guarding the acceleration gate.
Eliminate all ships to unlock the gate.
1x Elite Cruiser (Centum Controller aka Centum Loyal Fiend/ Hellhound)

pockets.heading: Deadspace Pocket
lines: 2x Elite Cruiser (Sansha Slaver aka Centum Loyal Hellhound/ Fiend)
1x Battleship (Centus Slave Lord/ Plague Lord/ Savage Lord)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Clear the initial group to unlock the acceleration gate.
Kill the two Sansha Slaver Elite Cruisers, done.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Take out the Missile Towers and Battlecruisers first, to reduce incoming DPS.
For transverse tank, primary targets are the webifier Frigates and Towers. Eliminate them as quickly as possible using your drones.
Heavy Missile Batteries can aggro multiple ships simultaneously.

pockets.heading: Mining
lines: Initial Gate: 14x Veldspar (940K units), 10x Scordite (250K units) asteroids (5- 31km).

RogueSpy5.title: Rogue Spy, Level 5

info.Web/scramble: Elite drone frigs (Strain Render Alvi/Raider Alvi/Sunder Alvi)

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: When you arrive the pocket will be empty with only the Drone Structure at 100km. Drones will start spawning when you close to 60km of the structure. Everything aggros.
Position of initial groups which appear when you are 50km from the Drone Structure.

pockets.heading: Tower sentries
lines: 8 x Drone Cruise Missile Batteries (Cataclysm Cruise Missile) two groups at 50 & 80km to left and right
3 x Drone Energy Neutralizer Sentry II one each left, right, and above at 40km
1 x Drone Energy Neutralizer Sentry III 40km below

pockets.heading: Group 2 (80km in front, within Drone Structure)
lines: 2-3 x Elilte Cruisers (Strain Atomizer Alvum/Bomber Alvum/Disintegrator Alvum/Nuker Alvum)

pockets.heading: - Spawn 1 (60km Right)
lines: 3-4 x Frigates (Strain Decimator Alvi/Infester Alvi/Splinter Alvi) -
3-4 x Elite Cruisers (Strain Atomizer Alvum/Disintegrator Alvum/Nuker Alvum)

pockets.heading: - Spawn 4 (Drone Structure)
lines: – Upon destroying the Drone Structure (22,000 hp):
3-4 x Cruisers (Strain Viral Infector Alvum/Devastator Alvum)

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: Thermal Damage is initially higher than Explosive damage until Missile Batteries are destroyed
(Reducing Damage): If you trigger the initial groups, warp-out, then back in; The drones within the Drone Structure will not aggro with the rest of the room because they are too far away.

(Speed) If you can handle the damage, you can put the 50km approach time to use by destroying the Drone Structure and triggering Spawn 4. You can kill several ships by the time you reach the proximity trigger of the main groups.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: You only need to kill 3 groups to complete the mission:
Tip: To reduce waiting time until group 3 spawns, warp in an Inty (on an alt) and burn to the drone structure. That will trigger all spawns. Warp out once group 3 has spawned

RogueSpy5.tips:
Thermal Damage is initially higher than Explosive damage until Missile Batteries are destroyed
(Reducing Damage): If you trigger the initial groups, warp-out, then back in; The drones within the Drone Structure will not aggro with the rest of the room because they are too far away.
(Speed) If you can handle the damage, you can put the 50km approach time to use by destroying the Drone Structure and triggering Spawn 4. You can kill several ships by the time you reach the proximity trigger of the main groups.

info.Space type: Normal (FW warp beacon seen system wide)

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Begin Firing upon her, however, once she reaches a certain level of Armor Damage, she will call in reinforcements, listed below:
Reinforcement waves will aggro on your drones

pockets.heading: Group 1 (Spawns when 1st Imperial Courier is at Approx 50% Armor)
lines: After all these and the two closely grouped industrials are killed the mission is complete (you will get a message in local). You can kill the third industrial optionally.

pockets.heading: Group 2 (Spawns when 3rd Imperial Courier is at Approx 50% Armor)
Single pocket
lines: Single ship (Ibis) about 15k from warp-in, takes about 50 thermal damage to kill. Take the mission cargo and turn in for part 2/2.
3 Unidentified Caldari Frigates spawn near target as soon as you kill the Rogue.

pockets.heading: Single pocket
lines: Single ship (Caldari Contact - Destroyer ship) about 15k from warp-in.
Six Caldari Defender (3 Heron, 3 Ibis) spawn 5-10km from warp-in point when this ship is attacked.
Very easy to clean up remaining ships.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Kill only the first ship. There is no cargo to return.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: After going through the gate, you land 55km from the target group. Auto aggro on warp-in.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: Site contains 8x veldspar asteroids totaling 560K units.

SanshaAcquisition5.title: Sansha Acquisition, Level 5

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: 4 Battlecruisers and 4 Battleships are present around the Battletower at 50k from warp-in.  Immediate aggro.
More ships spawn around the Battletower, every 30 seconds for 5 minutes, until there is a total of:
13 x Cruisers (Centum Fiend/Hellhound/Loyal Mutilator/Loyal Torturer) orbits of 10-32k
7 x Battleships (Centus Dread Lord/Tyrant) orbits at 17-49k
Each cruise missile battery spawns a Centum Loyal Slaughterer/Execrator when destroyed.

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: No Energy Neutralizer Sentries means this mission is Active Tank friendly
Maximum damage dealing of all ships is 2204 hp/s (EM 64%, Therm 36%)
Mission is flagged complete when the Battletower is destroyed.  There are no prisoners to return despite what the mission states.

SanshaAcquisition5.tips:
No Energy Neutralizer Sentries means this mission is Active Tank friendly
Maximum damage dealing of all ships is 2204 hp/s (EM 64%, Therm 36%)
Mission is flagged complete when the Battletower is destroyed.  There are no prisoners to return despite what the mission states.

SanshaOnTheHorizon5.title: Sansha on the Horizon, Level 5

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Towers and frigates spawn on two sides, 40km from the warp-in point
24 x Frigates (Centii Loyal Butcher/Manslayer) orbits of 8-16km,
2 x Sansha Energy Neutralizer Sentry III
As Frigates are destroyed there spawns 1-5:

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: 4 x Cruisers (Centum Loyal Mutilator) orbits at 14km

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: 8 x Sansha Sentry Guns (spawn 2 at a time)

pockets.heading: Spawn 3
lines: 4 x Cruisers (Centum Loyal Hellhound) orbits at 32km

pockets.heading: Spawn 4
lines: 1 x Cruisers (Centum Loyal Slaughterer) orbits at 7km,

pockets.heading: Spawn 5
lines: 1 x Cruisers (Centum Loyal Execrator) orbits at 19km,

pockets.heading: Spawn 6 - Outpost
lines: When the Sansha Outpost (15,000 hp) is reduced to 50% shields there spawns
4 x Battleships (Centus Dread Lord) orbits at 17km

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Maximum damage of initial ships (in first 10 minutes) is 1381 hp/s (EM 60%, Therm 40%)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill the Sansha Outpost and the resulting BC + BS spawns.

SanshaOnTheHorizon5.tips: Maximum damage of initial ships (in first 10 minutes) is 1381 hp/s (EM 60%, Therm 40%)

SanshaSpies4.title: The Sansha Spies, Level 4

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Auto aggro from Group 1 or 2 at warp-in. All other groups remain neutral.
Attacking Group 1 OR 2 does not aggro the whole pocket.
Drones can be deployed as per normal.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Mission is flagged completed once you have eliminated all ships from Group 3.

pockets.heading: Standing
lines: Killing the ships incurs a -3.0% standing hit with Sansha's Nation
Killed Group 3 and received no standings penalty, not even for ship kills (Dec 2011, Crucible).

SanshaSpies4.tips: Mission is flagged completed once you have eliminated all ships from Group 3.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Kill the Spy(s) and warp out, he dies pretty fast when shot with EM damage.

SanshaSpies3.title: The Sansha Spies, level 3

pockets.heading: Single pocket
lines: After the acceleration gate, you land in the middle of 3 groups of rats.

pockets.heading: Group 1: (Aggro)
lines: They are above the entry point, and about 55km away.

pockets.heading: Group 2:
lines: They are below your entry point, and are 60km to 70km away. Proximity aggro within 20KM.

pockets.heading: Group 3:
lines: They are below and in front of the entry point, and are about 80km away.
Aggroes with Group 2 or when Group 2 is attacked.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Except for the Sentry Gun, the Sanshas can not hit at long range, so they'll all come to within tractor beam range of you
Just fire at one of the Spies and wait for 'em. Your five small T2 drones will eat up all the frigates and destroyers as long as they've fixed you as the target before you launch the drones.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Sansha Outpost: no loot, so don't waste ammo on it.

SanshaSpies3.tips:
Except for the Sentry Gun, the Sanshas can not hit at long range, so they'll all come to within tractor beam range of you
Just fire at one of the Spies and wait for 'em. Your five small T2 drones will eat up all the frigates and destroyers as long as they've fixed you as the target before you launch the drones.

Scavengers2ga.title: Scavengers, Level 2

pockets.heading: Hint
lines: There are about 50 wrecks at warp in, with wreck icons in overview.
The objective appears with a can icon in overview.
You must successfully salvage the can to open it.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Find the Reconnaissance Ship Wreck, Salvage it to access it, Take High-Tech Data Chip, warp out

pockets.heading: Hint
lines: Sends player to low security to salvage, ignoring the '5 jump' rule. Beware pirates.
Complete enough to be able to blitz the mission. Still need further information regarding additional groups.

Scavengers2ga.tips:
There are about 50 wrecks at warp in, with wreck icons in overview.
The objective appears with a can icon in overview.
You must successfully salvage the can to open it.

info.Blitz: about 2 min

pockets.heading: Mission Info Popup:
lines: This is Sangrel Minn's hideout, which is located in the midst of an area
of space infested by rogue drones. Few consider it a coincidence that
whenever Sangrel is chased into this area, the pursuers are immediately
set up on by a multitude of drone ships.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill Sangrel Minn, loot the Reports from cargo container dropped next to his wreck, warp out.

pockets.heading: Hint
lines: Drone aggro here, make sure to keep your drones out of the way.
This can be done with T1 Drones. (I didn't lose any of mine)

pockets.heading: Rewards and Bonus
lines: Bonus: 72,000 ISK for getting it done within 1 hour and 12 minutes

SaveMiners3ga.title: Save The Miners, Level 3

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Group upon warp in may vary.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Destroying the last Privateer spawns the next wave.  The last Privateer of the 2nd spawn drops the cargo container with the mission objective in it.

pockets.heading: Spawn 1 (warp-in)
lines: Final kill of these is trigger

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: No blitz, Can drops from last ship killed.

pockets.heading: Tags to be looted
lines: 3x Federation Navy Command Sergeant Major Insignia I (~ cruisers in Pocket 1)
7x Federation Navy Fleet Captain Insignia I
7x Federation Navy Fleet Major Insignia I

SaveMiners3ga.loot:
3x Federation Navy Command Sergeant Major Insignia I (~ cruisers in Pocket 1)
7x Federation Navy Fleet Captain Insignia I
7x Federation Navy Fleet Major Insignia I

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Junction and Walls, 2x Stationary Mammoth, Stationary Badger II, 2x Dirty Shipyard: drop nothing
There's a targetable 'LCO Cargo Rig' which is invulnerable.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Mission given by Brutor Tribe Treasury to a newly-created pilot, so pilot had to get within 17km to target; all eventually Aggro'd once the first was shot at.

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: I took another character into it to help out my newbie character, and found that I could get the right group to Aggro me alone when targetted, and shot, from a distance.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Kill Destroyer and the group around him (Gistior Defacer/Haunter) by the ghost ship and the mission will be marked as complete.
Despite the mission telling you to 'destroy all the ships', only the 'main target' and the surrounding group needs to be destroyed.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Killing group 3 will complete the mission

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Ships spawn in small groups a few seconds apart, no initial aggro
They all aggro when you shoot at any one.

pockets.heading: Asteroids
lines: Mining causes a few frigs to spawn during the process, 3 may be the most at one time.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Angel Bronze Tag from one of the wrecks

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Groups appear a few seconds apart, no initial aggro.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Group 1 is the objective. Shooting at it causes full pocket aggro.

pockets.heading: Video
lines: The video in the following link shows you where everyone will show up, and their range. This guide also only shows one of many ways to take out the bad guys.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket (30km)
lines: Firing on one ships Aggros all (Ranges 37-57km)
15x Frigates (Seeker, Follow, Templar, Worshiper, Herald, Collector)(Collector, Seeker - Jammers (Weak))

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: No auto-aggro at warp-in.  Groups aggro individually.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Gate to pocket 2 is 60 km from arrival point
Two groups, 35-85 km from arrival point

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 2x Elite Frigate (Ammatar Navy Gamma I Support)

pockets.heading: Group 2
lines: 4x Elite Frigate (Ammatar Navy Delta I Support Frigate / Delta II Support Frigate)

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Gate to pocket 3 is 44 km from arrival point
Two groups, 40-60 km from arrival point

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 2x Eilte Frigate (Ammatar Navy Gamma II Support)

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: One group, 65-80 km from arrival point.
2x Eilte Frigate (Ammatar Navy Gamma II Support Frigate)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill all Ships in Pocket 1. Then kill Group 3 in Pocket 2. (Groups are all mixed together once they spawn. Target Group 3 based on name and distance. But see note below.)

pockets.heading: Note
lines: There's some disagreement on whether this mission is blitzable. Following my own blitz tip that has worked before, I just tried to blitz this mission twice, and it did NOT complete. Possibly the completion trigger is randomized, and hard to identify, due to Pocket 2 spawning all mixed together.

info.Web/Scramble: Frigates with names starting with Chief Republic

pockets.heading: Single Group:
lines: Only 2 BS res frigates and bc. 50km away. Gate 60km away.

pockets.heading: Single Group:
lines: Gate and NPCs 40k away from warp.

pockets.heading: Single Group:
lines: in Pocket 3 kill only the Battleships

Score4sa.title: The Score, Level 4

info.Recommended Ship Classes: Battleship, Command Ship, HAC, Strategic Cruiser.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Group 1 can be independently attacked without drawing aggro.
Drones can be safely deployed as per normal.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Attacking Group 2 will aggro the entire pocket.
Attacking either Group 1 or Group 3 can/will aggro Group 2.

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: Group 1 may or may not aggro at warp-in.
Group 1 & 2 can be independently attacked without drawing aggro.
Attacking Group 3 will aggro the entire pocket.
Did not get pocket aggro on attacking Group 3 as of 22-08-2014

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: Mission is flagged completed once you have eliminated the Centus Plague Lord or the closest battleship in Group 3 (when there is no Centus Plague Lord present).

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Pocket 1 & 2 : Eliminate all hostile ships to unlock the warp gates.
Pocket 3 : Eliminate the Centus Plague Lord or the closest battleship in Group 3 (when there is no Centus Plague Lord present).

Score4sa.tips: Mission is flagged completed once you have eliminated the Centus Plague Lord or the closest battleship in Group 3 (when there is no Centus Plague Lord present).

pockets.heading: 2nd Group (52- 80km)
lines: Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 60- 62km and is locked until all hostiles are cleared.

pockets.heading: 3rd Group (50- 52km)
lines: Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 41- 44km from warp in.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Clear the 1st room, then kill the 4 Battleships in the final room.  UPDATE 4/24/2020.  This does not appear to work had to clear entire first and second pockets.  4 BS in final room ends mission still.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: Cleared all pockets from warp in with a T2 fit Dominix (T2 Sentries), without a scratch (~592 DPS).

pockets.heading: Spawn
lines: Shows up when you approach the Recon Outpost.

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: on Warp in you will be told to Take out the Warehouses

pockets.heading: Structure Loot
lines: Warehouses and Towers may drop ammunition as loot.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Last Ship killed triggers next spawn.
The Disabled Badger may be accessed once the pocket is clear of all Hostiles.

pockets.heading: Mining
lines: 1x Arkonor (3,000 units), 11x Veldspar (50- 95K units each) asteroids (7- 25km).

pockets.heading: Group 2 (70km)
lines: Structure loot: random ammo, Coolant, 2x drones

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Only Group 1 needs to be destroyed to complete the mission objective.

pockets.heading: Group 2: (60km)
lines: The mission has Omber and Veldspar roids in it!

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: A lot of Amarr Navy Sentries

pockets.heading: Group 2:
lines: Amarr Navy Raid Leader (Drops mission objective in a can)

pockets.heading: Group 2 (85-95km):
lines: Mission completes when Group 1 is destroyed.

pockets.heading: Single pocket
lines: 1x Frigate (True Centii Servant (Sansha EM Damage to kill))
The structure drops a can with some modules and trade goods.
Low-Tech Energy harvester dropped cheap ammo and rockets.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Radiating Telescope Structure drops loot @ about 50km

pockets.heading: Video
lines: The video in the following link shows you where everyone will show up, and their range. This guide also only shows one of many ways to take out the bad guys.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Complete on Group 2 destroyed, do not need to kill Group 1

pockets.heading: Hint
lines: Due to 75km to Group 2, an AB may be useful for slow, short range ships

info.Blitz: Kill Group 2 (far group).

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Drones may get aggro from group 2.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Spawns names may vary, this is an example.

pockets.heading: Note
lines: After about 10 minutes, while i was looting, A Correlum Chief Guard spawned in.

SerpentAndTheSlaves4sesa.title: The Serpent and the Slaves, Level 4

pockets.heading: Initial Group (Auto-aggro)
lines: Reinforcemement waves are triggered by killing the last ship of the entire group.
Be careful, reinforcemement waves aggro drones.

info.Blitz: Kill Franz Krealo to trigger mission completion.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: No warp-in aggro, no triggers, no groups triggering other groups, only minor dampening.
3 Light Missile Batteriy (aggroes you if distance to them 40km or less)

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Aggro from 1x Gistum (Cruiser class, 13km) and 5x Tower Sentry Serpentis II (7-22km).

pockets.heading: Pocket 3
lines: Warp-in aggro from group 1, no triggers, no range aggro or only extremely small range (<10km)
Kill Franz Krealo to trigger mission completion.

pockets.heading: Group 4: (center front, 40km, Serpentis Bunker, Brothel, Pressure Silo)
Group 6: (bounced out of the force field, 110-130km, Serpentis Shipyard)
lines: Approx 1,9mil to 7,0mil in Loot & Salvage, 2,636,697 In Bounty

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Kill all the Serpentis ships and the "Partially constructed Megathron" to complete the mission.
Everything is disguised as "Serpentis Looter" except the Lord Admiral which is disguised as "Colonel 'Bat' Guano".
Everything aggroes at jump-in. Easier than most standard missions. Similar to Duo of Death.

pockets.heading: Group 1:
lines: 2x Serpentis Cruise Missile Batteries 20km from initial warp in

pockets.heading: 1st Pocket
lines: The warp gate will be locked until you have eliminated all hostile ships.

pockets.heading: 1st Group (18- 23km, Scanner Outpost)
lines: Attack Trigger Cruiser Spawn, Web/ Scramble

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: Serpentis Storage Facility drops NPC trade goods.

pockets.heading: 2nd Pocket
lines: The 2nd Group can be attacked independently without drawing pocket aggro.
Attacking the 1st Group will aggro the 3rd Group and vice-versa.
The warp gate will be locked until you have eliminated all hostile ships.

pockets.heading: 3rd Group (35- 50km, Hollow Asteroid)
lines: Attacking this group trigger Frigate Spawn

pockets.heading: 3rd Pocket
lines: The 1st and 2nd Group may be attacked independently without drawing pocket aggro.
Attacking the 3rd Group will aggro the 4th Group (Krayak Sarpanti) and vice versa.

pockets.heading: 2nd Group (20- 39km, Strange Rock Formation)
lines: 3x Battleship (Core Rear Admiral/ Commodore/ Port Admiral)

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: Serpentis Stronghold structure has over 200,000 HP, does not have to be destroyed and drops nothing of value.
Serpentis Storage Facility drops Commodities and 50 Metal Scraps.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: 1st and 2nd Pocket: Eliminate all ships to unlock the warp gate.
3rd Pocket: Kill or ignore the 1st Group. Eliminate the 3 Spider Drones and Krayek Sarpanti.

pockets.heading: Single pocket
lines: Group 1 aggro on warp in. Structures drop no loot.

pockets.heading: Group 3:
lines: warps in when both Spies are destroyed

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Fly past structure, should see spies spawn ahead, kill them.
Many people has reported that it's not impossible to blitz this mission by going to the structure.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Serpentis Bunker: Sometimes the Serpentis Bunker drops a container.

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Just send out T1 drones with light gun fire, and align with the stargate you need to use when you're done with this mission.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Attacking the Sentry Guns aggroes everything.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket:
lines: Auto aggro from Sentry Towers, attack draws aggro from Hostiles.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Take out all the ships. You don't have to take out the towers.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Damage from Sentries is minimal, take them out to draw aggro from the ships so they'll close in.
Either fit an AB, MWD or MJD to go after them or bring Warden II to snipe.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: The target may appear as Olufami, Elena Gazky or Schmidt along with a Seven Assassin or Thug. The mission will complete when both of them are killed.  The rest are optional kills.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: The Prison will drop 5 units of Mining Crystals and 10 livestock (Elite Slaves, Slaves or Prisoners).

info.Space type: Normal with gates. MWD works. Bookmark will bring you to the gate.
info.Recommended damage dealing: Therm vs. Industrials, Exp vs. Rest

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Aggro from all ships except Industrials on warp in.

SevensBrothel2.title: The Seven's Brothel, level 2

info.Blitz: 52 sec- 2:30 min

pockets.heading: Message On Warp In:
lines: This is the location of one of Jakerion Pahydan's brothels. Jakerion is an infamous outlaw who controls a loose-knit criminal organization which split itself from the Serpentis a few years ago. 'The Seven' it is called, named after the small group of comrades within the Serpentis who founded the organization.

Jakerion's popular nickname, Zazzmatazz, is known by most Gallente Federation citizens from the hit movie 'Into The Deep', which portrays a few Gallente heroes who brave the 'Seven's' stronghold and rescue a damsel in distress.

pockets.heading: Group 4 (30km)
lines: 1x Tower Sentry Drone I, aggro after a few sec

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: You only need to destroy group 3 and mission is completed.

pockets.heading: Hints
lines: Warping out wherever and back in at 0m will change distances this way

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: The brothel is the only building that drops a can. (differs between dancers, janitors and homeless)

pockets.heading: Salvage/loot
lines: Kruul Wreck sometimes leaves his DNA in it

pockets.heading: Rewards and Bonus
lines: Bonus: 95,000 ISK for getting it done in 1 hour and 40 minutes

SevensBrothel2.tips:
G1, 60km
G2, 100km
G3, 50km
G4, 120km. Tower doesn't aggro

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Group 1 is the hardest hitting group. No webifiers, so turn around and move away from the blob while tanking the group. At a safe distance (100km from next rat) blow them up. Drones didn't aggro the rest of the pocket at 50km from the next group.
Anathema Matou adds: while the mission does not have drone aggro or stage aggro, the second person to warp in will get aggro from the group with the webifiers, unless that group is already aggressed.
*Effective Jan. 2009, there are two versions of this mission:
Version A, Group 1 will auto-aggro but Group 2 will ignore you until it is attacked.

Version B, there will be no auto-aggro, but Group 2 will aggro as soon as you fire on Group 1 --> HOWEVER, Group 2 can be attacked without causing aggro by Group 1.  So, if you aren't attacked by Group 1 within 20 seconds or so of warping in, move out to sniping range and attack Group 2 first.*

pockets.heading: Group 1: (Auto Aggro (approx 20k))
lines: After blowing this group up, take out the group with the webifiers (Group 2). No other group will be aggroed.

pockets.heading: Group 2: (approx 25k)
lines: Next three groups are consisting of short range, low damage battleships. No webifier/scrambling rats.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: No webifiers or scramblers. I recommend killing the Destroyers first, then the Sentry Guns and then Battleship.
Hitalorl reports: One of the structures in the second stage drops some trade goods (Uranium, Carbon, Livestock and long-limb Roes)
The mission loot drops from the last rat killed.

pockets.heading: Single Group: (15km) (Automatic aggro)
lines: Storage Silo drops an Amarr Nexus chip (type varies...view comments below) and 50x High tech data chips.
Tip: If you have a short range setup and enough to tank them easily, go for the BS first as they like to move out to over 40k range. Everything else stays nice and close.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: All spawns are quite close and vaguely in a semi-circle. Multiple spawns aggro if you try to use drones.
Can use drones if you pull the groups away from the circle
Acceleration Gate is locked until all ships are eliminated.

pockets.heading: Group 1 (might auto-aggro) - 15km
lines: (aggro is random depending on your exact warp-in range)

pockets.heading: Group 2 (might aggro with group 1) - 24km
lines: (aggro from shooting group 1 if you did not already have range-aggro; also drone-aggro based on range)

pockets.heading: Group 4 - 40km
lines: 2x Battleships (Gist Seraphim/Gist Cherubim)- Seraphim does EM damage

pockets.heading: Single Group (Auto Aggro) - 17km
lines: Last ship you kill will drop the objective can. (50 m^3)

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Some have reported no drone aggro, need update on this.  Drones can get aggroed by group 2 (20 km away). To avoid this, turn to the right and AB away from the group. Usually a 30+km distance will do. You can use medium drones to pop the webbing frigates but watch drones carefully!

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Storage Silo [one of Minmatar UUA, UUB, or UUC Nexus, ammo, general items]
Habitation Module (There is 3 of them but only one drops the items) [General items]
(Silo is a Deadspace Overseer's Structure, turn on Large Collidable Structure on Overview to see others)

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Here you will find Matique Karani, whom does not aggro and is an optional kill. He will reveal the location of the Agent for your next mission.
Get the mission from the Agent, destroy the Neon Sign to get the Key to the acceleration gate (0.8% Minmatar Republic standing loss).

In the pocket you will find Dari Akell among several Habitation Modules. Destroy her ship and she will drop in a Container, loot it and bring her back to the Agent through the gate nearby, this will complete both missions.

pockets.heading: Structure
lines: Habitation Modules drop 10 Refugees, 10 Dairy Products and 10 Superconductors.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: At warp-in there is 1 group. Upon this group's destruction a reinforcement wave spawns.
Last ship in 2nd wave drops a cargo container.  The 17 miners (i.e. 34.0m^3 mission objective) are in that can.

ShipyardTheft4gu.title: Shipyard Theft, Level 4

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: You may get auto aggroed by Group A upon warp-in, but in some other circumstances, there will be no aggro as you warp-in.
Attacking Group A will aggro Group B.
Groups C and D can be aggroed individually.
Attacking Group E will aggro the entire pocket.
Drones can be deployed normally and do not cause pocket aggro.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: If Group A does not auto aggro at warp-in, eliminate Group B first and then Group A.
Recommended order of elimination : Group B, Group A, Group C, Group D and finally Group E.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Auto aggro from all upon warp-in.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Storage Silo drops Caldari CU-1/AZ-1/BY-1 Nexus Chip and some trade goods. All other structures drop no loot.
Last ship killed will drop the storage containers needed to complete the mission. Make sure you loot it.

ShipyardTheft4gu.tips:
If Group A does not auto aggro at warp-in, eliminate Group B first and then Group A.
Recommended order of elimination : Group B, Group A, Group C, Group D and finally Group E.


Storage Silo drops Caldari CU-1/AZ-1/BY-1 Nexus Chip and some trade goods. All other structures drop no loot.
Last ship killed will drop the storage containers needed to complete the mission. Make sure you loot it.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Tip: When getting the initial aggro, it's smart to move away from the other groups, before firing. This way you won't get drone-aggro or other unexpected aggro.

pockets.heading: Group 5 - 50km
lines: Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 11km.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: The storage silo only occasionally drops random ammo, a Gallente Alpha/ Beta Nexus Chip, and 50 High-tech Transmitters, Small Arms or High-Tech Manufacturing Tools.
Some Habitation modules drop general goods.

pockets.heading: Single Group:
lines: Killing Terak Nomuri completes the objective
Pleasure hub has decent chance of dropping science skillbook(s) and materials (4 kinds of R.A.M assembly modules)

SilencetheInformant2.title: Silence the Informant, level 2

info.Blitz: (Same time as no blitz)

pockets.heading: Group 1 (20km) (Automatic Aggro)
lines: On entering pocket, receive transmission, and group 2 and 3 spawn.

pockets.heading: Single Group (20km)
lines: Tower will aggro upon entry. Mission frigate will have delayed aggro.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy everything in pocket 1 to advance, then pocket 2, then only need objective in pocket 3

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Pocket 1: Battery, Bunker: Bunker may drop random refineables
Pocket 3: Scanner Post, Mobile Residence: Residence can drop implants

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: AB is very useful in pocket 2 for slow, short range ships
Mobile Residence is listed as Deadspace Overseer's Structure in Overview
T1 Drones work great in this mission. Just make sure to set them on agressive.

pockets.heading: Rewards and Bonus
lines: Bonus: 136,000 if you complete it in 3 hours and 10 minutes.

pockets.heading: Bounty
lines: Mission Generic: 5,000 ISK  (tends to drop an implant)

SilencetheInformant2.tips:
AB is very useful in pocket 2 for slow, short range ships
Mobile Residence is listed as Deadspace Overseer's Structure in Overview
T1 Drones work great in this mission. Just make sure to set them on agressive.

pockets.heading: 1st Pocket (Drones)
lines: Auto-aggro from the Sentry Towers, attacking them will aggro the entire pocket (use to draw 3rd group closer).
Recommended order of elimination: 2nd, 4th, 3rd and 1st group.
Aggressive drones may attack the 1st group and cause unwanted aggro. Watch out for drone aggro.

pockets.heading: 3rd Group (75- 90km)
lines: 6x Cruiser/ Battlecruiser (Disintegrator Alvum/ Enforcer/ Striker Alvatis)

pockets.heading: 4th Group (50- 60km)
lines: Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 4km.

pockets.heading: 2nd Pocket (Mercenaries)
lines: Auto aggro from the 1st group, eliminated safely without drawing aggro from the entire pocket.
The 2nd and 3rd groups will show up several seconds later.
Recommended order of elimination:  1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th group.

pockets.heading: 3rd Group (55- 60km, Asteroid Mining Post)
lines: 2x Battleship (Mercenary Overlord, Jericho Tezmar/ Roranok Nesmyrthas)

pockets.heading: 4th Group (75- 80km, Ruined Stargate)
lines: Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 6km.

pockets.heading: 3rd Pocket (Ex-Elite Secret Agent)
lines: Auto aggro from the Sentries. Far Sentries (100km and more) will not aggro until you approach closer than 99km.
Attacking any of the Sentries will aggro the lone cruiser.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: You have to kill everything, but the Sentry Towers in Pocket 1 and 2 to get to Pocket 3.
Snipe and kill the lone cruiser. Warp out.

pockets.heading: Mining
lines: 2nd Pocket has 4 Veldspar asteroids of 1,200 units each (56- 90km).

pockets.heading: Loot and Bounty
lines: The Elite Drone Parasite drops 5 Elite Drone AI.

info.Web/Scramble: Angel Webifier, Spider Drones II, Angel Viper

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Small Armory drops 4-8 random ammo and missiles

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: 1st pocket: only kill ships(not sentries), 2nd pocket: just the armoury

pockets.heading: Single Group: (40km) (Automatic aggro)
lines: Named cruiser may be one of the following:

pockets.heading: Mining
lines: 279059 units of Veldspar from 32 asteroids - 35-55km from entry point

info.Blitz: destroy the structure, warp out.

pockets.heading: Warp In
lines: The "ship" you are asked to destroy is actually a Large Collidable Structure. Make sure you have these visible on your overview because you might not see it in space. The frigates will spawn when you approach the structure.
Standings loss: -0.3 Combat - Ship Kill - Static Caracal Navy Issue.
Space type: Normal, no gates  (MWD will work)

pockets.heading: Respawn 2
lines: Can dropped from last kill (Ship Logs)
You get a small warded container just for accepting the mission, and the last rat killed also drops one.  Only one is required when you turn the mission in, which leaves you with a spare.
This mission has since been changed by CCP, and Small Warded Containers no longer have anything to do with this mission.

pockets.heading: Warp in
lines: Empty pocket, but they will spawn after you get within 10 km

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: Last kill dropped can (Small Warded Container)

SmashTheGallenteStockyard5ga.title: Smash The Gallente Stockyard, Level 5

info.Space type: Deadspace (MWD does not work) with single entry gate

pockets.heading: Spawn 2:
lines: Triggered when the Last BS is popped from the Spawn 1

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: Spawn 1 has a maximum of 814 dps (39% kinetic, 61% thermal)
Spawn 2 has a maximum of 515 dps (37% kinetic, 63% thermal)

pockets.heading: Spawn 1:
lines: 2x Gallete Energy Neutralizer III (after 2 minutes) (2x more on destruction of initial 2)

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: Spawn 1 has a maximum of 1393 dps (33% kinetic, 67% thermal)
Spawn 2 has a maximum of 1623 dps (38% kinetic, 62% thermal)
It is recommend that you use Logistics support to help keep your passive tank alive

SmashTheGallenteStockyard5ga.tips:
Spawn 1 has a maximum of 814 dps (39% kinetic, 61% thermal)
Spawn 2 has a maximum of 515 dps (37% kinetic, 63% thermal)

Spawn 1 has a maximum of 1393 dps (33% kinetic, 67% thermal)
Spawn 2 has a maximum of 1623 dps (38% kinetic, 62% thermal)

SmashSupplier4am.title: Smash the Supplier, Level 4

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: No aggro upon warp-in. One big group at around 60 km distance (perfect for sniping). Ships begin to spawn after accepting the mission, so be quick to the encounter otherwise you may be faced with overwhelming fire.
No information regarding individual spawns at the moment, following a full list of ships that spawn:
4 Elite Frigates (Divine Imperial Bahir/Divine Imperial Napat
4 Elite Frigates (Divine Imperial Valok/Divine Imperial Paladin
7 Elite Cruisers (Imperial Templar Mathura/Imperial Templar Donus/Imperial Templar Agatho)
4 Elite Battleships (Imperial Templar Dominator/Imperial Templar Martyr)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Blow up the Enemy Control Tower, and the mission is complete (Shipyards explode by themselves once Control Tower is killed).  The Control Tower has zero resists, so hit it with your highest damage ammo.

pockets.heading: Structures:
lines: You have to destroy the control tower to finish the mission. The 3 enemy shipyards automatically explode when you destroy the tower.

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: You should use a fast ship, so you would be too fast for enemy guns.
The Control Tower has approximately 150,000hp. Fit for a good tank if you're going for the blitz.
Destroying the Control Tower incurs a 2.4% standing penalty. Decline this mission if you care about your Amarr standings.
Imperial Navy Captain Insignia I x6
Imperial Navy Colonel Insignia I x5
Imperial Navy General Insignia I x14
Imperial Navy General Insignia II x10
Imperial Navy Major Insignia I x5
Imperial Navy Midshipman Insignia II x4
Imperial Navy Midshipman Insignia III x5
Imperial Navy Sergeant Insignia III x6
Imperial Navy Sergeant Major Insignia I x6
0.02% loss per standing tick as well as the 2.4% loss for the Control Tower's destruction

SmashSupplier4am.tips:
You should use a fast ship, so you would be too fast for enemy guns.
The Control Tower has approximately 150,000hp. Fit for a good tank if you're going for the blitz.
Destroying the Control Tower incurs a 2.4% standing penalty. Decline this mission if you care about your Amarr standings.

Tags:











Standing loss:

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Closest Rats to Warp-in at 56km,  No aggro.

pockets.heading: Frigates
lines: Ship Count from initial warp-in only.  Shipyards may spawn more when fleet is aggressed.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: The mission objective is stated as destroying the 4 Shipyards & the control tower with all rats.  Blitz may be possible by destroying structures first (untested).

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: Individual ship-classes can be aggroed separately (i.e. all frigates at once OR all cruisers at once OR all battleships).  In that order, individual aggro verified.  Not sure if aggroing larger ships first will cause mass-aggro of remaining fleet or attacking structures will cause mass-aggro (needs testing).

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Entire pocket will aggro when engaged. Spawn 1 spawns when attacking Group 2, might spawn otherwise aswell.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill only group 1, loot one transport wreck and warp out.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: You arrive approx 25km from a small group. No aggro.
Group 2 and 3 spawn upon approaching the Transports.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Loot one of the transport wrecks or use militants from your hangar or the market
Standings loss: -0.3 Combat - Ship Kill - Personnel Transport

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: 2 spawns at warp in. No auto aggro.

pockets.heading: Group 2: (30-40km)
lines: Taking the cruiser into armour triggers:

pockets.heading: First Reinforcement Spawn: (spawns at the gate to the 2nd pocket)
lines: Taking one of the cruisers into armour triggers:

pockets.heading: Second Reinforcement Spawn: (spawns at the gate to the 2nd pocket)
Pocket 2
lines: One spawn at warp in. Auto aggro after approx 10 seconds.

pockets.heading: First Reinforcement Spawn: (spawns at the Shipyard)
Second Reinforcement Spawn: (spawns at the Shipyard)
lines: Taking one of the cruisers (highest bounty) into 30% armour triggers:

pockets.heading: Third Reinforcement Spawn: (spawns at the Shipyard)
lines: This wave does not always spawn.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy all ships in Pocket 1 to unlock the gate. Destroy the Transport ships in Pocket 2 and loot them. After that, destroy the Battlecruiser and Spawn 1 for mission completion.

pockets.heading: Asteroids
lines: Acceleration Gate to Pocket 2 is at 58km

pockets.heading: Note
lines: Shoot Group 1 first and neither Group 2 nor Group 3 will aggro.  Afterward, both Groups 2 and 3 will aggro no matter which you shoot first.
objective of 10 militants in each transport wreck [only one required].

pockets.heading: Standing
lines: This penalty was incurred for destroying Serpentis's Serpentis Personnel Transport

pockets.heading: Bounty
lines: Roughly 1,029,947 ISK for killing all enemies.

pockets.heading: Group 2 (45km)
lines: Some of this group spawns after warp in, then mixes in

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: You only need to destroy group 2 to complete the mission.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: 3x Colony, 1x Installation.. lots of hp, drop nothing

info.Notes: Breeding Facility will drop a large amount of slaves for you.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Galin Famis warps out so don't worry about trying to shoot him. Mercs will warp in to shoot you.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Notes: Breeding Facility will drop a large amount of slaves for you.
Note: Battlecruisers and above cannot use jump gate.

pockets.heading: Group 4 (88- 91km, Fortified Spatial Rift)
lines: Acceleration gate is 28km away from warp in.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Pocket 2: Only the ships in the group with the Transports needs to be destroyed to complete the objective (don't forget to loot the 10 Militants).

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: I've kited this in an armor tanked Kronos without ever getting into armor. All you need in both pockets is an AB to keep out of their range (~70km), fit accordingly.
I've sniped from the warp-in beacon in a Dominix with Bouncer II, starting with closest Hostile (group 2 was closer) only got to 75% Shield.
In the 2nd pocket on the other hand, the hostiles close in fast, either burn off or Micro Jump when the heat gets too intense.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Gate is locked until all enemies destroyed
Proximity aggro on groups 2 & 3 when within 6km of the gate.

pockets.heading: Group 4: Dysfunctional Solar Harvester (90-105km)
lines: Attacking Group 1 OR 3: Aggroes whole pocket.
Attacking Group 2 OR 4: Aggroes Group 1 & 3 only. The last group will remain neutral and can be aggroed separately.
Attacking Group 4 may only aggro Group 1. I'm not sure it always works.

You can Eiminate both groups 4 and 1 without drawing pocket agro but it gets a bit complicated. you need to fly your ship off to the side putting the station ruins between your ship and groups 1 2 and 3. after your within range eliminate group 4 this will draw group 1 agro. if you wait for a few minuts after destroying group 4 you will notice that group 1 will be stuck in the station ruins unable to get close to you. additionally they will have drifted out of agro range of the other 2 pockets. at this point it should be safe to eliminate group 1 without 2 and 3 agroing you.

pockets.heading: Group 4: Ripped Superstructure (90-95km)
lines: Group 1 can be ignored. No auto-aggro and is not required for mission completion.
Aggro for Group 2 & 3 are tied with each other. Attacking either will aggro the other

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: ) of pocket 2 and loot the Militants.

pockets.heading: Single pocket
lines: Four groups (ahead, up, left and right).
Groups spawn 5 to 8 seconds after warp in
Usually, all groups aggro a few moments after spawn
If all groups aggro, be prepared to warp out if you do not have substantial tank.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Several hundred Electronic Parts, Toxic Waste

pockets.heading: Hint
lines: The damage is pretty massive when you get the common, unlucky 'all aggro'.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Shooting the Light Missile Batteries aggroes all groups

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: Attacking Group 1 aggroes Group 2 as well
The Officer's quarters @ 21km, will contain 5 units of Classified Reports required to bring back to agent and 10 units of narcotics (not required)

pockets.heading: Group 2
lines: Chance of a bonus Gist Commander/General spawning on clearing Group 2.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Jump the first two gates, then kill everything except sentries and batteries, and then loot the Officer's quarters.

pockets.heading: Video
lines: There is many ways to do this mission, but this is one way.

pockets.heading: Initial Spawn: Auto Agro (~35km away from warp in)
Group 1: (~37km from warp in) (Top Science Vessel)
Group 2:(~37km from warp in) (Bottom Science Vessel)
Group 3:(~37km from warp in) (Left Science Vessel)
lines: When you got close to proximity 10km to each Science Vessel Wreck there will be a spawn with:

pockets.heading: Wreck #3
lines: You must loot a datacore from each of the three science vessels.
Mission is complete when all drones are destroyed, so there is no blitz.
Note:  Science vessels can be looted (not salvaged) but cannot be tractored.
Drone Bounties: Battleship class drones have bounties floating just under 1mil (881k to 993k isk).
Huge amount of drone alloys (for a level 4 mission), approaching 2000 m³; also some

pockets.heading: Single Group: (10KM) (Automatic aggro)
lines: Mercenaries exclusively use Light Infernal Missiles (which do a base 75 thermal damage each.)
They hit hard and fast. It is advisable to kill the Elite Mercs ASAP if not Blitzing.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill The Thief, take reports, warp out.

pockets.heading: Objective
lines: Take the reports from the Guristas Officer's quarters and return them to your agent. The acceleration gates in this complex are not locked, and therefore do not require you to eliminate the guards to get through.
5 Classified Report - Station Defenses (0.5 m3) @ Guristas Officer's Quaters (Pocket 2)
No hostiles at initial gate (Gate yo Abandoned Stargate).

pockets.heading: Pocket 1 (Old Inactive Stargate):
lines: All aggro upon warp-in, some with delay. Ranges vary from 10 to 60km. Missile batteries at 30-40km range.
Acceleration Gate to next pocket is 40km away.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: You don't have to kill anything to get through the 1st room.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2 (Storage Facility):
lines: There have been sightings of a random Pith Eradicator/Obliterator (BS) spawn in this stage. (Confirmed by Adria Eqviis and Ganoes Paran)
All aggro upon warp-in, again some with delay. Missile Batteries 30-40km away. Sentry Guns and ships 60-70km away guarding the Officer's Quarters.
Random spawn of Pith Obliterator after clearing pocket 2. Does not happen all the time.

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: Officer's Quarters contained the mission objective loot and 10x (drug).

pockets.heading: Standing
lines: Killing one of the towers incurs a -3.0% standing hit with The Guristas Corporation

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: When you enter the mission, you will see a tower and four industrial ships
each at a cargo platform, that is attached to the tower.
If you fly towards each industrial they disappear. After the last industrial
has disappeared the first wave of ships arrives.

pockets.heading: Spawn 3 (auto aggro) (30-40km?)
lines: WARNING: DPS from Spawn 3 can be quite heavy. Keep aligned to a nearby gate or planet and be prepared to warp out if necessary.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill the thief and get the reports.

pockets.heading: Hint
lines: Warp in 20km+ if you're a sniper.

StrayAmarrCarrier5.title: Stray Amarr Carrier, Level 5

pockets.heading: Warp-In
lines: Ships at 20-75k unless you choose to warp to within a different distance
8 x Frigates (Divine Imperial Imran/Napat*/Paladin/Valok) orbits of 4-16k,
7 x Cruisers (Divine Imperial Ambrose*/Basil*/Champion/Justicar) orbits of 7-32k,
7 x Battleships (Imperial Dominator*^^/Martyr*/Imperial Templar Martyr) orbits of 17-49k,
5 x Fighters (Imperial Fighter) Carrier Support Group 1, orbits at 3k

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: 5 x Battleships (Imperial Templar Dominator) orbits at 17k

pockets.heading: Carrier Spawns
lines: When you've destroyed 40% of the Carrier’s shields, there spawns:
5 x Fighters (Imperial Fighter) Carrier Support Group 2
When you've destroyed 95% of the Carrier's shields, there spawns:
5 x Fighters (Imperial Fighter) Carrier Support Group 3
When you've destroyed 40% of the Carrier's armor, there spawns:
5 x Fighters (Imperial Fighter) Carrier Support Group 4
When you've destroyed 95% of the Carrier's armor, there spawns:
5 x Fighters (Imperial Fighter) Carrier Support Group 5
When you've destroyed 50% of the Carrier's hull, there spawns:
5 x Fighters (Imperial Fighter) Carrier Support Group 6

pockets.heading: Tips
lines: Mission occurs in normal space, so you can always warp to distances and to bookmarks farther away from the NPCs.
Your first warp attempt will be a forced Warp to 0. Even if you select Warp to 100 you will arrive at the Warp-In Beacon
Try selecting warp, canceling your warp, then warping to your desired distance
Warping to within 100km leaves plenty of distance that spreads out the aggro
Cruise Missile Batteries have a maximum range of 170km, and the Carrier’s NOS has a maximum range of 150km
Fighters will immediately attack your drones when they spawn from the Carrier, but this can be used to your advantage

Small Drones are invulnerable to the Fighters, as long as they are moving/attacking; and they are a great way to draw-off the Fighters aggro. Have your small drones attacking the carrier when the fighters spawn.
The Fighters are only be able to hit Large and Medium drones
Mission is flagged complete when the Carrier and Fighters are destroyed.  You do not need to destroy the Cap Ship Maint Array

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Eliminate the Mercenary Overlord battleship to trigger the spawn. Watch out for any incoming Mercenary Wingman Frigates that web/ scramble.
sold by NPC Corps on the market may be used).

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: Start with the Grunt Cruisers to reduce incoming DPS from the spawn.
Watch out for any scrambling Frigates and shift your primary target accordingly.

pockets.heading: Optional Approach
lines: 1)  Warp in, align, kill the Overlord, instantly warp out before scramblers lock on, then warp back at 50- 100km, make sure you're outside of Cruiser's range. Then aggro and use a MWD to separate the frigates. Count on webbing if Frigates come too close! After this keep aligning of course.
2)  Select "warp-to" distance between 50- 100km, kill all the initial ships and the
last then pick off the spawn as they approach.
3)  Tank the Overlord and snipe everything else, Micro Jump and snipe the Overlord and Spawn.

lines: Hostiles warp in when firing on outpost:

8 x Frigates (Taibu State Nagasa/Shinai/Tachi*/Wakizashi) orbits of 3-17k,
7 x Cruisers (Taibu State Bajo/Samurai/Shugo*) orbits of 18-33k,

StrikingDownTwoFliesWithOneSwing1se.title: Striking Down Two Flies With One Swing, Level 1

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroying the Repair Station is the only requirement.

StrikingDownTwoFliesWithOneSwing3an.title: Striking Down Two Flies With One Swing, Level 3

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Destroy the Repair Station and warp away

pockets.heading: Note
lines: -The Repair Outpost will help enemies heavily, repairing them.
-If you warp out of the mission, and the warp-in again, you'll land at 2km from the Repair Outpost.

SuccessComesataPrice3.title: Success comes at a Price, Level 3

info.Blitz: Destroy all ships, ignoring towers.

pockets.heading: Single Group (30km) instant aggro
lines: Blitz: Destroy all ships, ignoring towers.

pockets.heading: No structure drops loot
lines: Missile Battery may drop light missiles

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Aggro when you target within 10k or start mining the one plagioclase roid in this area.
Mission journal flags as completed when the plagioclase roid is depleted, but you have to bring the ore back to your agent to complete the mission.
* Note* if you are dally, a second spawn of 2 frigates arrives after approx 10 min.
Pick up the scientist from the research station and return with him to your agent.
Station hits for 300 damage when you are within about 2000m.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Caught the scientist and completed the mission objective without any opponents appearing.
Approach the Research Station to pick up the faulty Suntendi Virtu-Real Implants.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Caught the implants and completed the mission objective without any opponents appearing.
Container with implants pops when you are approx 1500 m from station.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: 10x Frigates (2x State Showato, 6x State Bo-Hi, 1x State Nagasa, 1x State Shinai)

info.Faction: Minmatar Republic & Gallente Federation (-2.4% standing hit for each faction)
info.Blitz: Trigger wave 3 by killing the BS 100ish KM away from warp in, In wave 3 kill the BS that is not part of the main group on spawn ie. The one not next to the web battery.

pockets.heading: Wave 1:
lines: Spawns in three groups at 50-110km from warp in as you fire upon the Minmatar Transport Ship

pockets.heading: Wave 2:
lines: Spawns after second battleship is destroyed

pockets.heading: Wave 3:
lines: Spawns when the BS that is ~100km from warpin is destroyed
Blitz: Trigger wave 3 by killing the BS 100ish KM away from warp in, In wave 3 kill the BS that is not part of the main group on spawn ie. The one not next to the web battery.

pockets.heading: Initial Spawn
lines: Amarr Transport Ship (does minimal damage (about 10 DPS), has approx cruiser HP)
Attacking the transport ship causes a respawn:

pockets.heading: Wave 1
lines: 3x Battleship (random, normally imperial tanakh/ultara in different combinations)
Destroying 2 of the battleships cause a respawn (the exact triggers seem to be random, one BS has no respawn trigger)

pockets.heading: Wave 2 (this spawns on the destruction of the first battleship)
Wave 3 (this spawns on the destruction of the second battleship)
Blitz
lines: Use a target painter to aggro the  transport ship.  This will cause Wave 1 to spawn, but will NOT cause you to lose any Amarr faction standing.  Kill the Imperial Battleship which spawns on the Right Hand side of the room (Should be the Battleship which spawns furthest from you), and the State Battleship which spawns slighty off from the other two - Mission Complete.
Stasis tower is not the mission opjective!
apparently no loss with the Caldari State
WARNING: Killing stasis tower incurs -2.4% after the mission, even without killing the transport!
Caldari Navy Vice Admiral x 5  (around 2-3m each)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Blitzing is not possible, you will require about 15 minutes for this part

pockets.heading: Hint
lines: Do not forget to loot the Mercenary Pilot dropped from the last killed ship
Last killed ship drops in loot +3 implant(confirmed 9/15/2016), dont forget to check for additional 8 mil isk (chances not known, reported by couple players)
Return your drones to drone bay after each wave or they will be targeted and killed by the succeeding reinforcement wave.

pockets.heading: Mining
lines: There are multiple veldspar and scordite asteroids , about 22km from the warp-in beacon.
No bounty on any ships in this mission

pockets.heading: Wave 1:
lines: Spawn present at warp-in, spread out 5-20k. Support frigates close quickly (700 m/s)!!
1x Republic Fleet Detective (Frigate) (see note at page top on standings loss)

pockets.heading: Wave 2:
lines: 3x Republic Fleet Ruptures (one of them: trigger)

pockets.heading: Wave 3:
lines: The last wave does considerably more damage than the first two, so if you are not ready or too busy picking up cans you can get caught with your pants down!

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: Got about 5,300,000 isk in loot. Mostly from the tags. Other players reporting up to 14m in comments.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Mission completed when wave 2 is killed, no need to engage wave 3.
need to kill the Republic Fleet Detective to finish the mission.
- about the mission in general. Info might be outdated.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: All waves instant aggro. Groups may slightly change. Given distances are from the initial warp in location.

pockets.heading: Video
lines: This video only covers part 1 of 3.
Damage Dealt: Major Explosive, Minor Kinetic
Recommended Damage Dealing: Thermal, Kinetic (Exp for 3rd wave)
- Kill Chief Republic Baldur and Chief Republic Ofeg

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Drones may be aggroed if out

info.Blitz: Destroy the Drone Control Tower and warp out, there is no need to destroy any ships or drones

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Infester Alvi (1x) - last to kill, completed mission
Infestated Station Ruins (1x) - did not destroy it
Mission Reward is a  BPC - Basic Robotics (1 run, ME5, PE2), this is needed for the next part of the mission
Mine Scordite at location given (YOU MUST MINE the ORE here) - this flags it complete, but you still need to build the item
Construct the Basic Robotics (I had to go 4 jumps to find a station I could build at)
Job takes about a little over 6 minuets.
If you get this mission early in your career this might help:
2. Find a station having the Science % Industry service.
(Right-click stations in the overview list > Show info > Services tab).
3. Bring the scordite and the blueprint to that station and unload it into the hangar.
4. Right-click the scordite and have it refined. (In the unlikely event that the station doesn't have a refinery you'll have to go to one to have scordite refined.)
5. Open Science & Industry. From the available installations select the one on the station you are on.
7. Click "Install job". Select the blueprint. Click Ok. Click Accept Quote.
5. Select to Jobs tag > Get jobs. There you see that the job is in progress. Wait for it to finish. Click the job to see at which time it will be finished.
When the job is ready click Deliver. It is now available in the hangar.
6. Pick up your stuff and return to the mission giver.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: Blood Upholders (2x) [regular belt spawn, might differ?]

pockets.heading: Group 2
lines: Blitz: Destroy the Drone Control Tower and warp out, there is no need to destroy any ships or drones

TombOfTheUnknownSoldiers4ca.title: Tomb Of The Unknown Soldiers, Level 4

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: 2x Crusier         --      Taibu State Samurai/ Taibu State Bajo
2x Frigate         --  Taibu State Katana/ Taibu State Wakizashi

pockets.heading: Spawn 1
lines: 2x Battleship     --       State Shukuro Shogun/ State Shukuro Bishamon
3x Battlecruiser  --       State Shukuro Bajo/ State Shukuro Knapaku/ State Shukuro Gassin (NOS)

pockets.heading: Spawn 2
lines: 3x Battleship     --       State Shukuro Shogun x2/ State Shukuro Bishamon
3x Battlecruiser  --       State Shukuro Bajo/ State Shukuro Gassin (NOS)

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: You can loot the Tomb however the mission does not complete until ALL ships are kill from all waves

pockets.heading: Mineable Asteroid info
lines: While I am not a miner, there seemed to be massive amounts of Veldspar roids in pocket, 50+ with at least two at over 16km radius.

pockets.heading: Tip:
lines: The ship kill faction penalty is around 1% while the turn in is closer to 5%.
Beware of the proximity mines, they do around 900 damage. They can be detonated by shooting with any weapon (does not need to hit)

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: You will see a Research Outpost station that will explode after which the first group will spawn almost on top of you.

pockets.heading: Initial Group (Auto Aggro)
lines: Spawns 5-10 seconds after warp-in at warp-in point, following the explosion of the station.
Last of shiptype spawns a wave.

pockets.heading: Mineable Asteroids
lines: 7 small and one large Veldspar, 120-140k from warp-in.

pockets.heading: Group 1 (20km) (Auto aggro)
lines: Spawns a little after warp in

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Kill 'The Executive' (Cruiser), and the mission is complete.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Many structures, No loot from the structures

pockets.heading: Video
lines: This video shows you how it's done. It also proves that there is no standing lost.

pockets.heading: Group 1
lines: The RF Officers appear as frigates on the overview and in space, but they have cruiser stats.

pockets.heading: Warp-In Pocket
lines: When attacking one group, the rest of the group will aggro, but the other group won't.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: Group 1 will aggro when closer than 10km.
When attacking group 1, group 2 will aggro as well.

pockets.heading: Group 2 (55-60km)
lines: Gallente Personnel Transport will drop 10xMarines(20m³) needed to complete the mission.
No Blitz, all ships must be destroyed.

pockets.heading: Timed Spawn 1 (90 seconds from warpin)
lines: Possible completion trigger (one or the other)

pockets.heading: Timed Spawn 2 (180 seconds from warpin)
lines: Possible completion trigger (one or the other)

pockets.heading: Notes:
lines: - Did not attempt blowing up structures; there was an ORCA, 2 Ravents, 4 Cranes, and 4 Silos. (all large collidable)
- Heavy nos and target painting from the carrier. Didn't see any web/scram/other NOS.
- Carriers tank DPS was greather than my DPS; left it un-destroyed; 10 warden I's and 5 hammerhead II's could not kill it
- Blitz: Tank the room (approx 2000 dps, standard caldari damage profile); kill the charons. (they orbit at 70km).
- Loot and salvage was TERRIBLE. In total, less than 4 million. Highly suggest blitzing this.
- Charrons only dropped trade goods (600 rocket fuel, 1700 oxygen, 23 scientists, 30 marines)

pockets.heading: First Spawn: (50km)
lines: Mining: Both rooms combined yielded 80M in minerals at Feb 2010 Market prices.
(Note: Used a perfect refine and zero tax at a 50% NPC station, RSS)

pockets.heading: Standing loss
lines: Killing the Transport Ship incurs a -4.0% standing loss

pockets.heading: Mineable Asteroid info
lines: First Pocket - 80+ asteroids about 10km away: 60% veldspar, 20% Plagioclase, 20% Pyroxeres
Second Pocket - 60+ asteroids about 50km away: 60% veldspar, 20% Plagioclase, 19% Pyroxeres, 1% Omber

pockets.heading: Standing loss
lines: Killing the Transport Ship incurs a -4.0% standing loss
•You can't just kill the Transport ship Collect the Marines and book, had to kill 4 out of 5 Frigates to complete mission.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Killing groups 1 and 3 and collecting the militia from the transport completes the mission objectives. All ships in both groups
die; collecting the militia is not enough.

pockets.heading: Group 1 (20-30km) (Delayed aggro)
lines: 6x Frigate (Corpii Herald, Corpii Upholder, Corpii Seeker, Corpii Upholder)

pockets.heading: Group 2: (40km)
lines: 6x Frigate (Corpii Herald, Corpii Upholder, Corpii Seeker, Corpii Upholder)

pockets.heading: Group 3: (55km)
lines: 6x Frigate (Corpii Diviner, Corpii Seeker, Corpii Collector, Corpii Raider)
No more sensor dampening in this mission. Tracking disruptors instead.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Complete when Group 3 is destroyed, grab militants from Transport wreck for turn in, don't need to touch Group 1 or 2.

pockets.heading: Structures
lines: Many, nothing dropped loot (did not try couplings or junctions).

pockets.heading: Hint
lines: Killing the Transport Ship incurs a -4.0% standing loss with Blood Raiders.

pockets.heading: Video
lines: This video shows what you will be dealing with.

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: The militants will be in the transport wreck. Only 10 militants are required to bring back to agent to claim the rewards.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Kill group 1, then approach group 2 and kill those. Be careful with drones after group 1, as they pull aggro from group 3 while working on group 2.
(To complete this mission you must take out the transport, and take its cargo)

pockets.heading: Asteroids
lines: About 30 Jetscans are used if you mine all the ore

pockets.heading: Standing loss
lines: Killing the Transport Ship incurs a -4.0% standing loss

pockets.heading: Video
lines: This video shows what you will be dealing with.

pockets.heading: Initial Gate (20- 30km)
lines: Possible auto aggro from all but Battlecruisers.
Acceleration gate to next pocket is at 23km.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: The 3rd Group has a proximity aggro of about 80km, attacking it will draw room aggro.
Ship amount in each group may vary, the list below is an example.

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: Eliminate the small group at the initial gate. Destroy the 3rd group.
Loot the Marines from the Transport wrecks. Return to Station.

pockets.heading: Tip
lines: from the Angel Cartel Personnel Transport wrecks.

pockets.heading: Standing Loss
lines: Killing the Transport Ship incurs a 4.0% standing loss.

pockets.heading: Pocket 2
lines: has drone aggro even on long range

pockets.heading: Group 2 (70-80km):
lines: (cant tell when they put aggro on me)

pockets.heading: Group 3 (90km):
lines: will aggro when group 1 is engaged

pockets.heading: Group 4 (90km):
lines: spawns after attacking the Transport at the same location of group 3

pockets.heading: Group 5 (70-80km):
lines: spawns after killing group 2 at the same location of group 2, no need to kill this group to finish the mission

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Kill Group 3, 3b, 4, loot Transport Wreck, done.

pockets.heading: Standing loss:

info.BLITZ: only kill group 3, militants comes from transport ship once everything in the group is killed.

lines: 8x Cruiser (Federation Misthios / Hastatus / Praktor Optioon / Praktor Ouragos)

pockets.heading: Group 3 (100km)
lines: 6x Cruiser (Federation Nauclarius / Praktor Legionarius / Praktor Centurion / Praktor Hippeus)
BLITZ: only kill group 3, militants comes from transport ship once everything in the group is killed.

info.Blitz: You only have to kill the group with the Transport Ship. Once the group with the Transport Ship is dead, take 10 Marines from Transport wreck to complete the mission. Killing the other group is not necessary.

pockets.heading: Warp-In Pocket
lines: Gate is unlocked, you can ignore this group if you want to.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Blitz: You only have to kill the group with the Transport Ship. Once the group with the Transport Ship is dead, take 10 Marines from Transport wreck to complete the mission. Killing the other group is not necessary.
Killing Caldari Personnel Transport give you -2.4% standing loss.

info.Recommended ship classes: Battleship, Battlecruiser, HAC (can also be done in a Recon)

pockets.heading: At Gate
lines: Gate is unlocked, you can ignore this group if you want to.

pockets.heading: Single Group: (25km Delayed Aggro)
lines: The first Acceleration Gate is 20 km from the warp-in point.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: There will be a group at the Ammatar Holy Dome when you warp-in and two others will spawn within a few seconds. They will look like two groups.
The group at the Ammatar Holy Dome will aggro drones.
No Aggro on warp in. Group 2 aggroes by proximity ~70km

pockets.heading: Blitz
lines: In Pocket 2 you only have to kill the group with the Transport Ship. Once the group with the Transport Ships is dead, take 10 militants from one of the Transport wrecks to complete the mission. Killing the other group is not necessary. You may use other militants if you have them.

pockets.heading: Standing loss
lines: Killing the Transport Ship incurs a 4.0% standing loss with Blood Raiders.
